name: Team NRSC Digital
subject: Does Biden make you comfortable?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
According to the president, “a higher percentage of Americans reported feeling financially comfortable at the end of 2021 than at any time since 2013.
Peter,

We read President Biden’s op-ed in the Wall Street Journal and we’re having a hard time believing what he’s saying. We’re wondering if you might, too.

According to the president, **“a higher percentage of Americans reported feeling financially comfortable at the end of 2021 than at any time since 2013.”**

**_Do you feel more financially comfortable now than when President Trump was in office? We really need to know._**

[**< < yes >>**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f16e48b16b8d42cab71d3f35aade384e&_e=dT5sYVDQ5E3r5LZik97E_g44v0svO1M25Jgo69BZ9NxXKUjU1p2XW9buvn8Ik12V37ym2crqCKG6P4jPuSLraSOhyH-YGtTCu8S5yy75FFl72Y40xDbNWONAKhnUdDqVfMDkH2hPbPzHU4pNiuoSxTOOJZ_0PWnMyZz6pwq5frb2liH0k2rUqI_6A1bDA3C7ALSbu87DKooDKEQ7pQzdLEShpKFpPknxEHKBT3_YhjQoX3y0csSp1pm7p0vN0HOXLSyJIQE19eYS92SGtCJoUaulvPUY3PxnRc-202idlVnuuKpOSwL513Eau-NK715TCo4tn_sOLr4NBHsqDJ4zi0SKOwB81ROEpTABOf7QTRfPaVY8Bu18fz34Rk6EyD3lOIh6eifJy4bHNVtOUZwZ38KqVhFKgeuTw20DN31MwWcT8ORCY7knzC9s86g5yVK0yFxaLqPxGF8YC41L3FEbvpxOrd65GJzpA42gUZ9JA4xvW2kKJAtLRm0hORA4EDr8hTLRbMR-qwKYhiGI3GAqdg%3D%3D) [**< < no >>**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=f16e48b16b8d42cab71d3f35aade384e&_e=dT5sYVDQ5E3r5LZik97E_g44v0svO1M25Jgo69BZ9NxXKUjU1p2XW9buvn8Ik12V37ym2crqCKG6P4jPuSLraSOhyH-YGtTCu8S5yy75FFl72Y40xDbNWONAKhnUdDqVfMDkH2hPbPzHU4pNiuoSxTOOJZ_0PWnMyZz6pwq5frb2liH0k2rUqI_6A1bDA3C7ALSbu87DKooDKEQ7pQzdLEShpKFpPknxEHKBT3_YhjQoX3y0csSp1pm7p0vN0HOXLSyJIQE19eYS92SGtCJoUaulvPUY3PxnRc-202idlVnuuKpOSwL513Eau-NK715TKDLOVTVPf6mqSTpgRy0_Rnt272wTxdFTOAP2dKjalwPMYBIkOoIdqB1zhcwiapD8XC_FHcRe39Q56Q3a_jsD0O3nJhXJRWrTOsa3zL7lj9GRQ7vjl0vOCm3Se1WssWikDFaxzr-GFqJJA7OolSq-qYCbehwt56fkINrQJvlUUvPORz3XwIFULJqF3TJUGAUkZsGPbEpwWkQ8RwBIdcSQ1w%3D%3D)
What’s more, President Biden – who is responsible for creating the mess thatwe’re in today - said that **“with the right policies, the U.S. cantransition from recovery to stable, steady growth and bring down inflation without giving up historic gains."**

**Do you believe that President Biden has any idea how to bring down inflation?**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: What Pride month means to me
body:
| | |
---
**I’m an openly gay Democrat running against a Republican that voted NO on the Equality Act.

[ Donate to help me GET OUT THE VOTE ahead of the June 7 California primary. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013393/348457790/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMyZTMyMy0wOWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-BVrOdx0OZ6Hd37UC0a8H6FZWzNoaKp8BiEN-NEwZg=)**
---
I waited until I was in my late 20s to come out as gay. I feared that if I showed my true identity in the small town I grew up in, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against.
With bills like Don’t Say Gay and the criminalization of treatment for trans youth, it’s more important than ever that I say _loud and proud_ that I’m an openly gay candidate running for Congress.
When politicians like Rep. Jay Obernolte vote NO on the Equality Act, they’re telling Americans that it should be perfectly legal to fire employees and evict tenants just because of who they love. **I’m running to defeat Obernolte because _no one_ should be afraid to live their life as their true and authentic self. For those who can’t be out yet, I’ll always fight for you.**
**[Ballots are due in the June 7 California primary in just a few days, and I need your help to win this race. Can you donate to help me GET OUT THE VOTE today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013394/348457791/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMyZTMyMy0wOWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-BVrOdx0OZ6Hd37UC0a8H6FZWzNoaKp8BiEN-NEwZg=)**

Record-high majorities of the American people accept LGBTQ+ Americans like me. But the Republican Party now represents a small minority that makes us culture war targets for political gain. States are targeting transgender youth as discrimination and violence rise, especially against trans people and trans people of color. **I need your help to defeat an anti-LGBTQ+ Republican. In Congress, I’ll work to pass the Equality Act and fight discrimination. But first, my people-powered campaign needs your help to win.** **[We’re just days away from the California primary, and we need your help to GET OUT THE VOTE. Can you donate $10 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013396/348457793/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMyZTMyMy0wOWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-BVrOdx0OZ6Hd37UC0a8H6FZWzNoaKp8BiEN-NEwZg=)** Thanks for standing up. – Derek Marshall

clean_body: | | | I’m an openly gay Democrat running against a Republican that voted NO on the Equality Act. = I waited until I was in my late 20s to come out as gay. I feared that if I showed my true identity in the small town I grew up in, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against. With bills like Don’t Say Gay and the criminalization of treatment for trans youth, it’s more important than ever that I say loud and proud that I’m an openly gay candidate running for Congress. When politicians like Rep. Jay Obernolte vote NO on the Equality Act, they’re telling Americans that it should be perfectly legal to fire employees and evict tenants just because of who they love. I’m running to defeat Obernolte because no one should be afraid to live their life as their true and authentic self. For those who can’t be out yet, I’ll always fight for you. = = Record-high majorities of the American people accept LGBTQ+ Americans like me. But the Republican Party now represents a small minority that makes us culture war targets for political gain. States are targeting transgender youth as discrimination and violence rise, especially against trans people and trans people of color. I need your help to defeat an anti-LGBTQ+ Republican. In Congress, I’ll work to pass the Equality Act and fight discrimination. But first, my people-powered campaign needs your help to win. = Thanks for standing up. – Derek Marshall | | | = | | P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416) | | | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: We're In A Rhythm!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-Jun 1 Vol. 2, #15**
---
| | |
##
1 Jun 22

**Only 6 Weeks Until The July 19 Primary.**

The campaign is in a great rhythm. Door Hangers are distributed to targeted areas Tuesdays and Wednesdays, Meet & Greets on Thursdays and Team Door Hanger Distribution & Sign Waving on Saturdays. Texts and calls are made to voters throughout the week. Thousands and thousands of voters have been impacted. Thank You!

**Meet & Greet**
Another Meet & Greet will be held tomorrow, Thursday, Jun 2.
7-8p
McDonalds
13800 Outlet Dr, Silver Spring, 20904
Briggs Chaney Market Place
Come and learn about our historic movement and meet Jeff.

**Sign Waving - One Power Hour**
THIS, Saturday, Jun 4, you're invited to sign wave for one power hour with the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign.
Noon-1p
The intersection of Powder Mill Road & Beltsville Drive
Consider parking at the AMC Center Park-8 (movie theatre)
4001 Powder Mill Rd, Beltsville, 20705
Please park as far as possible from the building so we don't limit customer access.
Meet at the intersection of Powder Mill Road & Beltsville Drive
You should see Jeff there.

If you have a sign, please bring it. If you have a sign and are not planning on sign waving or posting, please let us know so we can put it to use and stretch our limited funds. Be sure to bring your BIG smile.

**Phone Calling**
Phone Calling is a key strategy to impact voters and is very simple. Many of the voters have received a door hanger and met Jeff. The pre-recorded voicemail from Jeff is an important part of our strategy to reinforce our messaging that Jeff is "Standing With You And For You!"

You can make an impact no matter where you live in the nation. Please email the campaign at info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com if you’re in interested in getting trained. It's easy.

**Social Media**
The campaign is taking steps to build Jeff Warner's social media presence.
You can find Jeff under RepJeffWarner on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/RepJeffWarner) & Twitter (@RepJeff Warner).
Be sure to like, share, subscribe, follow, etc. to help us grow his following.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of this amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=229020ec8d&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. THERE IS HOPE!

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

We’re going to be working non-stop to make sure we talk to every voter possible from now until November 8th. |
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c0f0cb1e156468ba1b93caf11e14663&_e=Rp4Wqod2lB9pa6L8RI0Oz_QSZxlcWfOIqFbbh1ygaiX8V9ROSu5MD2e_z6j0MsHe1ElCMmg0S0vWLUXmSVSbwys7qdB1pIzZWa6Waq8JcSjSoo6ovbuFABWEpCdcRPJU5IitED4WAX95u-zF4xDfOxKnbEyENjFp4WFyq-Fh48tIdJ51kTptS7rlcxFrxl4-qblSMAx5N9kbW01sPVphr8fgK1jYR6ePG-oY1W89FDuoIHR_wOkId-9IZqNcQjcH0ZJFZFS_YWOszEPJ3DC9ZNfcA-coElQptGMmiU7jG4H810GjaL-aZCZUSXHISZXOMkGII09RizmWVwRhoZNnY25Qqol7dSvX8KVsnTHz59r0PUu-yA1VuLcr8UgfUfmE88pK72t9dea6OAU__y0yMqrkigbJsTSNHOxGJuXUX4Y2l0bAeaeJf6CEu1Lgn56O2YvGCzg5vIFXfovoSMee4tDM_g4N6Uc9vfk3n9Dt-R6P8HsW93fZuFQ8TQ2i4zkeN538TxmNx83SPgCTKIdsFUUODwdcmY4owMQT2biI90PG5pVz8JZpf1jcjIys9pM2ozmgZjbUqA26xcRcuXjzmOCkX9XfOrY_7HWfmHv30HJs9xx1lbR7sF0Cx0vxb8IH)

Fellow American,

Every vote matters.

Team Herschel is going to be working EVERY DAY through November 8th to secure Georgians' votes to win this Senate seat and help Republicans take back the majority.

Fellow American, that's where you come in. Now that I am officially the Republican nominee, **[I am personally asking you for your endorsement to help us build on our primary win!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c0f0cb1e156468ba1b93caf11e14663&_e=Rp4Wqod2lB9pa6L8RI0Oz_QSZxlcWfOIqFbbh1ygaiX8V9ROSu5MD2e_z6j0MsHe1ElCMmg0S0vWLUXmSVSbwys7qdB1pIzZWa6Waq8JcSjSoo6ovbuFABWEpCdcRPJU5IitED4WAX95u-zF4xDfOxKnbEyENjFp4WFyq-Fh48tIdJ51kTptS7rlcxFrxl4-qblSMAx5N9kbW01sPVphr8fgK1jYR6ePG-oY1W89FDuoIHR_wOkId-9IZqNcQjcH0ZJFZFS_YWOszEPJ3DC9ZNfcA-coElQptGMmiU7jG4H810GjaL-aZCZUSXHISZXOMkGII09RizmWVwRhoZNnY25Qqol7dSvX8KVsnTHz59r0PUu-yA1VuLcr8UgfUfmE88pK72t9dea6OAU__y0yMqrkigbJsTSNHOxGJuXUX4brYd2KAZQQX2pyI2ELB2xABGYXDBKTRLA2z9WYs-8XxpGr88S6bpBmXR6PEtAnnQZBnzdyX5EMl-0jOGkQQ50XJ4WTntyKymDsnFGSwehBz48SGjVNCgYDb1zzt_lft4NqphvFMzxMF5fBYdcT_2kyCvEqqAjOWPoABvcYX4t5ar-3LApcYGGIJt0o8wjiVNXxms5b04bwKo7aNiCHkxeh)**

[**Endorse Herschel Walker for Senate ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c0f0cb1e156468ba1b93caf11e14663&_e=Rp4Wqod2lB9pa6L8RI0Oz_QSZxlcWfOIqFbbh1ygaiX8V9ROSu5MD2e_z6j0MsHe1ElCMmg0S0vWLUXmSVSbwys7qdB1pIzZWa6Waq8JcSjSoo6ovbuFABWEpCdcRPJU5IitED4WAX95u-zF4xDfOxKnbEyENjFp4WFyq-Fh48tIdJ51kTptS7rlcxFrxl4-qblSMAx5N9kbW01sPVphr8fgK1jYR6ePG-oY1W89FDuoIHR_wOkId-9IZqNcQjcH0ZJFZFS_YWOszEPJ3DC9ZNfcA-coElQptGMmiU7jG4H810GjaL-aZCZUSXHISZXOMkGII09RizmWVwRhoZNnY25Qqol7dSvX8KVsnTHz59r0PUu-yA1VuLcr8UgfUfmE88pK72t9dea6OAU__y0yMqrkigbJsTSNHOxGJuXUX4Y9PkyLGNIYMfNzSIIkc_ZAKTYKb1c7y41Mw_OklVXMHlM573ggBBICHz4qG8OZBw8QzO98R6Lm7Q7VtyNhIzUEdAWri3woxzs17Po73I4znKLcXj-lW6LfhBhQhY69AiLhpRWEx-5qxB3WvXPCwXQlh2dr46ornmo7mokNkduM8CmuaiWt-fqv3_7-lbKiaOWI3JAFPORwcvvBN1zHSRcE)
By giving your endorsement, you are signaling to your friends, family, and neighbors that you're ready to take back the Senate majority this November.

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

We're at a fork in the road. _**We have a clear choice.**_

Raphael Warnock and Joe Biden have dragged us down the path of skyrocketing inflation. There's violence in the streets and chaos at our border. Shelves are empty at our grocery stores. There's disrespect for our Constitution, censorship, and racial division.

Under a Democrat-controlled Washington, America isn't trusted by our allies or feared by our enemies. Instead of energy independence, we buy oil from dictators who hate us.

**If you're ok with this agenda, you can send Senator Warnock back to Washington. He'll give you more of it. Guaranteed.**

**But if you're as sick as I am about what's happening in Washington,[I hope you'll endorse our campaign today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c0f0cb1e156468ba1b93caf11e14663&_e=Rp4Wqod2lB9pa6L8RI0Oz_QSZxlcWfOIqFbbh1ygaiX8V9ROSu5MD2e_z6j0MsHe1ElCMmg0S0vWLUXmSVSbwys7qdB1pIzZWa6Waq8JcSjSoo6ovbuFABWEpCdcRPJU5IitED4WAX95u-zF4xDfOxKnbEyENjFp4WFyq-Fh48tIdJ51kTptS7rlcxFrxl4-qblSMAx5N9kbW01sPVphr8fgK1jYR6ePG-oY1W89FDuoIHR_wOkId-9IZqNcQjcH0ZJFZFS_YWOszEPJ3DC9ZNfcA-coElQptGMmiU7jG4H810GjaL-aZCZUSXHISZXOMkGII09RizmWVwRhoZNnY25Qqol7dSvX8KVsnTHz59r0PUu-yA1VuLcr8UgfUfmE88pK72t9dea6OAU__y0yMqrkigbJsTSNHOxGJuXUX4ZlARcH0aFXo7F2iUcmulmKU0-16nNLArLSqJbpZXLHDYcOfk9yfZVP_w0pKNKNLQhpsv4h_ycX3weQF7a53z54lq69IhwlI-TwWoAif069BbYaufnnidqunR1HTw56KttodD3zOXmQO7CUNLFdhayH-R25OvQkerQaVP1EK6fdzf5SDE58w35I91COgrq28tneJitNY_Se1LBL4e7i0FTB)**

Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority, so they are already raising record sums of money to cling to their razor-thin majority. **[That's why it's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c0f0cb1e156468ba1b93caf11e14663&_e=Rp4Wqod2lB9pa6L8RI0Oz_QSZxlcWfOIqFbbh1ygaiX8V9ROSu5MD2e_z6j0MsHe1ElCMmg0S0vWLUXmSVSbwys7qdB1pIzZWa6Waq8JcSjSoo6ovbuFABWEpCdcRPJU5IitED4WAX95u-zF4xDfOxKnbEyENjFp4WFyq-Fh48tIdJ51kTptS7rlcxFrxl4-qblSMAx5N9kbW01sPVphr8fgK1jYR6ePG-oY1W89FDuoIHR_wOkId-9IZqNcQjcH0ZJFZFS_YWOszEPJ3DC9ZNfcA-coElQptGMmiU7jG4H810GjaL-aZCZUSXHISZXOMkGII09RizmWVwRhoZNnY25Qqol7dSvX8KVsnTHz59r0PUu-yA1VuLcr8UgfUfmE88pK72t9dea6OAU__y0yMqrkigbJsTSNHOxGJuXUX4YXga2ys8_gNDJepbzpWXjxOzmpPm54tnSBzIB4Nk2aE6369enU5X8bnvj8pdQOgrrJg0FeEqKOt3bMtIzmVBZRjvLvA_tbt67LQ7ZnG4LFcP4O89jSRGQAkXlQOrqNRbS4vpVcgcBuRaQi3bue0Rh0GQLrHp8pUuz-UlGha8aSeSOh575jHg2gPtZpXjwNoV6Ypwewh8Fm1ZomATqDHKEa)**

clean_body: We’re going to be working non-stop to make sure we talk to every voter possible from now until November 8th. | Fellow American, Every vote matters. Team Herschel is going to be working EVERY DAY through November 8th to secure Georgians' votes to win this Senate seat and help Republicans take back the majority. Fellow American, that's where you come in. Now that I am officially the Republican nominee, By giving your endorsement, you are signaling to your friends, family, and neighbors that you're ready to take back the Senate majority this November. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. We're at a fork in the road. We have a clear choice. Raphael Warnock and Joe Biden have dragged us down the path of skyrocketing inflation. There's violence in the streets and chaos at our border. Shelves are empty at our grocery stores. There's disrespect for our Constitution, censorship, and racial division. Under a Democrat-controlled Washington, America isn't trusted by our allies or feared by our enemies. Instead of energy independence, we buy oil from dictators who hate us. If you're ok with this agenda, you can send Senator Warnock back to Washington. He'll give you more of it. Guaranteed. But if you're as sick as I am about what's happening in Washington, Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority, so they are already raising record sums of money to cling to their razor-thin majority. Thanks for being on Team Herschel! Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate P.S. Even if you don't live in Georgia, you can have a huge impact in this race. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: 56 Minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq** Last year, I showed you what it took to see a U.S. Senate candidate right in your city and town. Without a million-dollar budget, our team canvassed the state and showed up at your summer events. Together, we visited over 60 counties and held 30+ town halls free and open to the public. Many of you were shocked at the time I took to personally visit you. Doing it came naturally to me since I wanted to do it.

Yet and still, my opponent manages to not only receive his party's nomination but raise millions in record time without holding a single town hall. It's not unbelievable. It's impossible for the hard work we put in to pay off amidst potential scandal. Nevertheless, we press on!

On a side note, I'm making a prediction that Senator Todd Young won't participate in any debates this year. Do you remember when on April 14, 2022, the Republican National Committee pulled out of its participation in presidential debates? What's to stop our friends across the aisle from pulling out of debates altogether? I rest my case.
**Texas**
56 minutes. On May 24th at 11:33 a.m., school shooter Salvador Ramos entered Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas, and opened fire. You may have heard reports that the police didn't enter the school until nearly an hour later. Every single timeline reveals police entering the school approximately two minutes later, exchanging fire, and calling for backup.

In tragic situations like this, it can be easy to place blame, except on the folks actually responsible. Now, here's the hard truth. Since Senator Young's election in 2016, there have been roughly 3,000 mass shootings in America resulting in close to 1,000 deaths. Let that sink in for a moment.

By refusing to take any action whatsoever, Mr. Young continues to contribute to this carnage. It's not a mystery. Together, our two senators have amassed $4,147,549 from the NRA this year alone. Sadly, their acceptance of this money results in their inaction. They have failed to find a way to protect our 2nd Amendment rights while also protecting the American people from gun violence.

Don't believe what they say. Guns do not equal safety. Right now, there are more guns in America than people! If guns meant safety, America would be the safest place on earth. Instead, we're one of the most dangerous.
**Buffalo**
**How can you give prayers and condolences to one tragic mass shooting and not another?** That's exactly what I saw our senators do. On May 14, 2022, Buffalo, NY experienced a racially motivated grocery store shooting that claimed the lives of ten innocent people. Neither one of our senators offered the slightest condolence, and yet, on May 24, 2022, in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas school shooting, we saw tweets and official statements from them. Shame on them.

Gun violence is gun violence. A mass shooting is a mass shooting. It doesn't matter where it takes place (from Buffalo to Chicago to Milwaukee to Uvalde), it's a tragedy for us all and deserving of our attention. The fact that our senators don't recognize this is disgraceful.

To make matters worse, just this week, they both voted against the **Domestic Terrorism Act of 2022** , which, following the Buffalo shooting, would simply allow authorities to track and analyze domestic terrorist activity for the goal of prevention.
**Our Senators Are Responsible for**
**America's Baby Formula Shortage**
Our senators are hypocrites. While they tout the preservation of life, they vote against every piece of legislation that would possibly protect it and refuse to pay attention to issues that could arise later as national crises. The baby formula shortage is a prime example.

Here's how. As early as September 2019-21, the FDA conducted investigations revealing infractions on a baby formula plant, stating that personnel weren't washing their hands or changing gloves after touching certain surfaces. Why in the world didn't our senators act when the whistleblower report came out during this same period?

To add insult to injury, they started this year off with a bang by voting against the Women's Health Protection Act which would advance women's reproductive rights. They fail to remember the tens of thousands of women nationwide who lose their lives annually to unsafe at-home abortions. They also fail to recognize the anguish women face when forced to give birth without healthcare and a failing adoption system.

**How can you force women to have babies and then oppose legislation that feeds them?** It just doesn't make sense. $28M. That's how much is needed to help counter the formula shortage issue in America. I'll be watching closely to see how our senators vote on H.R. 7790, a bill that would simply expand the FDA's ability to help end this madness. Without a doubt, this is where we should see our taxpayer dollars being put to good use!
**Inflation**
No matter who's president, our nation would be experiencing inflation right now. When demand for goods and services exceeds supply, the demand pushes prices up. This leads to inflation. Our senators like to point fingers at Biden, but the truth is, we're aiding the war in Ukraine. We're also in the middle of a pandemic. What did you expect?

What if I told you we could all have higher incomes to meet rising costs? That we could all have healthcare. That we could all have more COVID relief and be prepared for the next surge. What if it was possible for us _not_ to be dependent on fossil fuels? I don't know about you, but I'm tired of being lied to.

Our senators know good and well that there's a way the rising cost of gas and food wouldn't have much of an impact on us. Instead, they dare to introduce senseless legislation on ways we can save for retirement. **How in the world can we think about _saving_ for anything at a time like this?**
**Ukraine**
On Monday, May 23, 2022, the first Russian soldier was found guilty of war crimes in Ukraine and sentenced to life in prison. An event like this is particularly rare, especially while the war in question still rages on. As the Ukrainian people continue to face obstacle after obstacle, it's encouraging to see them activating their judicial system early on to bring swift justice to the victims' families. My hope is that this will continue and help curtail the senseless violence we've seen.
**Happy Memorial Day! **
From my family to yours, I'm wishing you a safe and Happy Memorial Day! On this Memorial Day, I'll be gathering with my own family and quietly reflecting on lives lost that were dear to me and also dear to our country. May God bless you! May God bless America! May God bless our troops!
**Now, here's what I need you to do right now: **
* Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said in the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until _**_we_**_ won!
* Commit to my campaign now by [donating $9](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=60be4e6475&e=a49cb82bb3) or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going.
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=64bbaa51ec&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=934c081048&e=a49cb82bb3), view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022
---
|
---
In honor of Memorial Day, May 30, 2022.

You must be a registered voter in order to support me in the General Election. Set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=cf598d5f5b&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=bc4221a6a8&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 or more to this grassroots campaign now!

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.

What if I told you we could all have higher incomes to meet rising costs? That we could all have healthcare. That we could all have more COVID relief and be prepared for the next surge. What if it was possible for us not to be dependent on fossil fuels? I don't know about you, but I'm tired of being lied to. Our senators know good and well that there's a way the rising cost of gas and food wouldn't have much of an impact on us. Instead, they dare to introduce senseless legislation on ways we can save for retirement. How in the world can we think about saving for anything at a time like this? Ukraine On Monday, May 23, 2022, the first Russian soldier was found guilty of war crimes in Ukraine and sentenced to life in prison. An event like this is particularly rare, especially while the war in question still rages on. As the Ukrainian people continue to face obstacle after obstacle, it's encouraging to see them activating their judicial system early on to bring swift justice to the victims' families. My hope is that this will continue and help curtail the senseless violence we've seen. Happy Memorial Day! From my family to yours, I'm wishing you a safe and Happy Memorial Day! On this Memorial Day, I'll be gathering with my own family and quietly reflecting on lives lost that were dear to me and also dear to our country. May God bless you! May God bless America! May God bless our troops! Now, here's what I need you to do right now: Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said in the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until we won! Commit to my campaign now by or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going. where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two! Visit , view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana! Sincerely, Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq. Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate 2022 | In honor of Memorial Day, May 30, 2022. | | | Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah | Haneefah Khaaliq for U.S. Senate - Indiana 2022 | | Want to volunteer? Sign up ! Share this newsletter with friends! | | | What Do I Need? Check your voter's registration right by clicking . You must be a registered voter in order to support me in the General Election. Set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute. Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! Check out and share my posts and your first $9 or more to this grassroots campaign now! name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Leftists are Coming!
body:
What will they do with all that money? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Leftists are Coming!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-j/)
Every 10 years we do a census, and congressional districts are redrawn as a result thereof. Because ours got more Democratic, The Left intends to spend millions of dollars trying to take it. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Biden Gets One Right and One Wrong](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Over the weekend, Joe Biden reached out to Taiwan. With his other hand, he slapped them in the face. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-k/)

The Biden administration is contemplating setting up a Misinformation Governance Board, which sounds a whole lot like an Orwellian Ministry of Truth (from 1984.) God help us! You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidvtt-kujkulhluu-b/)

The Biden administration surrendered Afghanistan to the Taliban about nine months ago. They apparently believed that this was a new, more moderate Taliban. How's that working out? name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election.
Hey Peter,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ae516986077341c1880221d898244a29&_e=AGRQCtPQVHVTdQ9oezK5yz4QRH4uyJi9zrI3f7c0oG4BZDE3TaGrCaae7-hc2Dr2Gj7JyIE5WTP92F-b0qQvukqEufVrQ14tADzqXsTSSB9cNZuz704_UdbHsTq63n9ylzqzngKhHxfvTpYqjdpMXMUB8trHTSNKNrkwPvvdIPEYNwJoZmZ_Prz7yc3dkemfX4EY2LaUiKHaTlujj51Zsqstn3FD7fm7b532nX8wpSLvoSMvnVgGw_u3F6FmMA-lVE27NBtV5C2kfuIUE2oYdtsk7jF_OXbzQjxwfSJpbgH7Khfh_jKGMgt83w4viga44eblgGSTBMLW_ePP5sDS0QXwHRNOqlBvBZAkn8ACLRtAEXPDeQ8edkgPg77JDBM7)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ae516986077341c1880221d898244a29&_e=AGRQCtPQVHVTdQ9oezK5yz4QRH4uyJi9zrI3f7c0oG4BZDE3TaGrCaae7-hc2Dr2Gj7JyIE5WTP92F-b0qQvukqEufVrQ14tADzqXsTSSB9cNZuz704_UdbHsTq63n9ylzqzngKhHxfvTpYqjdpMXMUB8trHTSNKNrkwPvvdIPG6_eUAZpkhsff5jR6-U9h0xo0Ke9flBR88mn075xrmV0LEnXDjIPSiAaX0vxCZkScxkW4au9-ybbBsqGE-y--CoL0n11rB8QJsftj69FaFxIfevYiHiFJK66wfBJwlXyuitlc_bbz5l80kpdKFVH1RHOf7Dw_Hs-FazuC1jYRKCBt1HqR251tpc4HvZ--W_6Ozo_ojm80ecewLYSJ1gH4u)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ae516986077341c1880221d898244a29&_e=AGRQCtPQVHVTdQ9oezK5yz4QRH4uyJi9zrI3f7c0oG4BZDE3TaGrCaae7-hc2Dr2Gj7JyIE5WTP92F-b0qQvukqEufVrQ14tADzqXsTSSB9cNZuz704_UdbHsTq63n9ylzqzngKhHxfvTpYqjdpMXMUB8trHTSNKNrkwPvvdIPEptzT655wLmxmsSg38X1-5eMbptkqaQVaIs4tMdSF6VHMSMauCt1KmaFcn0f_McU32BAi5bLtN5diD6v5U3eesmcQBE7kEELlDm-GzxnXL1UjGwNfHt1CDst68ZEFS9A8Z2q4zHI7ZQEwi2acW5XsnigsGF5tbmViGTaW6JryuF6Qy1SHbqT7L-6r5qJ_SDR_YkUxnckDkJgNjerh9kwiw)
It’s not just me, Peter, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ae516986077341c1880221d898244a29&_e=AGRQCtPQVHVTdQ9oezK5yz4QRH4uyJi9zrI3f7c0oG4BZDE3TaGrCaae7-hc2Dr2Gj7JyIE5WTP92F-b0qQvukqEufVrQ14tADzqXsTSSB9cNZuz704_UdbHsTq63n9ylzqzngKhHxfvTpYqjdpMXMUB8trHTSNKNrkwPvvdIPHBYDsNSeTGuEnhlS9-2KSQ1aGV4q_g89meEvVY3AVve_BlPUOSN8usa3u13OzInLxuU_2HqSPabZvuT8K51nCgxcqKWK4qWE22vFGrZOt-SGYqU0QlpoptQEq6oqb_-JEHvRCY5YLCPs2oqnfMAKba6na5CzvEGzy9UPQnp0PFxk9icLiAO8-z5XD97WgY3F0aReOeAy-RbYe-YvX8uUPA)

subject: Join Laurel and Team Imer at the Western Conservative Summit!
body:
Come and join us for FREE at the Western Conservative Summit Friday and Saturday.
---
| | | | | | |

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QLpA8bMkbrSxdio2sChamgIaLlotDzs6rwfSgUxfYNfawbaUtpYOOPwdYJ4T0y-wFx7pMFDuzVhDWi7uWHFgW2am1XX-TX50dYzHpUehXxx659UbNoGQ7LnGVCuhjtEY_mW89sZJBcUDrPoHJo8Kyn5MdWSkt9wFJlD6i4K-v5c=&c=mnMclm-m6LBBOL0E4bVRAh3UjStrl5UkhxZC77qkoX208tuuqBtt_w==&ch=rKwF0s5wDwpE23GA_QkvghzQmgiVXxnISoi5s0UrqFYKL_-xUrh4Lg==)

| Hello Fellow American Patriot,
We would like to invite you to join Team Imer at the 2022 Western Conservative Summit!
Team Imer is looking for people to staff our campaign booth that will be located in the exhibit hall. There will be a team of 2+ on each shift and there will be 4 total shifts at the summit.
While at the summit working the booth, you will receive a complimentary exhibit hall pass that will grant you access to the exhibit hall and workshops during your shift. As well as a promo code for a Free Summit Pass that will be valid for the entire summit and will grant you access to the summit hall/mainstage area.
This is an over $200 value, yours for free all because you are a proud supporter of Laurel!
The shifts are listed below and we are looking forward to having you with us at the Team Imer Booth at the summit! If you have any questions please contact Hunter Orner at horner@laurelimerforcongress.com or Weston Imer at wimer@laurelimerforcongress.com.
Let's Saddle up and ride!
Day 1 Shifts: Shift 1- 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM Shift 2- 2:30 PM to 9:30 PM
Day 2 Shifts: Shift 1- 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM Shift 2- 2:00 PM to 8:00 PM

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Make no mistake:This race won't be easy
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)
---
Peter, if you turn on the news, there's a good chance you'll hear my name. Typically, it's alongside a dishonest legacy media headline misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or implying FREEDOM is the latest and greatest threat to America. It is an insulting and absurd way to distort the truth and mislead you, the American public. Their attempts at intimidation won't work on me though. I am not backing down. Not even a little bit. I welcome the "insults" and the hard work to refute them because I know the importance of strong leadership in a time like this. That is why I'm running for re-election, and I hope you'll **_[pledge your support for my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_** If you're still hesitant about getting involved, I'd like to remind you what we're up against. It is evident how far to the left the media has gone by looking at how they define "radical."
* Allowing grown men and women to assess personal risk and decide to wear a mask or not: **RADICAL**.
* Allowing CHILDREN under 9 years old to make life-altering, sometimes irreversible, decisions about their "gender identity": **__JUST FINE!__**
* Encouraging an educational environment focused on learning and preparing students for the real world: **RADICAL**.
* Encouraging students to hate themselves, their peers, and our country: **__JUST FINE!__**

The stakes could not be higher.

These out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational thought that they will call me radical for standing with everyday people on the side of common sense and sanity. If that makes me a radical, so be it.

I will always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going to change that.
_**[>> SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r ">>SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW
>>")**_
From my time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children.__
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)
---
I have three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies could have on their lives. We have open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime. We're experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion. We have kids, who are just trying to get an education, being injected by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip on reality. I will never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. _**[JOIN RON DESANTIS NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)**_ As a federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual harassment. Our law enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor, I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our communities and our families safe. I took immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our nation and focused on empowering small businesses with common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and fuel our Florida economy. _**Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that's not something liberal governors can say today.**_ I'm also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It's simple: **we're not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed.** And we're not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation **for greatness** by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is "RADICAL," then Peter, I think you and I have something in common: we're both _**RADICAL**_. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? **_[YES, I WILL: $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502941:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502942:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_**
** _[YES, I WILL: $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502943:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $35](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502944:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_** Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they're afraid of the opposition. And they're VERY afraid of me. They've already proven they'll try anything to keep me out of the Governor's mansion.
Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida's election laws are free and fair. **We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."** I have no doubt they'll try harder to make sure we don't outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That's why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we're prepared to win whatever battles we face next.
**_[URGENT DONATION: $35](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502944:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_** Peter, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. _But I also know that this is just the beginning._ That's why I am asking you for your help now. It's time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this "radical" freedom we're fighting for continues for another four years.
In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. _Are you with me?_ **Please donate to my campaign today using this secure _[link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502940:6URhSZoNE:m:1:3253819041:C6AB3BADEF820602102637036946EA6C:r)_.** I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Peter. Thank you for your time.
Sincerely,

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Biden just CANCELED oil drilling in Alaska
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
This is insane | The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska...
**[BREAKING NEWS: BIDEN CANCELS OIL DRILLING IN ALASKA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**

Patriot,

This is _outrageous._

The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska. **This decision will be disastrous for everyday Americans.** At a time when gas prices are skyrocketing, we should be drilling MORE, not LESS.

Make no mistake. _**Joe Biden wants YOU to pay more for gas**_ while promoting his insane green energy policies. The number one thing we can do to decrease gas prices is increase drilling in America, but Biden REFUSES to do it.

We need to send a message to Biden and the rest of the radical Left in Washington that we are FED UP with their ridiculous green agenda. I'm asking you to sign my campaign's official petition to tell Biden to reverse the decision to stop drilling in Alaska.

_**[Add your name to the list in the NEXT HOUR to stand with me and tell Biden to DRILL MORE in Alaska.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**_

**[TELL BIDEN TO"DRILL, BABY, DRILL"](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Patriot
DEADLINE: ****ONE HOUR**

**[SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**

The price at the pump is getting out of control, and we all know whose fault it is, Patriot. **It's time to hold Joe Biden accountable.**

My team is sending this petition to Washington soon. I need YOU to add your name in the next hour to make sure that Biden and the Democrats know that it's time to DRILL in America.

**[Sign the petition in the NEXT HOUR to tell the radical Left you want MORE DRILLING in Alaska.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)
Sarah Palin
Candidate for Congress for Alaska

**[SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503609:61jB4ZoNP:m:1:3299561967:E44D1093C1ECE1388DA10FD46A4C2D48:r)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z694hmpca4o8221v4ubke6vetfkriggli0qav188_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe6sb361pbepdnclgm2spimepm1orlmuobct5mm9i3athgcapn2sdk6ipm2t3gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjbc77m9q6cd30mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clgm8or1c1h66oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z99p2c8ujf5suvq5lesn9mcniukc5fiuobn64ag0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cdh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmcuhfpn94r2e9la2n52uqba29e5q1a0khc56ng_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cdh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0r9qvim7n9dhb8b40radmhaceliutov6tn36ga8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cdh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Mo Brooks
subject: yes, the election was stolen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
When I sat down for an interview with Fox News’ Sandra Smith, she made that statement and I quickly shut her down.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl610e1433aaf9rsacj244nnknpg9som9urgr4bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj5etjb7cpkelo60sbmccojedblcdq34o3gm3geep336pgn2dr26dpm6d1hesoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplm3jr4t366hgb6phnm2qmash5u)
| | | Fellow patriot, The media continually says there was no fraud in the 2020 election. __That’s blatantly false.__ You know it. I know it.
They know... _and yet they keep running with that narrative!_
---
[**FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb9t2hnj43alag1ra3tr4e1lmeee4usho3umffh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
**When I sat down for an interview with Fox News’ Sandra Smith, she made that statement and I** _**_quickly_**_**shut her down.**
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuor278eitk6lgitad379qjgthmkkfql16n25uqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE EXCHANGE >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlfgir13hqoq96gttuv8ru7vlp874kgk94tjsdf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
There were 150 congressmen and senators who _absolutely_ disagreed with the media’s claim that no fraud occurred in 2020. We looked at what took place and said voter fraud was an issue and a major problem. But when the media dismisses these claims, what are they saying? _Are they calling us liars?_
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbud7j5u91tqb37tepg21b5an27u2dq3oftp5o0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
We weren’t the only ones to say our election system is riddled with weaknesses. Back in 2005, the Commission on Election Reform, a bipartisan committee founded by Jimmy Carter, found systemic flaws in our election system. In fact, Jimmy Carter – along with President Reagan’s Chief of Staff, James Baker – warned us elections are going to be stolen if we don’t fix these problems. _And guess what?_ _**Those problems were never addressed.**_
---
[**FIX OUR ELECTIONS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfr61b6jskvc8s9masf8o1c36v04m08aaip02ml0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
The only way to ensure our elections are honest and fair is to address the problems we saw in 2020. That’s why I’m reaching out to you.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1qp0tc1t4074m6jiudes3jm0hjitqmf7f22fi5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks –– I currently represent Alabama’s 5th Congressional District, and I’m running for U.S. Senate. I have a record of fighting for conservative principles, including the need for election integrity.** Fellow patriot, when President Trump needed members of Congress to stand up because the 2020 election was rigged and unfair to Americans across the country, I led the fight.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zluachgqapqmqhsm8mhtf2e6ksl8m16mq3b25us8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
It was because of my voice, my principles, and my convictions that roughly 150 congressmen and senators challenged the electoral votes in Arizona and Pennsylvania. **
I was the first congressman to question the illegalities of the 2020 election – and I will __never__ be silent about what took place.**
---
[**FIGHT ALONGSIDE MO BROOKS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0j8br5k8h473sho0rbk3be3b6n1n2gtt04s79v8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
Because the media continues to dismiss the stolen election, we need conservative leaders in Washington that will always fight to correct the issues that we saw in the last presidential election. _If we don’t, more elections will be stolen._ **I know I can continue this fight, this time in the Senate, if I have grassroots conservatives like you by my side.** _**[Can I count on your support?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfkcn2od7ag36alhbm5777engc149a4h8u3s8la0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)**_
---
[**DONATE $150 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze83tn23tddf2cnbjqbb6pul3pj5qqu14egcdie0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm2gm3oc3jg8dls0f4pdt8u801rsahaccgf4aedo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuup4beudqfjrqsb73vk0106i5rpbh4g7semkkm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z83n0p46a7d5760aarrhv2cimcsss47o6lnr47cg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $25 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0svg5b32pvhnctmv1s6bmue548k0125qvudlclo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0etv0fdqliug10nrksbi6qsr39ngtklopqs79e0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
Thank you for helping me make sure our elections are free, honest, and fair. For freedom,
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkk45sbhi1tjakc0dgnqfuuhd6lno3fn8r7r2ic0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhm2o32cph2bs)
---
Mo Brooks

name: Ronda Kennedy
subject: Something stinks. It smells like Schiff
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503747:JehQOZotN:m:1:3253819041:F52295602ADA75C4B2CA7BADB103CFF7:r)

Peter,

Democrats like Adam Schiff are afraid, and they should be.

They know they WILL lose power in the 2022 elections.

But Adam Schiff still thinks he's in a safe seat, protected by Democrat voters.

**_Schiff is wrong, _**_**Peter**_.

I'm going to defeat Schiff. I am the Republican up against Adam Schiff and I am emailing you with an urgent request.

[_**Can you donate $5, $10, $20.22, or any amount you can spare to take out the trash - Adam Schiff?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503747:JehQOZotN:m:1:3253819041:F52295602ADA75C4B2CA7BADB103CFF7:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503747:JehQOZotN:m:1:3253819041:F52295602ADA75C4B2CA7BADB103CFF7:r)

I am an America First conservative who is fed up with defunct Democrats like Schiff. I'm fed up with his failed policies that hold back our communities.

I am tired of reading the news and seeing America failing. We can keep stock of baby formula, gas prices are high, children can't get a decent education, and our foreign policy is an embarrassment.

If he gets re-elected, Adam Schiff will continue to abuse his power and attack conservative voices instead of solving the crisis our country faces.

**Democrats have utterly destroyed our country these last two years.**

Peter, it's time to take back Congress. This year is critical.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503747:JehQOZotN:m:1:3253819041:F52295602ADA75C4B2CA7BADB103CFF7:r)

I am an America-first patriot with a proven record of fighting for our rights.

I stopped California from shutting down gun stores during the pandemic with my lawsuit.

Now I'll defeat Adam Schiff.

It won't be easy, Peter. I need a national coalition of conservative, America-first patriots to help me clean up the mess left by a big pile of Schiff.

Will you stand with me and show the Democrats that American Patriots are still fighting? Click any button to donate.

[_**Donate $20.22 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503748:JehQOZotN:m:1:3253819041:F52295602ADA75C4B2CA7BADB103CFF7:r)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I'm taking a stand
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7uie1locdj3dgmnbs5vs1bchn78uptonj7hposo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhmao72c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tlimdpb6s7361j7ct3hmdqr7cjkmiq76dlim1g7ec5k6erb1ddmm4rr8p1lmeo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplm3jr4tb66pgb6ob7m2qmash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztaui4fooghaluvc7niplhjfv6er8ruq77vfder8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhmao72c9h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zojjclc6p7dhdi3dgkrgor6m3k0u2uein4bb00go_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhmao72c9h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6cpb7buhahcu56d40kiioj9ruqvlt9l135nk068_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chhmao72c9h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Sign this petition to Elon Musk
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTUzLWQ2Yzg4MjY1N2VhMjRmMzM4OWJmNGE0M2Q3MmEyNjgxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvcHI5enNmemhvbD9zcmM9RkZPMjgyNTEifQ/fSaL8_6GZtJIZ2rrC3ykoA)
---
|
---
Fellow free speech lover, A few days ago, Twitter's board announced that they had reached a deal to sell the company to Elon Musk, the electric car-making, rocket-launching, tunnel-drilling, flamethrower-wielding, richest man on Earth. That's great news for free speech—and great news for us here at the Babylon Bee. You see, my team has been locked out of our Twitter account for several weeks now because we dared to state the shocking truth that a man is a man. You may have read about it in the news, or seen me talking about it with Tucker Carlson on Fox News. Right now, Twitter is holding our account hostage and demanding that we delete our "offensive" tweet in order to regain access. But I promise you - that's not going to happen. Instead, we're standing our ground. We're standing for the truth. And with Elon Musk now taking over the company, it looks like our window of opportunity may be opening. [**Will you take a moment right now to stand with the Babylon Bee for free speech by signing this petition to Elon Musk and urging him to reinstate our account?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTUzLWQ2Yzg4MjY1N2VhMjRmMzM4OWJmNGE0M2Q3MmEyNjgxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvcHI5enNmemhvbD9zcmM9RkZPMjgyNTEifQ/UFkE-CMjHhlsWc40JBGr4A)
---

| [ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTUzLWQ2Yzg4MjY1N2VhMjRmMzM4OWJmNGE0M2Q3MmEyNjgxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvcHI5enNmemhvbD9zcmM9RkZPMjgyNTEifQ/U2Syi1tOzU2phxDe2Ia2HA) We posted this tweet a few weeks back, naming Dr. Rachel Levine, a transgender member of the Biden administration, our "Man of the Year." ---
And all of this backlash comes because we dared to state the truth: That Rachel Levine, a biological male, is not a woman. [**We will NEVER surrender to Twitter's woke agenda. And with Elon Musk acquiring the company, it looks like we may finally get the reprieve we've been looking for. Will you stand with us by signing the petition right now?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTUzLWQ2Yzg4MjY1N2VhMjRmMzM4OWJmNGE0M2Q3MmEyNjgxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvcHI5enNmemhvbD9zcmM9RkZPMjgyNTEifQ/8dgUVA6WNBkOStT2rZ_uAw) Here's the good news - Elon Musk is a fan of the Bee. He has a lot to think about as he takes over a huge company like Twitter. If we're going to stand any chance of getting his attention, we need to assemble _MILLIONS_ of concerned Americans, all urging him to stand up for free speech online by reinstating the Bee on Twitter. Please help us show Twitter and Elon Musk that the Babylon Bee isn't standing alone. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Typical insults
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs-mSL8hDN

These out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational
thought that they will call me radical for standing with everyday
people on the side o
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os-mSL8hDN

Friend,
if you turn on the news, there's a good chance you'll hear my
name.

Typically, it's alongside a dishonest legacy media headline
misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or
implying FREEDOM is the latest and greatest threat to America.

It is an
insulting and absurd way to distort the truth and mislead you,
the American public.

Their
attempts at intimidation won't work on me though. I am not
backing down. Not even a little bit.

I welcome
the "insults" and the hard work to refute them because I know the
importance of strong leadership in a time like this. That is why
I'm running for re-election, and I hope you'll pledge your
support for my campaign.

If you're
still hesitant about getting involved, I'd like to remind you
what we're up against. It is evident how far to the left the
media has gone by looking at how they define "radical."

Allowing grown men and women to assess personal risk and decide
to wear a mask or not: RADICAL.

Allowing CHILDREN under 9 years old to make life-altering,
sometimes irreversible, decisions about their "gender identity":
JUST FINE!

Encouraging an educational environment focused on learning and
preparing students for the real world: RADICAL.

Encouraging students to hate themselves, their peers, and our
country: JUST FINE!

The
stakes could not be higher.

These
out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational thought
that they will call me radical for standing with everyday people
on the side of common sense and sanity. If that makes me a
radical, so be it.

I will
always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the
ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on
earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going
to change that.

>>
SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>

From my
time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been
committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future
for our children.

I have
three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that
progressive policies could have on their lives.

We have
open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential
criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our
country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police
forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime.

We're
experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with
higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the
Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion.

We have
kids - who are just trying to get an education - being injected
by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke
politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip
on reality.

I will
never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. JOIN RON
DESANTIS NOW!

As a
federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child
predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida
streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills
that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of
Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual
harassment.

Our law
enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should
work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor,
I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the
Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our
communities and our families safe.

I took
immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our
nation and focused on empowering small businesses with
common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and
fuel our Florida economy. Florida is in a better place now than
it was before the pandemic - and that's not something liberal
governors can say today.

I'm also
leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous,
WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an
indoctrination camp.

It's
simple: we're not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist
or they are oppressed. And we're not going to force-feed our
children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly
inappropriate for their age.

We will
prepare the next generation for greatness by teaching real
history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological
goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate
America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to
succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do.

If all
this is "RADICAL," then Friend, I think you and I have something
in common: we're both RADICAL. I could use your help continuing
what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become
an official supporter of my campaign?

YES, I
WILL: $100
YES, I
WILL: $75
YES, I
WILL: $50
YES, I
WILL: $35

Make no
mistake: this race won't be easy.

We know
liberals will do anything to win when they're afraid of the
opposition. And they're VERY afraid of me.

They've
already proven they'll try anything to keep me out of the
Governor's mansion.

Since I
became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida's
election laws are free and fair. We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by
banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and
prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."

I have no
doubt they'll try harder to make sure we don't outsmart and
outfight them in 2022. That's why I need the support of patriots
like you, to make sure we're prepared to win whatever battles we
face next.

URGENT
DONATION: $35

Friend,
I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time.
I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes.

But I
also know that this is just the beginning.

That's
why I am asking you for your help now. It's time for patriots
like you and me to come together and ensure this "radical"
freedom we're fighting for continues for another four years.

In an
election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch.
We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy
everything we've worked so hard for.

Are you
with me?

Please
donate to my campaign today using this secure link.

I
appreciate you reading my whole letter, Friend. Thank you for
your time.

Sincerely,

Ron
DeSantis

DONATE
NOW

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

And they're VERY afraid of me. They've already proven they'll try anything to keep me out of the Governor's mansion. Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida's election laws are free and fair. We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks." I have no doubt they'll try harder to make sure we don't outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That's why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we're prepared to win whatever battles we face next. URGENT DONATION: $35 Friend, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. But I also know that this is just the beginning. That's why I am asking you for your help now. It's time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this "radical" freedom we're fighting for continues for another four years. In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. Are you with me? Please donate to my campaign today using this secure link. I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Friend. Thank you for your time. | Peter, I’ve known my husband John King for a long time (we just celebrated our 21st wedding anniversary!). I know he can win this election and deliver on the promise of progress for countless Marylanders. And I know he’s counting on your support to help him do it. In just a few days, our campaign faces our biggest public fundraising deadline to-date. So I wanted to share three reasons to donate right now:
1. John’s polling shows that our biggest hurdle is his name recognition. When people get to know him and hear his powerful personal story and vision to build a more equitable Maryland, he takes the lead and honestly will win this race. No doubt in my mind.
2. John’s currently being outspent by a few candidates with corporate connections but we are not seeing that change the shape of this race. Guess what? Barack Obama was outspent in his race too. People told him constantly he had no chance against establishment candidates like Hillary Clinton. Well, he won – and then he asked John to serve in his Cabinet. And I know John will win this race if we remain focused and dig deep.
3. If John wins, he will make history as Maryland’s first Black governor and our nation’s first Afro-Latino governor. Electing people of color in leadership roles is more critical than ever and demonstrates to young people that they too can achieve whatever they set their mind to.

**I’m new to campaigns, but I can tell you firsthand this campaign runs on grassroots support from folks like you.** John and I are so grateful for the immense showing of support we’ve seen from Marylanders in every corner of the state. But before this deadline hits, we need another 150 donors to step up before midnight to help us have the show of strength we need for the final 5 days before our deadline.

subject: Grassley named gun lobby's "Legislator of the Year"

Hello,
The firearm industry trade association – the literal gun lobby – just honored my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley with an award: Legislator of the Year.
“Senator Grassley is an unyielding champion of the firearm and ammunition industry on Capitol Hill,” they said.
Last year in the Senate, Chuck Grassley single-handedly _blocked_ the most common-sense of gun bills: Universal background checks. Why? Because the NRA and the gun lobby have given him nearly $300,000 to get reelected.
President Biden asked last week, “When in God's name are we going to stand up to the gun lobby?"
Well, I have my own question for Grassley: "How many gunshot victims will it take for you to vote for responsible firearm ownership legislation?" Iowa parents, students, and voters are waiting for a number...
I’ll never take money from the gun lobby. We have a gun violence epidemic in this country, and the only way we’re going to pass logical gun measures is if we elect more sensible Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA.
**I’m ready for the fight, but I need grassroots donors like you behind me if I’m going to be able to take on all the NRA’s blood money and win.**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate so we can finally pass gun reform?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46016456/348487404/-42398318?refcode=em20220602am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2M2MzI4OC02YmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxZGY6ueeSUqs2sSGyRwxJ-ds6SzUEZo_WhT_7GtX1w=)

clean_body: Hello, The firearm industry trade association – the literal gun lobby – just honored my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley with an award: Legislator of the Year. “Senator Grassley is an unyielding champion of the firearm and ammunition industry on Capitol Hill,” they said. Last year in the Senate, Chuck Grassley single-handedly blocked the most common-sense of gun bills: Universal background checks. Why? Because the NRA and the gun lobby have given him nearly $300,000 to get reelected. President Biden asked last week, “When in God's name are we going to stand up to the gun lobby?" Well, I have my own question for Grassley: "How many gunshot victims will it take for you to vote for responsible firearm ownership legislation?" Iowa parents, students, and voters are waiting for a number... I’ll never take money from the gun lobby. We have a gun violence epidemic in this country, and the only way we’re going to pass logical gun measures is if we elect more sensible Democrats willing to stand up to the NRA. I’m ready for the fight, but I need grassroots donors like you behind me if I’m going to be able to take on all the NRA’s blood money and win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Enough talk. It’s time for action. I’m so grateful for your support, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Peter, Many politicians talk, but their record is what really matters. Jen Kiggans has gone to great lengths to protect our children. As State Senator, she has voted and introduced legislation to ensure our children are safe in school. Jen has:
* **voted twice as a State Senator to protect our children from transgender policies being allowed in our K-12 grade levels** (SB 161/HB 145)

* **voted against legislation that eliminates the requirement for school principals to report crimes in schools to law enforcement** (SB 729)

* **proudly patroned a bill during the 2022 session to ban transgender men from competing in women's sports in grades K-12** (SB 766)

---
| [ **Protect Our Children & Stand With Jen** ](https://join.jenforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWrl_l7NtDlrW8B9KLY14H5HdW6rg8CD4KQCNrN7WbryG3q3nJV1-WJV7CgKfVW2w0VkM195BpPW8x3d5R4vrYj2W7MYhz822k7Y7W2-srD33PC71mW5dK8T85NFVgfW6lr--c524yRPW493gdh4WpsqDW3nzLGJ4cq_6BVrcXTm69XckmW8gbV1n3Gj-NwW5X5Drz8l0-D_V95-y-93pg_YW6QmFh76NxvJBW6jW_Qh8TcvBwW4K_RlX7pKs4nW7Vw_7r7b6j5sW2qlpBZ3_PQM2W9k9pjS2Xh1Q6N9f2L2KGL53KW3hCR_x4sWQfbW1VCvGp8rjlsyW3PnPQg3wx8Z3W79P79J8yGbC2W97BFgy5n4FvN3ckt1)

She believes there is no place for these policies in our schools. She stands by the fact that men shouldn’t play women’s sports and boys belong in a boy’s bathroom, and girls belong in a girl’s bathroom. As your Congresswoman, Jen will always vote to protect religious freedom, protect our children from transgender policies, and provide equal opportunities to every Virginian.
---
