name: Mo Brooks
subject: shutting down the media’s LIES about the stolen election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
| | | Peter, The media continually says there was no fraud in the 2020 election. __That 's blatantly false.__ You know it. I know it.
They know... _and yet they keep running with that narrative!_
---
[**FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
**When I sat down for an interview with Fox News ' Sandra Smith, she made that statement and I **_**_quickly_**_**shut her down.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**WATCH THE EXCHANGE >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
There were 150 congressmen and senators who _absolutely_ disagreed with the media's claim that no fraud occurred in 2020. We looked at what took place and said voter fraud was an issue and a major problem. But when the media dismisses these claims, what are they saying? _Are they calling us liars?_
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
We weren't the only ones to say our election system is riddled with weaknesses. Back in 2005, the Commission on Election Reform, a bipartisan committee founded by Jimmy Carter, found systemic flaws in our election system. In fact, Jimmy Carter - along with President Reagan's Chief of Staff, James Baker - warned us elections are going to be stolen if we don't fix these problems. _And guess what?_ _**Those problems were never addressed.**_
---
[**FIX OUR ELECTIONS >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
The only way to ensure our elections are honest and fair is to address the problems we saw in 2020. That's why I'm reaching out to you.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks -- I currently represent Alabama's 5th Congressional District, and I'm running for U.S. Senate. I have a record of fighting for conservative principles, including the need for election integrity.** Peter, when President Trump needed members of Congress to stand up because the 2020 election was rigged and unfair to Americans across the country, I led the fight.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
It was because of my voice, my principles, and my convictions that roughly 150 congressmen and senators challenged the electoral votes in Arizona and Pennsylvania. **
I was the first congressman to question the illegalities of the 2020 election - and I will __never__ be silent about what took place.**
---
[**FIGHT ALONGSIDE MO BROOKS >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
Because the media continues to dismiss the stolen election, we need conservative leaders in Washington that will always fight to correct the issues that we saw in the last presidential election. _If we don 't, more elections will be stolen._ **I know I can continue this fight, this time in the Senate, if I have grassroots conservatives like you by my side.** _**[Can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)**_
---
[**DONATE $150 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504930:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504931:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504932:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504933:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**DONATE $25 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504934:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60504929:6nbUgZoNr:m:1:3317145305:8C66219BDB81CD08E89E0738FCDF2995:r)
---
Thank you for helping me make sure our elections are free, honest, and fair. For freedom,
---

name: T.W. Shannon
subject: WARNING: Free-thinking black Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by T.W
body:
| | | Peter, We're hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. _But let me tell you what our nation needs to hear right now._ **America 's young men and women need hope -- and better role models. But the Woke Left can't stop corrupting our children with perverted ideas like:**
* You can change your gender to whatever you feel like it.
* Killing an unborn child is "healthcare."
* America is an irredeemable "racist" country.

---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503758:JXB1j9oN5:m:1:3253819041:72387A13F577E42F9FF2BFF09F7E378E:r)
---
| | **My name is T.W. Shannon. I 'm a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. ** I've spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503759:JXB1j9oN5:m:1:3253819041:72387A13F577E42F9FF2BFF09F7E378E:r)
---
[**SUPPORT T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503759:JXB1j9oN5:m:1:3253819041:72387A13F577E42F9FF2BFF09F7E378E:r)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma's fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students' skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients - which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60503759:JXB1j9oN5:m:1:3253819041:72387A13F577E42F9FF2BFF09F7E378E:r)
---
Even though I've been successful in the legislative arena, I've also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets - an accomplishment I'm extremely proud of.

_This petition must be delivered on 06/02/2022 so please add your signature immediately._
The House Judiciary Committee is meeting TODAY to discuss a new commonsense gun reform bill that could go to the House for a vote as early as next week!

The legislation under consideration by House Democrats would:
* Raise the age for purchasing a semiautomatic rifle from 18 to 21 years old
* Make it illegal to import, sell, manufacture, transfer or possess a large-capacity magazine, with some exceptions
* Establish requirements regulating the storage of firearms on residential facilities
* Build on the current ban on bump stocks, attachments to guns that make rapid-fire easier. Existing bump stocks would have to be registered, and sale and possession by civilians of bump stocks would be banned.
* Current federal firearms regulations would apply to so-called "ghost guns."

The majority of Americans support commonsense gun reform. And that's why we want to send this petition to the House, to make sure they know we're standing with them, and want this legislation to pass!

## Peter,

## Meet Nancy Pelosi: America's #1 threat to our Second Amendment
---
---
Nancy Pelosi and her radical puppets in Congress are holding a hearing today. starting at 10 AM ET, in the House Judiciary Committee to consider a number of proposals that will directly infringe on law-abiding Americans' Second Amendment rights... The radical gun-grabbing Democrats are doing everything to capitalize on the horrific tragedy at Robb Elementary, and they are using the current mental health crisis as a window of opportunity to disarm the American people. Here are just a few of the proposals that will be considered during today's hearing:
* Codifying Biden's Executive Orders on gun control into law
* Banning the sales, transfers, and imports of AR-15s and any firearm capable of holding more than 10 rounds
* Raising the legal age to purchase a semi-auto rifle from 18 to 24

To make matters even worse, Nancy Pelosi scheduled a vote on federal Red Flag Gun Confiscation next week. The radical Democrats are determined to abolish the Second Amendment in the name of the "greater good." [We need to fight like hell to protect our right to bear arms. Click here to make an URGENT donation of $20.22 or more to the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race who has a record of standing up for our Second Amendment rights >>>](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/MVTtXblSF33W3vKT823fSw5mW74N_GZ4KQHsMN7PgQ1Q3lLBmV1-WJV7CgVVbW7gQZT21WzrYgW39Hb8D4HD1W-W70c4hN2--KT6N1XxcTjplqTHN4gvLmKrT9JJN7XffHlvDv-_W57Ldr134y6bcW9dn--_3pSqNvW5PmxM21cWBP2W1FQ9x83phjSGVvPxdj6MTw62W6l0GnQ1jyTpYW8x_YK83vTyfyW5w-CDz4TCP3bW1rnqZw24GZc6W3Ljp9M8nLZqlW7gLVSw8KQT1zW88wDz32HFrzpW67000l7brF85W92wPF643y22FW1Pckv18yyXtkN94YNnkRSjkb36w31)

We need Proven Conservative Fighters who can drown out the noise from the mainstream news media and take meaningful action that will stop the attacks on our children. My record in Concord speaks for itself. I have always stood by our Second Amendment rights and I have always voted to do what's best for New Hampshire's children. With your support, we can put an end to these mindless massacres by lifting the bans on firearms in schools and properly training America's teachers to protect our children. Peter,

Florida's gubernatorial election is 159 days away. With the Biden administration continuing to whittle away at our freedoms day after day, it can feel excruciating to have to wait so long to make our voices heard.

We cannot allow the Biden administration's failed policies to be imported into Florida. Below are two actionable steps you can take right now to stand with Governor DeSantis and show your support for his freedom first agenda:

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, Florida's gubernatorial election is 159 days away. With the Biden administration continuing to whittle away at our freedoms day after day, it can feel excruciating to have to wait so long to make our voices heard. We cannot allow the Biden administration's failed policies to be imported into Florida. Below are two actionable steps you can take right now to stand with Governor DeSantis and show your support for his freedom first agenda: 1. Donate. Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters who are committed to keeping Florida the freest state in the nation under the leadership of Governor DeSantis. >"> Donate now to send a message that Floridians reject the lunatic policies coming out of Washington, D.C. and stand for freedom. >>> 2. Opt-In for Updates. Text FREEDOM to 512345and join our list of supporters who are the first to know of big announcements from the Governor and get exclusive updates on merchandise and upcoming events. We know you're busy, so we won't bombard your phone — these are updates you won't want to miss!The countdown to Election Day is on and we cannot wait to cast our votes to re-elect Governor DeSantis. We hope we can count on your support on November 8th. We're proud to be in this fight with you. For freedom, Team DeSantis ACT NOW Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor. By providing your mobile phone number, and/or texting to 512345, you are giving your express written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Ron DeSantis for Governor. Msg frequency varies. Msg & data rates may apply. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. Text HELP for support or e-mail mailto:info@rondesantis.com info@rondesantis.com . SMS Terms & Conditions |

It makes sense. Their party is opposed to everything we stand for: protecting our fundamental reproductive rights, holding the powerful and corrupt accountable, and refusing to be intimidated by some of the most well-funded interest groups and corporations in the nation.
**Peter, the New York Republicans’ nominee for attorney general is determined to defeat me at any cost. That’s why I need to raise at least $10,000 before MIDNIGHT tomorrow to ensure that my campaign has the resources needed to win this critical election. When I was elected attorney general, I vowed to never bow or break in my fight for justice. And that’s exactly what I've done. Now that I’m up for re-election, Republicans are nervous.

But my opponent isn’t the only thing I need to worry about this election cycle: The Republican Attorneys General Association – a group that raised nearly $6 MILLION last quarter – has declared itself officially “on offense” in New York.

Peter, RAGA is determined to put as much money as possible behind Republican candidates who will further its extreme, anti-progressive agenda – and with reproductive rights hanging in the balance, we cannot afford to let RAGA flip New York red. **I vow to fight tirelessly to keep New York on the path of progress and justice, but I can’t continue my work without your help.**

2\. The governor will notch the “big Florida win” he wants so badly.

3\. He’ll continue attacking our freedoms, including a woman’s right to choose, even as the U.S. Supreme Court overturns _Roe v. Wade_.

4\. He’ll _eliminate_ background checks and gun permits across Florida, putting our children and our families in greater danger.

5\. And when 2024 rolls around, DeSantis will use Florida as a springboard to run for president.

Charlie

name: James Carville
subject: bad news (Tim Ryan)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
This guy J.D. Vance really sucks, friend.
Vance is a corporate lackey who might talk a big game about cracking down on Big Tech, but he’s backed by the worst of the worst Silicon Valley hacks, like Peter Thiel.

body:
This is insane | The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska...
**[BREAKING NEWS: BIDEN CANCELS OIL DRILLING IN ALASKA](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)**

Peter,

This is _outrageous._

The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska. **This decision will be disastrous for everyday Americans.** At a time when gas prices are skyrocketing, we should be drilling MORE, not LESS.

Make no mistake. _**Joe Biden wants YOU to pay more for gas**_ while promoting his insane green energy policies. The number one thing we can do to decrease gas prices is increase drilling in America, but Biden REFUSES to do it.

We need to send a message to Biden and the rest of the radical Left in Washington that we are FED UP with their ridiculous green agenda. I'm asking you to sign my campaign's official petition to tell Biden to reverse the decision to stop drilling in Alaska.

_**[Add your name to the list in the NEXT HOUR to stand with me and tell Biden to DRILL MORE in Alaska.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)**_

**[TELL BIDEN TO"DRILL, BABY, DRILL"](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DEADLINE: ****ONE HOUR**

**[SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)**

The price at the pump is getting out of control, and we all know whose fault it is, Peter. **It's time to hold Joe Biden accountable.**

My team is sending this petition to Washington soon. I need YOU to add your name in the next hour to make sure that Biden and the Democrats know that it's time to DRILL in America.

**[Sign the petition in the NEXT HOUR to tell the radical Left you want MORE DRILLING in Alaska.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506394:Jd7ds9oNi:m:1:3317145305:01E325EAD25F35C464C4CA7363D63BDE:r)

name: Team Nikki
subject: Celebrate Pride by taking action
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
FIRST: DeSantis signed a hateful transgender sports ban, vetoed mental health funding for survivors of the Pulse shooting, and vetoed funding to house homeless LGTBQ+ youth.
THEN: DeSantis signed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, forbidding discussions of gender identity and sexual orientation in our schools, and alienating LGBTQ+ students.
NOW: Marriage equality is on the line, and DeSantis is determined to continue his attacks against Florida’s LGBTQ+ community.
Pride Month is a time for celebration, but it’s also a time to recommit ourselves to the fight for full equality. And in Florida, we can only win that fight if we defeat Ron DeSantis.
We need to stand behind a candidate who has ALWAYS stood with the LGBTQ+ community and ALWAYS fought for equality. Will you chip in $20 to support Nikki Fried and help us end DeSantis’ authoritarian, anti-LGBTQ+ agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=602pride]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Rochelle Garza
subject: Adelante!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
Change is possible.
| Friend, _Our campaign made history._ **For the first time ever, Texas Democratic voters nominated a Latina to serve as our Attorney General.** I’m so proud to have secured this nomination. It’s a huge step. But the real fight begins now. Our hearts are still broken from the tragedy in Uvalde. But broken hearts and thoughts and prayers aren’t enough — it’s time for change — and through the pain, we will act. Decades of inaction from Republicans in office have done _nothing_ to protect our families. clean_body: Change is possible. | Friend, Our campaign made history. For the first time ever, Texas Democratic voters nominated a Latina to serve as our Attorney General. I’m so proud to have secured this nomination. It’s a huge step. But the real fight begins now. Our hearts are still broken from the tragedy in Uvalde. But broken hearts and thoughts and prayers aren’t enough — it’s time for change — and through the pain, we will act. Decades of inaction from Republicans in office have done nothing to protect our families. Ken Paxton and Republicans like him are far more concerned with holding onto their own power than with keeping Texans safe. As your Democratic nominee for Attorney General, I commit to doing everything it takes to defeat Ken Paxton and create the change Texas needs. But I can’t do it alone. = = Friend, my whole life has been leading up to this fight. I’m a fifth-generation Texan born and raised in the Rio Grande Valley. My parents met as public school teachers. Eventually, my dad was elected to serve South Texas as a state district judge. They taught me that serving your community is a privilege. That’s why I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney , working for children, immigrants, and families. When Donald Trump’s cruel border policies tore parents and kids apart, I fought to keep them together. When an immigrant teen, Jane Doe, was denied an abortion by the Trump administration, I took on Brett Kavanaugh in the only abortion case he heard as a federal judge — and we won. Now, the “Garza Notice” informs immigrant teens of their right to access abortion free of obstruction and retaliation. I’m also a new mom of a baby girl who I want to raise in a state that actually respects her rights. I firmly believe that abortion care is health care and that health care is a human right. I want my daughter, and every child in Texas, to grow up knowing that they can control their own reproductive futures. I’m taking on Ken Paxton to secure reproductive rights and voting rights, protect our families from the threat of gun violence, and more for ALL Texans. I’ll also hold the rich and powerful (including politicians) accountable to the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = = = = ¡La lucha sigue! Rochelle Garza Democratic Nominee for Attorney General of Texas = Rochelle Garza is running for Attorney General because it’s time for the people’s lawyer to actually serve the people — not a dangerous, ultra-partisan agenda. Rochelle will fight to restore rights that Texans have had stripped away — voting rights, the right to access safe and legal abortion — to hold the powerful accountable, and so much more. =** = = =_ Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas Rochelle Garza for Texas PO Box 5683 Brownsville, TX 78523 United States Our email program is an important way to reach our supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails, please =. name: Councilman JB Smiley, Jr. - Democratic Candidate for Governor of Tennessee
subject: Show love!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn]
Hi Friend,
Happy Pride Month!
Imagine a Tennessee that values you no matter how you identify or who you love. That is the Tennessee I am fighting for—a Tennessee that will celebrate and support the LGBTQIA+ community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn] However, Bill Lee has made it his mission to deny rights to the LGBTQIA+ community, but together we can stop him.
Chip in today so we can send a clear message that we are stronger together.
Donate $50.00 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn?am=50&tknfa=uUvAabC5gR2TCCMd2bGhh20C8pPRal5htKn7EIPg7mQ%3D&contactdata=MYG1ck4UcEMkRTKK1oCmLnuilnirra%2By%2BuMk5eDC8RQ1ivrJmg21JM%2Fl8WXif1wfulMNOSVr0dpiRdT8h9xoDXErOMxnszrtveByGUsIE94%3D]
Donate $100.00 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn?am=100&tknfa=uUvAabC5gR2TCCMd2bGhh20C8pPRal5htKn7EIPg7mQ%3D&contactdata=MYG1ck4UcEMkRTKK1oCmLnuilnirra%2By%2BuMk5eDC8RQ1ivrJmg21JM%2Fl8WXif1wfulMNOSVr0dpiRdT8h9xoDXErOMxnszrtveByGUsIE94%3D]
Donate $250.00 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn?am=250&contactdata=MYG1ck4UcEMkRTKK1oCmLnuilnirra%2By%2BuMk5eDC8RQ1ivrJmg21JM%2Fl8WXif1wfulMNOSVr0dpiRdT8h9xoDXErOMxnszrtveByGUsIE94%3D]
Donate $500.00 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn?am=500&tknfa=uUvAabC5gR2TCCMd2bGhh20C8pPRal5htKn7EIPg7mQ%3D&contactdata=MYG1ck4UcEMkRTKK1oCmLnuilnirra%2By%2BuMk5eDC8RQ1ivrJmg21JM%2Fl8WXif1wfulMNOSVr0dpiRdT8h9xoDXErOMxnszrtveByGUsIE94%3D]
Donate $1,000.00 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn?am=1000&tknfa=uUvAabC5gR2TCCMd2bGhh20C8pPRal5htKn7EIPg7mQ%3D&contactdata=MYG1ck4UcEMkRTKK1oCmLnuilnirra%2By%2BuMk5eDC8RQ1ivrJmg21JM%2Fl8WXif1wfulMNOSVr0dpiRdT8h9xoDXErOMxnszrtveByGUsIE94%3D]
Slightly over a month ago, the Human Rights Campaign condemned Bill Lee for enacting needless law to perpetuate discrimination against transgender students. [https://www.hrc.org/press-releases/human-rights-campaign-condemns-tennessee-gov-bill-lee-for-enacting-needless-law-to-perpetuate-discrimination-against-transgender-students] In 2021, Tennessee ranked near the top for anti-LGBT bills. You can read the full article here [https://wcyb.com/news/local/tennessee-ranks-near-top-for-anti-lgbt-bills-in-record-year-according-to-hrc] .
Bill Lee is hellbent on perpetuating and establishing laws attacking the LGBTQIA+ community. Tennessee needs a governor who understands diversity makes us better and willing to implement laws affirming everyone who calls Tennessee home. I am JB Smiley, Jr. and I will be your advocate.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn] Yours in service,
Councilman JB Smiley, Jr., Esq.
Democratic Candidate for Governor of Tennessee
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn]
https://www.facebook.com/votejbsmiley [https://www.facebook.com/votejbsmiley] https://twitter.com/jbsmileyjr [https://twitter.com/jbsmileyjr] https://instagram.com/jbsmileyjr [https://instagram.com/jbsmileyjr] https://www.linkedin.com/in/jbsmileyjr [https://www.linkedin.com/in/jbsmileyjr]
Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr.
Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley. Julian Bolton, Treasurer
Committee to Elect JB Smiley
901 Mississippi Blvd
Memphis, TN 38126
United States
JB believes that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs, and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less travelled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. Will you make a donation to elect JB Smiley, Jr. as Tennessee's next governor.? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn]

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Rep. Payne Jr. has failed the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter —
While Pride Month is a time for us to celebrate the LGTBQ+ community and uplift LGBTQ+ voices, it’s also a time to commit ourselves to electing leaders who will take real action.
I’ve spent my career advocating for marginalized communities, including the LGBTQ+ community — and particularly LGBTQ+ people of color.
Meanwhile, Donald Payne Jr. refused to support marriage equality in 2012 (even after President Obama and Vice President Biden announced their support), failed to lead on LGBTQ+ issues, and only bothered pretending to care about the LGBTQ+ community when our campaign started calling him on his weak leadership.
We need to elect a representative who’s willing to stand up and fight for the LGBTQ+ community — because Payne Jr. isn’t cutting it. So, with just 5 days left until the June 7th primary, will you chip in $27 to help me win this race and be the leader our LGBTQ+ community deserves? clean_body: Peter — While Pride Month is a time for us to celebrate the LGTBQ+ community and uplift LGBTQ+ voices, it’s also a time to commit ourselves to electing leaders who will take real action. I’ve spent my career advocating for marginalized communities, including the LGBTQ+ community — and particularly LGBTQ+ people of color. Meanwhile, Donald Payne Jr. refused to support marriage equality in 2012 (even after President Obama and Vice President Biden announced their support), failed to lead on LGBTQ+ issues, and only bothered pretending to care about the LGBTQ+ community when our campaign started calling him on his weak leadership. We need to elect a representative who’s willing to stand up and fight for the LGBTQ+ community — because Payne Jr. isn’t cutting it. So, with just 5 days left until the June 7th primary, will you chip in $27 to help me win this race and be the leader our LGBTQ+ community deserves? subject: LOEFFLER OP-ED: BIDEN'S PITCH TO FARMERS IS ALL HAT AND NO CATTLE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, JUNE 2
LOEFFLER OP-ED: BIDEN'S PITCH TO FARMERS IS ALL HAT AND NO CATTLE
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman and former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler penned an [op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2JekT0E9MPAEBCntVrmvzs103MCWl7A2yYHb0ltZP6H2wzjzOmoVARUZizbHZk7US2XbxsuF4xthoYZ2uGDOqBwwfV9DwEd-Ub5FsEJy3XfXCyHz-d301QJLpitZWwRMpIbDR5Ju3C_yVpSJeBB2NXc1Dc2IZbMGdE0iLsJJBLQTue7HAGOVSaNKL6axLQfcXeH&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==) for The Washington Times yesterday discussing the regulatory burdens and [anti-energy policies](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2JeQcBl5ywZ374QJV0xa_fiUL0N06LrJRo-g5Xl-pW4InvUZjo-Gdatwg2jhVpVsdZYjZKyPJSwzYIvP6_eAA3wqKiZMjYuJQJyHk9X3B-3QXL0xc-2DlKwi8z8X4RPFvBcGxusnpsGNj03iiK-SvY143IksKgI3vy7J8P4fyXb4ZM=&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==) of the Biden Administration that are driving American farmers to crisis amid [looming food shortages](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwbGt7I182kU_fU85AMqlqDqm5fvs4K7C91T7ljsd4wEkaIeqPkuyTjQ0yfV_8jpnGoh63e7DRlWFq7sOyZCIzVCGaHEvXyZGUxU1ncvai9JlXthiNZQCd6Fex2g4eWlnC3Fp2euNAaPjKTS7fS43kUmvJoOS5pZ_5XKL1RmhammJjhxZrPuffiTJoK6gou-hga9Sbyx4JuAJkA0MJ5ZribCYBq4BJzu4eA==&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==) \- and hurting families and businesses across America. Read the full text of Kelly's op-ed below:
[Biden's pitch to farmers is all hat and no cattle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2JekT0E9MPAEBCntVrmvzs103MCWl7A2yYHb0ltZP6H2wzjzOmoVARUZizbHZk7US2XbxsuF4xthoYZ2uGDOqBwwfV9DwEd-Ub5FsEJy3XfXCyHz-d301QJLpitZWwRMpIbDR5Ju3C_yVpSJeBB2NXc1Dc2IZbMGdE0iLsJJBLQTue7HAGOVSaNKL6axLQfcXeH&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==)
President Dwight D. Eisenhower accurately said, "Farming looks mighty easy when your plow is a pencil and you're a thousand miles from the cornfield."
Last week President Biden put down his executive order signing pen and visited Kankakee, Illinois, to speak to America's farmers about the myriad challenges they face due to inflation, energy prices, supply chains and the conflict in [Ukraine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2Jens75VLPi2Az7nJJvCeFBc_oAPi8-dsxfYxpgEUKuVzSwx-d_BAqCC4kGLa7dBJIDr_FoTb1qOmGQmofdhdRRK_zDuGwsPoGBBH3PIvvvEj0bSZKlX8faRw==&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==). He called on farmers to fill the gaps in the world's food supply -- just as he's called on the U.S. oil and gas industry to address soaring energy prices. Meanwhile, in the midst of our nation's recent baby formula shortage, farmers are left to grapple with more regulatory gridlock from the FDA. Once again, rather than correcting the administration's policies that have increased the problems, Mr. Biden shoveled out blame and excuses that have come to define his presidency.
I grew up just 100 miles away from where Mr. Biden spoke in Stanford, Illinois -- the daughter of a proud third-generation farmer. My parents taught me the value of a hard day's work on our corn and soybean farm -- in all kinds of weather and regardless of the economic cycle. I raised cattle and showed them at our local county fair. From the fields and later in the boardroom, I saw the challenges farmers face as they pour their blood, sweat and tears into feeding America every day of the week.
The equipment these farmers rely on uses diesel fuel, which has hit all-time high prices thanks to the administration's war on American energy -- making the very growth Mr. Biden is encouraging all but impossible. The countless measures he took from his first day in office to reduce domestic energy production, drive the price increases that continue today. From canceling the Keystone Pipeline to halting oil and gas leases on public lands and increasing taxes and red tape, Mr. Biden made limiting energy production a priority, and America is paying the price.
At the same time, new climate rules would impact America's agriculture industry even further. The "Enhancement and Standardization of Climate-Related Disclosures for Investors" requires extensive disclosures by public companies of measured impacts on their entire supply chain. The Farm Bureau suggests this could create substantial costs and liabilities for farms and could have "meaningful consequences for farmers' and ranchers' ability to produce food, fuel, and fiber for the U.S. and the globe and puts in jeopardy the security and stability of the U.S. supply chain."
On top of that, the Biden EPA has reinstated the ever-burdensome Waters of the United States rule, which would also have a significant economic impact on farms, ranches and other family businesses.
Mr. Biden's speech last week made clear he doesn't understand the plight of our farmers. While they work out of the media's line of sight, our country is deeply dependent on the survival of the farmer. About 2% of our country's population are farmers, but 100% of our population eats -- and our strength as a nation comes from our role in helping feed, clothe and fuel the world. While the president spoke of the need for American farmers to make up for the lost production in [Ukraine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2Jens75VLPi2Az7nJJvCeFBc_oAPi8-dsxfYxpgEUKuVzSwx-d_BAqCC4kGLa7dBJIDr_FoTb1qOmGQmofdhdRRK_zDuGwsPoGBBH3PIvvvEj0bSZKlX8faRw==&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==), offering more insurance for double cropping, and funding to increase the production of domestic fertilizer, these half measures ignore the key challenges American farmers face as a result of the Biden Administration's anti-energy platform.
Mr. Biden was right to address concerns about the rising costs of fertilizer -- the Senate Agricultural Committee released a report showing that the cost of fertilizer is up 220% from January 2021. But just two weeks ago, Mr. Biden's own USAID Director said she hoped the fertilizer shortage would "hasten the transition" to compost and manure, using the phrase "never let a crisis go to waste." The fact is that while the Russian invasion of [Ukraine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxpH5OhLkJQ5cZg83dd5A0Ea8INbrJCfaOg2VOihl5-neIZ2yzehwU6ePCGDs2Jens75VLPi2Az7nJJvCeFBc_oAPi8-dsxfYxpgEUKuVzSwx-d_BAqCC4kGLa7dBJIDr_FoTb1qOmGQmofdhdRRK_zDuGwsPoGBBH3PIvvvEj0bSZKlX8faRw==&c=147ItiMmTR7hbuJhgt6WHMDZi6B274S1hIrKz8YXeDde5Ff7rC0sYg==&ch=EOACO31o7bixAOdFyxFTWe5Z6VpC0A11edqhjhOdbnjznuuR6pCP1g==) further jeopardized fertilizer for U.S. farmers, the shortage has been an ongoing issue -- one that should not be used as a vehicle for the green energy agenda.
What American farmers desperately need is certainty -- certainty that the regulatory agenda won't be driven by the whims of the far left. The president should immediately ease the regulatory expansion on farmers -- who already operate under dozens of environmental requirements. They should end their war on American energy, with an emphasis on restarting pipelines, opening oil and gas leases and permits on federal lands, and reducing the taxes and red tape that will lower energy costs and reduce costs on America's agriculture industry.
The Biden administration could benefit from the words of Thomas Jefferson, who once said that "agriculture ... is our wisest pursuit because it will, in the end, contribute most to real wealth, good morals and happiness." Indeed, America's health, strength, independence and future very much depend on it.
Kelly Loeffler is the chair of Greater Georgia and a former U.S. Senator for Georgia.

Peter,

clean_body: Fighting for you Peter, As an important member of this team, I wanted to share this exciting news with you first: we’ve just released our new TV ad! = = I go to work every day focused on what I can do to make things better for the people of our state. That’s why I’ve been fighting for middle-class tax cuts and to lower everyday costs for child care, health care, and more–and pay for it by making sure the wealthiest and large corporations finally pay their fair share. I'll always listen to Washington state workers and families. And especially in tough times like these, I'll stand up to anyone who doesn't put working people first. = Thanks, Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. Thank you so much for joining our grassroots team! My name is Ruben Ramirez -- I am an Afghan War veteran, trial attorney, former science teacher, and Democrat. **I was born and raised right here in South Texas, and now I’m running to represent Texas’ 15th Congressional District.**

I come from humble beginnings but was blessed with a loving grandmother and father who instilled in me integrity, a strong work ethic, a passion for learning, and a deep love of country. It’s why I volunteered for the U.S. Army and deployed to Afghanistan, and it’s why I’m running to serve our South Texas community in Congress.

My family also taught me to give back and invest in the next generation. Some of my best memories are from teaching high school Chemistry and Physics right here in South Texas. My wife and I work hard every day to instill these same values in our two sons.

Now, I’m running for Congress to bring our South Texas values to Washington, but I need to hear from you: [**What issues should I prioritize in my campaign? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqwzAQ_Br7JiPLspMcfAiE3FJKKfQo5NXKEdXDSDL9_UpJC70V9rK7M7Ozo2YFSvbQmplRxuhEWU_5kdNuGukCx-NpXJTqD8uh4VRajLmLuO2LNSB9lulThwjYQXDtfQZFKVLFkU8Kei5HYOp0oExx0IMeT-3HTdykscavL9LhHLMWMQkvhQRDthis0Sgmwghjom_tfM95S81wbti1VNAaY-oKM9brEKIvfQ4euxDXAigKpEqQlGVGhz5X4nDdsxMp7MVoM1wKKG0IuZho2FRXDpXZXVmhK-Z-hiDdJs3qnwzxcPZH9okJPtduuLyeydv7lfxG2MZZbV_GWpOmGtxahR8h5X-e_gYnYIbM)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqwzAQ_Br7JiPLspMcfAiE3FJKKfQo5NXKEdXDSDL9_UpJC70V9rK7M7Ozo2YFSvbQmplRxuhEWU_5kdNuGukCx-NpXJTqD8uh4VRajLmLuO2LNSB9lulThwjYQXDtfQZFKVLFkU8Kei5HYOp0oExx0IMeT-3HTdykscavL9LhHLMWMQkvhQRDthis0Sgmwghjom_tfM95S81wbti1VNAaY-oKM9brEKIvfQ4euxDXAigKpEqQlGVGhz5X4nDdsxMp7MVoM1wKKG0IuZho2FRXDpXZXVmhK-Z-hiDdJs3qnwzxcPZH9okJPtduuLyeydv7lfxG2MZZbV_GWpOmGtxahR8h5X-e_gYnYIbM) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqwzAQ_Br7JiPLspMcfAiE3FJKKfQo5NXKEdXDSDL9_UpJC70V9rK7M7Ozo2YFSvbQmplRxuhEWU_5kdNuGukCx-NpXJTqD8uh4VRajLmLuO2LNSB9lulThwjYQXDtfQZFKVLFkU8Kei5HYOp0oExx0IMeT-3HTdykscavL9LhHLMWMQkvhQRDthis0Sgmwghjom_tfM95S81wbti1VNAaY-oKM9brEKIvfQ4euxDXAigKpEqQlGVGhz5X4nDdsxMp7MVoM1wKKG0IuZho2FRXDpXZXVmhK-Z-hiDdJs3qnwzxcPZH9okJPtduuLyeydv7lfxG2MZZbV_GWpOmGtxahR8h5X-e_gYnYIbM) Regards,

John King has the vision, character, and ever-growing coalition to unite our state and bring true promise of progress for every Maryland family in every zip code. From fighting for fair implementation of paid family leave to building green public transit options while prioritizing racial justice and economic development, John has the progressive plans and a lifetime of experience to deliver real, positive change and improve the lives of countless Marylanders who have been underserved for too long.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Midnight Deadline: I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
This is a real opportunity to make your voice heard.
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter, do you have a minute?
I don't take running for office or this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) lightly. When I ask Iowans for their vote, I am asking for their trust – to trust that I will represent them well and fight for them in Washington. I know that earning that trust starts with meeting folks all across our state and really listening to what they have to say about the issues that matter most to them.
I want to hear what you have to say – that’s why my team and I put together this quick grassroots survey.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: This is a cool endorsement...
body:
A Space Force Lieutenant Colonel
| | | |
---
|
---
|
# Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
(June 2, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, CD7 Republican candidate for Congress, announces a formal endorsement from Lt Col Matt Lohmeier of SAMPAC.

SAMPAC is the new independent political action committee founded by bestselling author, F-15 pilot, and former Space Force Lt Col Matt Lohmeier. SAMPAC, which stands for Save America's Military Political Action Committee, was founded by Col Lohmeier after the Space Force fired him from his military command position for publishing his best-selling book, Irresistible Revolution. His book documents the morale-crushing influence of Marxist-critical race theory on the military and contains one of the best historical treatments of the rise of Cultural Marxism.

SAMPAC was founded to expose Marxist indoctrination in all branches of America's military, starting at the top echelon of leadership. Its mission is to educate the public on the nature and extent of the threat, develop and implement strategies to de-politicize the military, and endorse, fund and support candidates whom we can count on to fight. SAMPAC will not shy away from endorsements and independent contributions in tightly contested races whenever there is a viable candidate who dares to stand up to the far left, but especially if they are veterans.
|
---
| In a statement sent to the Aadland campaign, Lt Col Matt Lohmeier said:
"I am proud to join Rick Perry, Ryan Zinke and Congressman Jack Bergman in endorsing Erik Aadland for Congress. Erik is a true fighter, not a desk jockey. He is ready to lead the fight against the radical leftist takeover of our once proud military. Unfortunately, even many of our Republican leaders in Congress are well behind the power curve in understanding and combatting the insidious influence of the radical left throughout our nation's institutions. Incredibly, and despite all of the evidence of their failures, they continue to pursue a policy of 'business as usual' in Washington. Erik Aadland is anything but a 'business as usual' kind of candidate."
---
|
---
|
# Erik's Remarks
---
| |
---
|
---
| "I'm honored to receive Lt. Col. Matt Lohmeier's and SAMPAC's endorsement, and for the critically important work they are doing to save our military from Marxist indoctrination. It's critical for our government to immediately work on restoring the strength and readiness of our military by fighting the politicization and social engineering being pushed by Washington elites. As a Congressman, I look forward to partnering with Patriots like Lt. Col Lohmeier to ensure that our military remains an honorable and meritocratic institution at the core of our national identity, and one that is tightly focused on the ability to fight and win wars globally when necessary. Matt's endorsement reminds me of all the reasons I was proud to serve in the military myself, as well as the criticality of my new mission to represent Americans in Congress."
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WFButa2vzSkE_nxk4XgFnmRWA5DFNpqYkBh3tN1AGJ3y2baErg3n6sH1iRh__97OvV0cUzVQ_gsonuL6Rm1sKtLbBt5W_iRRHWxmggg5GNpChecBsp9C4VV0JYBbQ4SHPzhlg-I7zEY_WNhZJMNbZJx2cR2n42EDT8oTfWta7FXWqLQ1DaFzjY8o_BoiBZVJ7FlfbyIRO89qB8zt7fOIsp2CfUxdzNY1J5Phj4tRhVhVqKm9hmMsgws5UxGxj7aUu_Ix3Dw8hFg=&c=e8mo0YOdRpmSyRMfY1Vw7GCHAy67NbZt_PDLyO2e8Qv0YqNBhdm8QA==&ch=mIF28Lkq370aUhfhGp9lLBeT_FdOALIYdDTVhAcaTl4ILIdYxGvy9A==)
---
| |
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WFButa2vzSkE_nxk4XgFnmRWA5DFNpqYkBh3tN1AGJ3y2baErg3n6i456NiC5jBiKmhZPTF4gLpyDGPm3MjVcEcPVNuJSANCNye42v_B5I28IJOBM6KY6dl8pFtBeaExbBDVQaW9t2tq5-V9DLN8Qg==&c=e8mo0YOdRpmSyRMfY1Vw7GCHAy67NbZt_PDLyO2e8Qv0YqNBhdm8QA==&ch=mIF28Lkq370aUhfhGp9lLBeT_FdOALIYdDTVhAcaTl4ILIdYxGvy9A==)
---

name: 300% match today!
subject: A threat we’ve never seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Did you see this?

Rep. Liz Cheney called on members of her party to have the courage and stand up to what she called “a threat we have never faced before – a President attempting to unravel our constitutional republic.” And she couldn’t be more right.

Our country is teetering between collapse and prosperity, and we’re running out of time to ensure it’s the latter. With more and more Republicans following the Trump playbook and tearing up democratic norms, we need YOU.

Donate today! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-june22-cheney?amount=15&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220602_em_f_6D_t1

If Republicans win the House and begin to lay the groundwork for Donald Trump to come to power again, we’ll see a concerted effort to undermine every election and to undermine anyone who stands up for democracy.

We can’t beat them without a show of strength from our grassroots army of supporters and patriots. Republicans have a favorable map in November, along with massive amounts of money to capitalize on the map and win.

**Saturday, June 11, 2022** _**(Rain Date: Sunday, June 12, 2022)**_**1:00 - 5:00 PM****Join us for the****THELANDER CORNHOLE CHALLENGE!**
---
CD1 Candidate, Ed Thelander, welcomes cornhole enthusiasts of all ages to a Thelander Cornhole Challenge! You won’t want to miss the excitement at this regulation tournament. There will be hamburgers and hotdogs, prizes, and lots of good-natured fun!The Grand Prize is a custom made cornhole set made and donated by Chip Howarth, Chip Howarth Woodworking.Save the date, form your team, register today!Tournament location: 69 Morrison Road; Springvale, Maine 04093Registration fee: $60/teamEarly registration fee: $50/team - _must register by 6/4/2022_ Spectator registration fee: $20 to cheer on your favorite team _Fee includes one lunch ticket per person._
| [REGISTER NOW!](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=9352d96c53&e=f8a0a76a2b)

name: Deb McGrath (personal)
subject: A thank you — and NEXT!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you take a pledge to vote in 2022?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46035576/348554897/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmOTMzMi04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5m3bD-se_jDHRnTFT9_AS5k7MfxSxAiieBxy2ooVBfM=) [Your vote is your voice. Let me know you’ll use it in the midterm elections by taking my pledge to vote in 2022 right now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46035578/348554899/-1619776301?refcode=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmOTMzMi04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5m3bD-se_jDHRnTFT9_AS5k7MfxSxAiieBxy2ooVBfM=&emci=f23bebef-eae0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)
| ****[PLEDGE TO VOTE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46035580/348554901/-1619776301?refcode=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmOTMzMi04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5m3bD-se_jDHRnTFT9_AS5k7MfxSxAiieBxy2ooVBfM=&emci=f23bebef-eae0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=87ff9332-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)****
---
* * *
I want to take this opportunity to say thank you, Peter.

Your generous support made our end-of-month fundraising drive a success. **It means all the more to me knowing that we’re in this together, when so much is at stake.**

Every day, there are more reasons to be concerned about the state of our country and the world. After all, the Supreme Court is expected to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ at any moment; violence rips through our communities; our democracy is under constant threat; and so much more. _Right now, it may seem that a single election isn’t so important._

**But right now is when every single election matters most, Peter**. We need to secure our fundamental rights and protect our communities - and that means action. We must band together in support of candidates and causes we can be proud of. Change only comes when we demand it.

This election is about defending our fundamental freedoms. So today, I ask you to pledge to vote in the critical 2022 midterms - in my race, in the race for Wisconsin Senate and other statewide races, in local town and city elections.

Friends,

I wanted to personally take a minute to thank you for helping us hit our May fundraising goal. May was not an easy month to fundraise in and knowing you had my back meant the world to me.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, chipping in $3, $10, or whatever possible, is helping us carve out our path to victory. I’m humbled that we’re in this race together.

“Together” is an important word because we can’t do this work alone. Without you, none of this would be possible in this fight to defend our democracy from anti-democratic extremists like my opponent, a Capitol insurrectionist.

**[With that said, if you haven’t already, I’d be honored if you made your support official and added your name to our endorsement list.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46035705/348555146/56829198?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.06.02_b1_eomty-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.02_b1_eomty-brad_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYTIxNC04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ZHiiUo62-_HNe4ZKTN4P3pGzv-DtUcYUWV4O-xjzWw=&emci=d650304d-1fe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=86dea214-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46035708/348555147/56829198?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.06.02_b1_eomty-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.02_b1_eomty-brad_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYTIxNC04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ZHiiUo62-_HNe4ZKTN4P3pGzv-DtUcYUWV4O-xjzWw=&emci=d650304d-1fe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=86dea214-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Wishing you a happy Pride Month, Peter!

Pride Month -- and the progress we have to celebrate -- has grown. We can celebrate great leaders like State Senator Emily Randall, our state's amazing Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins, outstanding local leaders like Pierce County Councilman Ryan Mello and Bremerton City Councilman Michael Goodnow, and so many others who are blazing trails and making a difference!

While we celebrate LGBTQ+ leaders, activists, and communities this month, we need to recommit to defending the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Earlier this year, a Republican-led state legislature in Florida passed a _Don 't Say Gay_ bill and copy-cat bills are being introduced in over a dozen other states. We need to call attention to the attacks on the LGBTQ+ community that continue to crop up all over our country.

Peter, I want to be clear: These hateful and horrific laws and actions have no place in our country, and it's on all of us to fight back. I stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community and remain committed to doing everything I can to protect the rights and safety of ALL Americans.

This Pride Month, I am honored to continue fighting alongside the LGBTQ+ community now, and every day, for the equality and justice that all of us are entitled to.

**[I hope you'll join me in this fight, this month and every month. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/XbFyLehGq_LGR0Km7NyI8GuNMhRhi-MR6m3D3nobCY4=/Yz7mBUsoY6sraJfaI9U92Jha_PDovP6Trv9JJJEXHoc=?ms=em22_220601_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220601_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220601_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220601_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

clean_body: Wishing you a happy Pride Month, Peter! Pride Month -- and the progress we have to celebrate -- has grown. We can celebrate great leaders like State Senator Emily Randall, our state's amazing Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins, outstanding local leaders like Pierce County Councilman Ryan Mello and Bremerton City Councilman Michael Goodnow, and so many others who are blazing trails and making a difference! While we celebrate LGBTQ+ leaders, activists, and communities this month, we need to recommit to defending the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Earlier this year, a Republican-led state legislature in Florida passed a Don 't Say Gay bill and copy-cat bills are being introduced in over a dozen other states. We need to call attention to the attacks on the LGBTQ+ community that continue to crop up all over our country. Peter, I want to be clear: These hateful and horrific laws and actions have no place in our country, and it's on all of us to fight back. I stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community and remain committed to doing everything I can to protect the rights and safety of ALL Americans. This Pride Month, I am honored to continue fighting alongside the LGBTQ+ community now, and every day, for the equality and justice that all of us are entitled to. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} It's an honor to serve you, Derek Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. **We just got a terrifying glimpse into what the future holds if Republicans take the majority in Congress.**
One of Trump's allies, Sen. Rick Scott of Florida, released the National Republican Senatorial Committee's (NRSC) extreme right-wing legislative agenda. **Unsurprisingly, it's filled with plans to raise taxes on working Americans and let tax cheats off the hook for not paying their fair share.**
This is a timely reminder of just how critical the next election is.
**Senate Republicans feel confident in taking the majority this November, and they've made it painfully clear why we****can't let that happen. Democrats must grow our majority in the Senate and stop these policies in their tracks.**
**[Donate $3 now to defend and expand our Senate majority in 2022!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46036545/348556882/-2044921950?refcode=2022-06-02-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=16ea5fc2-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNWZjMi04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dl-bag2oLf6u4ibzNkoehc-3hYAShplC3ECFkXaKPdI=) **
As usual, while Democrats are fighting to create good-paying jobs, tackle the climate crisis, cut health care costs, and much more, Republicans remain laser-focused on raising taxes on American families and protecting tax cheats. Gouging working families with higher federal taxes while the rich get richer is just plain wrong, and it's straight out of the GOP playbook.
We've been here before. We know that when Republicans are in charge, they move mountains to help the rich get richer while raising taxes on working Americans. We witnessed this as recently as the 2017 passage of the Republican tax law, which unsurprisingly, has failed to deliver on every false promise Republicans made.
It's very simple. When Republicans have power, the rich get richer at the expense of hard-working Americans. And now we see exactly how they will double down on enriching their donors and friends if they win back the Senate.
[**Please donate $3 to defend and expand the Democratic Senate majority in this critical election!** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46036546/348556883/-2044921950?refcode=2022-06-02-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=16ea5fc2-8de2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNWZjMi04ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dl-bag2oLf6u4ibzNkoehc-3hYAShplC3ECFkXaKPdI=)

clean_body: | | | It seems unbelievable, but it's also just another day at the office for Senate Republicans. Their playbook for 2022? Literally gouging working families while doing as many favors as possible for the ultra-wealthy. = Team Wyden Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Forwarded Message We just got a terrifying glimpse into what the future holds if Republicans take the majority in Congress. One of Trump's allies, Sen. Rick Scott of Florida, released the National Republican Senatorial Committee's (NRSC) extreme right-wing legislative agenda. Unsurprisingly, it's filled with plans to raise taxes on working Americans and let tax cheats off the hook for not paying their fair share. This is a timely reminder of just how critical the next election is. Senate Republicans feel confident in taking the majority this November, and they've made it painfully clear why wecan't let that happen. Democrats must grow our majority in the Senate and stop these policies in their tracks. = As usual, while Democrats are fighting to create good-paying jobs, tackle the climate crisis, cut health care costs, and much more, Republicans remain laser-focused on raising taxes on American families and protecting tax cheats. Gouging working families with higher federal taxes while the rich get richer is just plain wrong, and it's straight out of the GOP playbook. We've been here before. We know that when Republicans are in charge, they move mountains to help the rich get richer while raising taxes on working Americans. We witnessed this as recently as the 2017 passage of the Republican tax law, which unsurprisingly, has failed to deliver on every false promise Republicans made. It's very simple. When Republicans have power, the rich get richer at the expense of hard-working Americans. And now we see exactly how they will double down on enriching their donors and friends if they win back the Senate. = Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. We encourage you to check out the details here. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037361/348558817/805959158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) Here at Team Lafazan, we believe that young people have the power to change the world. In fact, we believe that young people have to lead the charge. We just need to give them the chance. [**That's why we are inviting young people throughout the region to join our movement today! Sign up now to be an intern for Team Lafazan.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037362/348558819/1244926273?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) [SIGN ME UP!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037363/348558820/805959158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) (Know someone who'd be a good fit? Send us their name, and we'll reach out.) When Josh ran for the Nassau County legislature, hundreds of young people were inspired to join "Lafazan's Army." Over 200 interns became engaged campaigners for Josh, learned how to organize, and helped him win. [**This innovative and inspiring program even received coverage from The New York Times.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037364/348558826/-2129866425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) **We brought Lafazan's Army back for Josh's campaign for Congress and we're already working with more than 150 committed, enthusiastic, dynamic, creative volunteers**. See for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037365/348558828/805959158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) And now that New York's primary election has been pushed back to August, [**we're launching a summer-intern program for Josh's congressional campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037366/348558829/805959158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) This election is critical. Our race is rated as a toss-up by the Cook Political Report.The work we do this summer will set us up for success in November. **[Even if you're no longer a student in high school or college, we'd love to have you join our team as a volunteer with flexible hours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037369/348558831/-718531144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)** We won't win on hope alone. [**Sign up to join our team and make history.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46037370/348558833/805959158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNDc2Ni04ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GViPoFiLYs1xYiGz-X5DmJdEmoK_iLiNbtPOvLVhFr4=&emci=19ea1d33-89e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9f4b4766-8ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) **Please share this email with parents, students, or anyone who may know of a young person who might benefit from this experience.** We can't wait for you to be a part of this historic movement! _Team Lafazan_ **[P.S. Please consider supporting our internship program with a grassroots donation clean_body: | | | | Peter, This summer's program is designed around a flexible schedule and will be as dynamic and thrilling as ever as we work together to send Josh to Washington! We encourage you to check out the details here. Here at Team Lafazan, we believe that young people have the power to change the world. In fact, we believe that young people have to lead the charge. We just need to give them the chance. (Know someone who'd be a good fit? Send us their name, and we'll reach out.) When Josh ran for the Nassau County legislature, hundreds of young people were inspired to join "Lafazan's Army." Over 200 interns became engaged campaigners for Josh, learned how to organize, and helped him win. We brought Lafazan's Army back for Josh's campaign for Congress and we're already working with more than 150 committed, enthusiastic, dynamic, creative volunteers. See for yourself: And now that New York's primary election has been pushed back to August, This election is critical. Our race is rated as a toss-up by the Cook Political Report.The work we do this summer will set us up for success in November. We won't win on hope alone. Please share this email with parents, students, or anyone who may know of a young person who might benefit from this experience. We can't wait for you to be a part of this historic movement! On the Campaign Trail

I have been working non-stop to get out the vote in Georgia's 10th Congressional District. Voters showed up in the primary to send me to the runoff because they know I am the only America First and Trump-endorsed candidate in this race!

After being elected to Congress, I will continue working around the clock to make sure that the values of the Patriots of Georgia's 10th Congressional District are being put first.

[Check Out Upcoming Events Near You](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kE8oFNzguDiGEU2LzdRrR_OdWO7bBwFsix6iLHCuoAHZLJ_g3IUEIUkGK7P7ynuUdRH-L5e4fm73SNNhcEoUsNdfB4jPK3Jbssgi4aqk4ns7cyeF9m6iCq6vlqM9nehDAoX1IybruEbBRB2RsJZ6zJhkvDgkwBM9&c=4ggD7KhQ1u9hL5aqcMzx5L_qBmX1kZI2KPNMoU9mMS4P6W2P5Xg4lQ==&ch=mFborvFLPJnE6vP6zXUe45EjqlrUXVc2yjh9B_O_KA-KmtKriXOw4w==)

It's Runoff Season!

Patriots, because of your support in the primary, we are now in a runoff election!

I once again need your support to cross the finish line so we can head to Congress and Take America Back!

Vote Vernon Jones for Congress on June 21st!

| |
---
| Endorsements Alert
I am proud to accept the endorsements of Richard Grenell (former Director of National Intelligence under President Trump), Jackson County Commissioner Marty Seagraves, Rep. Tom Kirby and former Insurance Commissioner Ralph Hudgens.
They are all America First Patriots who know that I am the only candidate in Georgia's 10th Congressional District that can stand up to Nancy Pelosi and The Squad!

clean_body: Georgia's 10th Congressional District | | | | | | | Vernon Jones for Congress \- June 2nd, 2022 - | | | ---|--- | On the Campaign Trail I have been working non-stop to get out the vote in Georgia's 10th Congressional District. Voters showed up in the primary to send me to the runoff because they know I am the only America First and Trump-endorsed candidate in this race! After being elected to Congress, I will continue working around the clock to make sure that the values of the Patriots of Georgia's 10th Congressional District are being put first. == | | | | ---|--- | It's Runoff Season! Patriots, because of your support in the primary, we are now in a runoff election! I once again need your support to cross the finish line so we can head to Congress and Take America Back! Vote Vernon Jones for Congress on June 21st! | | | Endorsements Alert I am proud to accept the endorsements of Richard Grenell (former Director of National Intelligence under President Trump), Jackson County Commissioner Marty Seagraves, Rep. Tom Kirby and former Insurance Commissioner Ralph Hudgens. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Biden’s green agenda is bad for Alaska
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
This is insane | The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska...
**[BREAKING NEWS: BIDEN CANCELS OIL DRILLING IN ALASKA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**

Peter,

This is _outrageous._

The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska. **This decision will be disastrous for everyday Americans.** At a time when gas prices are skyrocketing, we should be drilling MORE, not LESS.

Make no mistake. _**Joe Biden wants YOU to pay more for gas**_ while promoting his insane green energy policies. The number one thing we can do to decrease gas prices is increase drilling in America, but Biden REFUSES to do it.

We need to send a message to Biden and the rest of the radical Left in Washington that we are FED UP with their ridiculous green agenda. I'm asking you to sign my campaign's official petition to tell Biden to reverse the decision to stop drilling in Alaska.

_**[Add your name to the list in the NEXT HOUR to stand with me and tell Biden to DRILL MORE in Alaska.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**_

**[TELL BIDEN TO"DRILL, BABY, DRILL"](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DEADLINE: ****ONE HOUR**

**[SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**

The price at the pump is getting out of control, and we all know whose fault it is, Peter. **It's time to hold Joe Biden accountable.**

My team is sending this petition to Washington soon. I need YOU to add your name in the next hour to make sure that Biden and the Democrats know that it's time to DRILL in America.

**[Sign the petition in the NEXT HOUR to tell the radical Left you want MORE DRILLING in Alaska.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)
Sarah Palin
Candidate for Congress for Alaska

**[SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60506393:JJSRr9oAN:m:1:3253819041:2DFBE1803E06862B593A965177E56572:r)**

subject: Tom will ALWAYS fight for NJ families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=euAdainq9NCb%2BqRMcoC2zeL2IFHwjT7uV7qT6VvfoekDPFsE31mA9rm2y5ZC8PCIlonnBYJpnOPRqg5QRTMyLhf3s6bftaKd6RQE9uIHToS9xvVusO9nGj0hR6OU0h8yAd3Kjc8NUqj7rxPoLUKnGWZNabgAOK7CB%2F%2B9qNTsQXWCMtyRukTOvgXZdyGPFKqOZeI6AAWKdcpZB9WydYnExHSg9LkMGil6s9SmFws6mmSFWKrZVD7XdSIYf4RwYwApD9Qry5Cc%2BQ1O5Dx12NoxmW0oiYvu5YQfsQri4qUD%2BFRyTA6K3sEXPBo6jlpIJJ41GnlgaV5rplowcYrkPyrioXZ2k1ZF2W1s%2B5sAhda6GJU4UhPO5WLgTas%2BsmogoQ2bHye%2BDGrjVRCmADA8RC4HAy2OOIGvtaFD7QTDOpvmRahDlZ9t4%2Bu089CkzL8bAV%2Bq)
---
| |
---
Team, our New Jersey primary is less than a week away, and I want to take a minute to explain why this is such an important landmark for our campaign.

**The fact is, team, once the votes are in and the primary is behind us, the fight for the future of NJ07 will kick into its highest gear yet.** The GOP is putting __massive__ amounts of dark money into their attempt to unseat Tom — and once they have their nominee, they will focus all their efforts on discrediting Tom and activating their extremist base.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you for your continued support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

As our midterm elections draw closer, I wanted to extend a sincere thank you for your support in advance of my team’s end-of-month fundraising deadline earlier this week. The importance of this election cannot be overstated, and your support means more now than it ever has.

The Democrats have a razor-thin majority in both the Senate and House, and the GOP is actively threatening to dismantle all that we’ve accomplished. We _cannot_ let them prevent us from moving forward in creating the America we want to see, and it’s your support that makes a difference in this fight.

Once again, thank you. I look forward to seeing all that we can accomplish together.

Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Peter, As our midterm elections draw closer, I wanted to extend a sincere thank you for your support in advance of my team’s end-of-month fundraising deadline earlier this week. The importance of this election cannot be overstated, and your support means more now than it ever has. The Democrats have a razor-thin majority in both the Senate and House, and the GOP is actively threatening to dismantle all that we’ve accomplished. We cannot let them prevent us from moving forward in creating the America we want to see, and it’s your support that makes a difference in this fight. Once again, thank you. I look forward to seeing all that we can accomplish together. Thank you, Mike = | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States
