name: Cora Neumann
subject: Reminder: Why I entered this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
I’m running for Congress because we have to do better for Montana families. But winning this race isn’t going to be easy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040489/348564839/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVjYTYzZS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D67pflG_ymNqAAH3sW0s6VbLeyBFzPvIacgPDrWwnyA=) Hey team --

**I want to start this email off by saying thank you.**

Because of you, we’re heading into Election Day with strength and momentum behind our campaign to enact meaningful, positive change for our communities and working families. I’m proud to say that this campaign has been a community-led effort from the beginning, and it means the world to me to have your confidence.

I also want to take a moment to remind you why I got in this race. It can be easy to get caught up in the election day antics and forget about the person behind the platform. **So, here’s my story:** My parents raised me with Montana values -- hard work, gratitude for our incredible public lands, and the importance of caring for one another. That's why I spent my career improving access to health care for underserved and rural communities. And it's why I launched We Are Montana two years ago -- a non-profit, public health hub for rural and Native leaders battling through the COVID-19 crisis. **Right now, Montana is at a crossroads, friend. ** We are all feeling the effects of massive growth, whether it’s rising housing prices, inflation, or our Main Streets and small businesses. Families are pulling up to gas stations and walking into grocery stores to find that everything is more expensive. **I’m running for Congress because I know we can do better for Montana families.** We deserve a representative in Washington who knows what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet. Who’ll fight to make sure we have good jobs and wages, and will work across the aisle to make sure that families who have been here for years or generations can afford to stay. _What we don't need_ in Congress is another Washington insider like Ryan Zinke -- who’s best-known for wasting taxpayer dollars for personal use and selling public lands to the highest bidder. **Winning this race isn’t going to be easy. Zinke’s special interest and corporate PAC dollars are working hard to outraise us. They think they can buy this House seat, but they’re no match for our strong, grassroots movement. **

[**These last few days before the primary are critical for getting our message out to as many Montanans as possible. Could you chip in $3 to support our fight to the finish?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040490/348564840/-10092236?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVjYTYzZS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D67pflG_ymNqAAH3sW0s6VbLeyBFzPvIacgPDrWwnyA=) | **[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040491/348564841/-10092236?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVjYTYzZS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D67pflG_ymNqAAH3sW0s6VbLeyBFzPvIacgPDrWwnyA=)**
---
Thanks for everything,
_Cora_
Paid for by Cora for Montana
---
Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040493/348564843/-1800721441?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVjYTYzZS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D67pflG_ymNqAAH3sW0s6VbLeyBFzPvIacgPDrWwnyA=&emci=befd52e9-91e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=5feca63e-92e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=37373330) Consider supporting Cora's campaign [by making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040496/348564846/1820125544?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVjYTYzZS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D67pflG_ymNqAAH3sW0s6VbLeyBFzPvIacgPDrWwnyA=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/wkRVy0sRWUuu2HClBlOUlw2?unsubscribedata=doSLRUuGHbg2nRAvJ1S%2F7uhYoP63%2BfNzcn0c8uc3enLh5mTXj7czIj%2BLXXZiggIyJyUXDgRKh2%2BhctpjS86AbHO6hJw1lQwSFo7fXxSlFZj1sHZJBMx%2B2c%2BHpP%2Bdmlh1hjvIUSVmv1JJdIainG%2Bvr7fLXmSEQV0zfQ77rb0IQH6IR7J30pqUcCCN9UL6YjjcJCca78mdHJJ3Nm%2F2fgXl2%2B%2BKwTslHSn8cJh6epFvnZtwSC20Q3Ypfxpr5wb10eiADa6DipxyPNyGs4pxcAiH3JYK1iNVviZN2WrpxDFmohH8oz9lJOW0FZWkjewo46i%2BVsQia4y8Yfb7Z7hh8NiOzzg1lhsXLRpRCYgbhI0gJ191tmLnucgqAh4R5tuLBP7YIuiGvMghyeft0y2W6ew3GXfJ48R8nshmp4uDacFpI0ACruTiMNrEFq90dJ6GhcPT).

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma and the NRA, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a huge fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and right now we’re still very short of our $35,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040539/348565144/-42398318?refcode=em20220602mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDAyNjllOS05MmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p0nEHAfq9goK5yP_RL4jXFJBj58WgtuKT9fxwCDZV24=)

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Happy Pride Month, Nebraska!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
As we celebrate love and identity in tandem this month, let us remember that this is not merely a fight we must wage once a month each year.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040580/348565575/333259033?refcode=em_220601_pridemonth&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220601_pridemonth&refcode2=4010c956-93e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDEwYzk1Ni05M2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nF6NoeRPhO7Evae0evI0xHkleYaEl-bCHT3P5zOYmkM=)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46040582/348565577/333259033?amount=10&refcode=em_220601_pridemonth&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220601_pridemonth&refcode2=4010c956-93e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDEwYzk1Ni05M2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nF6NoeRPhO7Evae0evI0xHkleYaEl-bCHT3P5zOYmkM=) Happy Pride Month, my friends! As both a mom and a legislator, Pride is a joyous celebration that I hold close to my heart. In 1969, the Stonewall riots in New York demanded an end to anti-LGBTQ+ violence and discrimination. One year of hard struggles and brave advocacy later, thousands of LGBTQ+ community members and allies held the first Pride March to commemorate the anniversary and celebrate the vibrant diversity, progress, and love that unites us. I’m reminded every day when I see my beautiful, brilliant son Taylor of how far our society has come since these early days of Pride, and I am grateful. I am grateful that in 2022, he can legally marry the love of his life. I am grateful that he can live as his true, authentic self and know he is accepted with open arms and loving hearts. I am grateful that our District is paving a better future for LGBTQ+ Nebraskans. **I’m also reminded of how much work there is to be done.** In 29 states including Nebraska, _LGBTQ+ Americans are denied basic equality_. As a State Senator, I introduced multiple bills that would protect LGBTQ+ people against workplace discrimination, and each time those efforts were blockaded by anti-LGBTQ+ legislators. LGBTQ+ Americans are twice as likely as the rest of the population to not have health insurance. Media pundits are waging a cruel culture war against LGBTQ+ children, and legislators are repeating their intolerant talking points. And an ultra-conservative Supreme Court may even roll back our rights to marry whom we love. My son deserves better from our country. His light in my life is why I go to work each day, working to ensure that all Americans can live and love authentically, and why I will never give up the fight. Whoever you are, whomever you love, and however you choose to express your identity, I support your right to **be you.** Happy Pride!! clean_body: As we celebrate love and identity in tandem this month, let us remember that this is not merely a fight we must wage once a month each year. | = | | = Happy Pride Month, my friends! As both a mom and a legislator, Pride is a joyous celebration that I hold close to my heart. In 1969, the Stonewall riots in New York demanded an end to anti-LGBTQ+ violence and discrimination. One year of hard struggles and brave advocacy later, thousands of LGBTQ+ community members and allies held the first Pride March to commemorate the anniversary and celebrate the vibrant diversity, progress, and love that unites us. I’m reminded every day when I see my beautiful, brilliant son Taylor of how far our society has come since these early days of Pride, and I am grateful. I am grateful that in 2022, he can legally marry the love of his life. I am grateful that he can live as his true, authentic self and know he is accepted with open arms and loving hearts. I am grateful that our District is paving a better future for LGBTQ+ Nebraskans. I’m also reminded of how much work there is to be done. In 29 states including Nebraska, LGBTQ+ Americans are denied basic equality. As a State Senator, I introduced multiple bills that would protect LGBTQ+ people against workplace discrimination, and each time those efforts were blockaded by anti-LGBTQ+ legislators. LGBTQ+ Americans are twice as likely as the rest of the population to not have health insurance. Media pundits are waging a cruel culture war against LGBTQ+ children, and legislators are repeating their intolerant talking points. And an ultra-conservative Supreme Court may even roll back our rights to marry whom we love. My son deserves better from our country. His light in my life is why I go to work each day, working to ensure that all Americans can live and love authentically, and why I will never give up the fight. Whoever you are, whomever you love, and however you choose to express your identity, I support your right to be you. Happy Pride!! Patty Pansing Brooks | = = = = = = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. If you would prefer to receive fewer emails from us, click here to . We’d hate to see you go, but if you would like to stop receiving our emails, you may . name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9psvfaicq2ihbg955lr2s13a700d0b0uuirgo4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongclq34orm6tgm8dr2mdrm6d5k6grmccbgmhgr2cbjc1ie6d33eer30sticdh30puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74d3662rjad37m8omctj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb1chge1ob4s3h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0usskev9k88m4klms4n1j44qlvqi0lpjak59i4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chge1ob4s3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm4vik883lr1669fhih03nlb27ojrq1c2ejj14f0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chge1ob4s3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zab8fvfv4t68ha4cvbr85r8qbpv2acqoa08h9l6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chge1ob4s3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92esh4lu2i63fskbnkh314l67n1acliunq9p3b0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c5i61o71cjge49fg)

| For immediate release June 2nd, 2022 Failed Politician RINO Rich McCormick is Bought Out by Liberal Special Interests
Jake Evans, the Trump-endorsed candidate in Georgia's 6th District, [released his first ad of the runoff](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TfeWj030fnIy2Oly4tOqqaDcMxpf02wxyNI_ke_lSK9kiLxJDC4r-bSoSsr4cMU1aq3mRGmh6w2nXzNldtfApn4oxFr9MT9pNtMkgoDspjmn2uFwDTtJ6nOEJs4v1gCs9qqWiD8hHsSodo3XUfAXvA==&c=DpmsCnQfUsAh6B4hKc4BVe2V3-UDTsiwxP8QZyoRL18Il92xGrpH3g==&ch=oeltBGHtYpdDlnqK1NzknUXtoMdlpAhL6R9ILBY5Hopdo5ZC1cJR9A==), showing voters that RINO Rich McCormick is bought out by liberal special interests that support abortion on demand, allowing biological boys to compete in girls sports and the sham impeachment of President Trump.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TfeWj030fnIy2Oly4tOqqaDcMxpf02wxyNI_ke_lSK9kiLxJDC4r-bSoSsr4cMU1aq3mRGmh6w2nXzNldtfApn4oxFr9MT9pNtMkgoDspjmn2uFwDTtJ6nOEJs4v1gCs9qqWiD8hHsSodo3XUfAXvA==&c=DpmsCnQfUsAh6B4hKc4BVe2V3-UDTsiwxP8QZyoRL18Il92xGrpH3g==&ch=oeltBGHtYpdDlnqK1NzknUXtoMdlpAhL6R9ILBY5Hopdo5ZC1cJR9A==)
---
| The ad says "RINO Rich" is lobbing false attacks to distract from the fact that he's taking money and endorsements from liberal special interests such as the AMA and other PACs and organizations that support abortion on demand and allowing biological boys in girls sports and the impeachment sham. It ends by pointing out that there's a reason President Trump chose Jake over Dr. Squish, "because Jake backs the blue and fought and won to protect religious liberty." "You know a man by the company he keeps, and RINO Rich has raked in thousands of dollars from medical groups with an agenda far to the left of 6th District Republicans, and he's proudly trumpeted the endorsement of the Mainstreet Republican Partnership, the most liberal part of the GOP caucus and those most likely to buy into the impeachment sham," Jake said. "Weak-kneed Republicans are destroying America. It is time for a new generation of unafraid Constitutional Warriors and that is what I am."
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TfeWj030fnIy2Oly4tOqqaDcMxpf02wxyNI_ke_lSK9kiLxJDC4r-SsDojHKMZWo0Jg6aCWWmXdvuIurk7hLbpfxBOm34Ae8i1B0j-K7MSMQ3BsZYL-A4y2lMSh8kass94ICp9fPoeyWMLMp4fF6WjTdXnpJMbQK&c=DpmsCnQfUsAh6B4hKc4BVe2V3-UDTsiwxP8QZyoRL18Il92xGrpH3g==&ch=oeltBGHtYpdDlnqK1NzknUXtoMdlpAhL6R9ILBY5Hopdo5ZC1cJR9A==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TfeWj030fnIy2Oly4tOqqaDcMxpf02wxyNI_ke_lSK9kiLxJDC4r-SsDojHKMZWoosm3P8NC9EB_-sSfFlxPrl_Zr_drZdxxCYz5kRmK_t3G7r089wpcaf1KAjNNPz-N4Hy-dFaEOcihZRpp2EjYIISAYhtg7Uf-&c=DpmsCnQfUsAh6B4hKc4BVe2V3-UDTsiwxP8QZyoRL18Il92xGrpH3g==&ch=oeltBGHtYpdDlnqK1NzknUXtoMdlpAhL6R9ILBY5Hopdo5ZC1cJR9A==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TfeWj030fnIy2Oly4tOqqaDcMxpf02wxyNI_ke_lSK9kiLxJDC4r-SsDojHKMZWoXYYRSZNJ_LiKTUsh8xxB4AhDxo9QhK9k2KUo89Qo8bfARkWsRsxSu1DvRUqDr7Z56kteZb3hKXW7cshduRT2Y-XW9TDej0Qj&c=DpmsCnQfUsAh6B4hKc4BVe2V3-UDTsiwxP8QZyoRL18Il92xGrpH3g==&ch=oeltBGHtYpdDlnqK1NzknUXtoMdlpAhL6R9ILBY5Hopdo5ZC1cJR9A==)

name: Pat Fallon
subject: 🚨POLL ALERT! 📊 Biden's Memorial Day gas prices⛽️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Memorial Day gas prices were the highest on record. And with tens
of millions of Americans driving to visit family over the
extended weekend, that adds up to a serious amount of money spent
by the average American family.

Were your travel plans impacted by Joe Biden's record high gas
prices?

I'd really like to hear from you, so please take our poll!

I'm fighting against the Radical Left that believes gas is too
cheap, inflation doesn't matter, and that you're not taxed
enough.

We absolutely must win this race and reclaim a Republican
Majority in Congress, but with all of the economic pressure faced
by American families these days, I'm only asking for your
financial support today if you've got extra room in your budget
to spare.

Please don't make a contribution if it will further burden your
family financially.

Thank you for your generous support and most importantly, your
vote. It's an honor to know that you've got my back in this
fight.

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

As secretary of transportation, Pete Buttigieg helped formulate and see through the $1.2 trillion Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, **securing more than $560 billion to rebuild our country's crumbling infrastructure. **

On top of that, he’s overhauled the Department of Transportation to focus on climate change, accessibility and safety – **bringing this department into the 21st century and advocating for more resilient and sustainable infrastructure that we'll benefit from for DECADES. **
_**Transportation is what brings us all together – literally. **_We think Secretary Buttigieg has done a fantastic job so far, but we need to know if top Democrats like you agree, friend. Please, before our poll closes, share your thoughts:

name: Read/Act News
subject: As described in the Declaration
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-vb4CWMVfNNILImlR9IA)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, One of the best parts of my job at Hillsdale College is seeing Americans across the country engage with the profound truths of our nation's founding documents, including the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution. We care deeply about educating all Americans about our founding principles. That's why we spent months working on our course, **"Introduction to the Constitution."**
---
| | And right now, a limited number of copies of this course are available on DVD for you to add to your library or give as a gift. When you take [**"Introduction to the Constitution,"**](http://trk.readactnews.-ATFac18uEzQjZCA) you'll learn about:
* The natural rights theory of America's founding.
* The meaning of the Declaration and Constitution.
* The crisis of the Civil War.
* The progressive rejection of the founding.
* The nature and form of modern liberalism.

This course was one of the first we recorded in a new style that allows you to look inside one of our classes and follow discussions led by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._mVVxRk9XSBUP_GQ)
---
| | If you want a sample of what classes are like at Hillsdale, this DVD box set will give you that experience, but from the comfort of your own home. You can reserve your DVD box set of **"Introduction to the Constitution" **by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to help expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below. _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-introduction-to-the-constitution/**](http://trk.readactnews.-h5A)_ But remember, we've only produced a limited number of copies, so please don't delay. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, One of the best parts of my job at Hillsdale College is seeing Americans across the country engage with the profound truths of our nation's founding documents, including the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution. We care deeply about educating all Americans about our founding principles. That's why we spent months working on our course, "Introduction to the Constitution." | | And right now, a limited number of copies of this course are available on DVD for you to add to your library or give as a gift. When you take you'll learn about: The natural rights theory of America's founding. The meaning of the Declaration and Constitution. The crisis of the Civil War. The progressive rejection of the founding. The nature and form of modern liberalism. This course was one of the first we recorded in a new style that allows you to look inside one of our classes and follow discussions led by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn. | | | If you want a sample of what classes are like at Hillsdale, this DVD box set will give you that experience, but from the comfort of your own home. You can reserve your DVD box set of "Introduction to the Constitution" **by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to help expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below. But remember, we've only produced a limited number of copies, so please don't delay. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

| | As the son of a union power line worker, I am honored to receive the endorsement of the Communications Workers of America's Pacific Northwest Labor Council. Here is what they have to say about my campaign: _On behalf of the Communications Workers of America's Pacific Northwest Labor Council, we would like to congratulate you on receiving our endorsement for Representative of Washington's 2nd Congressional District._ **_The CWA Pacific Northwest Labor Council voted to endorse your candidacy based on your commitment to the issues most important to working families._** I grew up in a union household and know firsthand the benefits of union membership. Our family had health insurance. My father earned a decent wage, and his union negotiated cost-of-living wage increases. He saved money for retirement, so he and my mother did not have to worry about their aging years. And, all of us kids had the opportunity to go to college. **In short, my father's union membership afforded him the dignity that all workers deserve.** Growing up in a union household is one of the reasons I stand steadfastly with unions today. Decades of corporate assaults on unions has led to declining union membership. This assault on unions is, quite simply, an assault on American workers. It is no coincidence that declining union membership has gutted the middle class. I am running for Congress to restore power to our unions and stem the tide of economic disparity. **[Chip in $5 today to tip the economic scale back towards workers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042246/348572979/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-02-cwa&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4abafbe6-97e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhZmJlNi05N2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PxPzGkruUdPhMAWJvyxqKDyYbD146Tsl60JmF4-KNg=)** [DONATE NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042247/348572980/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-02-cwa&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4abafbe6-97e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhZmJlNi05N2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PxPzGkruUdPhMAWJvyxqKDyYbD146Tsl60JmF4-KNg=) Our economy favors those at the top – at the expense of workers everywhere. Americans today save less because wages do not keep pace with the costs of housing, food, and gas. Medical debt and student loan debt have decimated an entire generation's economic prospects. **[That is why our campaign seeks to kick special interests out of politics with our local grassroots movement. Donate $5 today and join our movement to reclaim our politics from special interests and balance our economic scales.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042248/348572981/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-02-cwa&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4abafbe6-97e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWJhZmJlNi05N2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PxPzGkruUdPhMAWJvyxqKDyYbD146Tsl60JmF4-KNg=)** Because of Maggie’s hard work, our elections are admired nationwide for their transparency, accessibility, and integrity. We're watching other states roll back hard-won civil and voting rights protections. New Mexico is going in the opposite direction – and that begins with keeping our elections free and fair.
Onward,

Fight Back @ Team MTO
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042582/348574570/-532505380?refcode=EM_F_220602Primary1_E_FB_90DO_5_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmM2MWFhMy05OWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Yp2d-pKYEjZdgPH_Sbc48IaFcbD23hRI481F2p8efM=)**_

clean_body: Keep New Mexico’s elections free and fair. Team, we have LESS THAN ONE WEEK until New Mexico's Primary Election. We need to come out of this election looking strong against our anti-democracy opponent.= = Make no mistake, anti-democracy candidates are already on the ballot this year. Here in New Mexico, we cannot let them roll back all the progress we have fought for by conspiracy theorists who are more concerned with promoting their party than upholding the will of the people. We must fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Because of Maggie’s hard work, our elections are admired nationwide for their transparency, accessibility, and integrity. We're watching other states roll back hard-won civil and voting rights protections. New Mexico is going in the opposite direction – and that begins with keeping our elections free and fair. Onward, Fight Back @ Team MTO Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> ___= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Please, take my pledge to vote for Democrats in 2022. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042680/348574823/823540626?refcode=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc0MjRlMy05OWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wQBASSD1ZKsvYmlDx2ZLEwK1N1i95_1wGGE6JuwBjo=&emci=5f89712e-f2e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Every month, I like to take the opportunity to extend my thanks. Your generous support always ensures that our fundraising efforts are successful and that we have the financial strength we need to further our mission for North Carolina. With your help, our team is already hard at work supporting Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. But I need to ask more of you, and this time, I’m not asking you to donate. **Peter, please take my pledge right now to vote for Democratic candidates in the November 2022 elections.** | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042681/348574824/1033634442?refcode=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc0MjRlMy05OWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wQBASSD1ZKsvYmlDx2ZLEwK1N1i95_1wGGE6JuwBjo=&emci=5f89712e-f2e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
---
You see, our candidates cannot win unless you and your family (and anyone else you can convince) actually vote — no matter how much grassroots funding they receive.
We have work to do here in North Carolina and in Washington, and it can only happen if we elect Democrats who share our priorities.
If you’re committed to our fight for reproductive rights, voting rights, environmental protections, and more, it’s absolutely essential that each and every one of you casts a ballot in our critical midterm elections.
**Let me know you’re in this fight with me by pledging to cast your ballot in the midterm elections.**
[PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46042682/348574825/1033634442?refcode=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc0MjRlMy05OWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0wQBASSD1ZKsvYmlDx2ZLEwK1N1i95_1wGGE6JuwBjo=&emci=5f89712e-f2e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7f7424e3-99e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
---
I appreciate it,
Roy

If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See Who Filed for Office?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=1)
---
Friend, Tuesday was the candidate filing deadline and I'm happy to report that there are many pro-liberty candidates running for the Minnesota House and Senate. But the real exciting part is that some of the heroic people we came to know during COVID tyranny, have decided to step up and run for office.
# Lisa Hanson
Lisa is the courageous bistro owner in Albert Lea that DEFIED Governor Walz' illegal and unconstitutional lockdowns. She REFUSED to let the tyrants trample on her rights and took a stand that ultimately landed her in jail. She inspires me each and every day!
# Nurse Ashley Burg
Ashley is a nurse and one of the great everyday people that pushed back against the unethical mandates. One of the principles in medicine is that patients have a choice. She stood up for us all by saying these medical procedures should be voluntary. Her and other nurses started a massively successful Facebook group that had over 50,000 members before Big Tech shut it down.
#
# Larvita McFarquhar
What can we say besides "JUSTICE FOR LARVITA!". That was the mantra we had at the end of 2020. Larvita is a single, black mother of four beautiful daughters who also refused to give into tyranny. She said she had to take a stand to teach her daughters to stand up for what is right, even if prevailing winds are doing wrong. She got many Fox News hits about her story and inspired patriots far and wide to also push back. What do all these ladies have in common besides being hugely courageous and inspiring tens of thousands of patriots? They're all running against weak Republican politicians who REFUSE to co-sign the **Never Again bill** that would put an end to Unilateral Governor's Emergency Powers. And all of them started spending billions of your surplus money. Like so many politicians, it takes people stepping up to the plate to say, "If you won't represent us by co-signing the Never Again bill, pushing for a vote and passing it, we'll get someone who will." You see, politicians care about three things:
1. Election
2. Re-election
3. Election to higher office

**And unless grassroots patriots show a real threat to their power and their path to those things, we will not be taken seriously and we will not be represented.** Years ago it was unheard of that good people would stand up and challenge the Political Class. Now it's happening in droves all over the state. There are challenges from the Canadian border all the way to the Iowa border. And everywhere in-between. The Political Class is getting worried about the challenge to their power. **Nearly half of Republican Senate seats have primary challengers this year because these senators refuse to represent We The People.** But it's not just Weak Republican politicians who are in trouble - Far-left Democrats in vulnerable seats have challenges this year as well. The real question that needs to be asked is: How many political careers and politicians losing their seats will it take for legislators to realize they better fight for us or they will pay the ultimate political price? But the road to challenging the Political Class isn't easy. We've heard that some of these candidates have been intimidated and threatened with erroneous legal actions. The tricks of the repugnant Political Class is on full display! I'm happy to tell you though that these candidates are warriors. And I can't thank them enough for stepping up to the plate! We need more good people running for office to join Rep Erik Mortensen in St Paul. This is a critically important election. If we want to make sure tyrannical emergency powers and mandates **Never Happen Again** , we need fresh blood representing us in St Paul...not the same old Career Politicians who have failed us.
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=2 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=2)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_who_filed&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Our recount and our movement’s next primary
body:
My fellow Justice Democrat, Kina Collins, is running a grassroots campaign to take on the political machine in Illinois' 7th Congressional District.
#
Peter,
We’re still in our race because our movement came together to support this campaign with grassroots contributions and volunteering. Our fight is not over yet.
My fellow Justice Democrat, Kina Collins, is running a grassroots campaign to take on the political machine in Illinois’ 7th Congressional District. I am proud to support her campaign and I am so thankful that Kina and her team supported our campaign by making calls to voters to help defeat Henry Cuellar.
[Will you please split a $3 contribution to help us get every vote counted in TX-28 and fuel Kina’s upcoming primary election?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110165?refcode=em20220602-23654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd) Kina’s primary is in just 4 weeks and she needs the resources to reach voters all across Chicago.
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110165?refcode=em20220602-23654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd)**
Kina witnessed a shooting in front of her home on the West Side of Chicago when she was a child. As a survivor and activist, she has fought her whole life to stop gun violence in her community and across the country. She led the largest gun violence prevention organization in Illinois.
Kina will be a progressive champion for the people of IL-07. Like myself, Kina has been fighting against corporate-funded Super PACs and the political establishment.
Showing up for her community is who Kina is. Whether it was the fight to hold Rahm Emanuel accountable or standing with organizers, union workers, and gun violence survivors every week. Kina will always choose to fight for her community.
**The people of IL-07 deserve a representative who will fight for them, not corporations. And that’s Kina.** [With Kina’s primary in just 4 weeks, will you split a $3 contribution between our recount and her primary right now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110165?refcode=em20220602-23654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd)
Thank you,
Jessica Cisneros

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220602-23654-footer&t=24&refcode2=23654_1203867_7QHUnd&akid=23654%2E1203867%2E7QHUnd)**
---

Thank you, Jessica Cisneros Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The truth comes out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter,

It's time to drain the swamp.

**A judge appointed by Barack Obama oversaw a jury stacked with Hillary Clinton donors acquitting Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussman on charges of lying to the FBI in his role in helping spread lies about Donald Trump colluding with Russians during the 2016 campaign.**

As long as Nancy Pelosi remains in power, the cover-up about Hillary Clinton's treasonous plot to stage the real coup against Donald Trump will stay out of reach for accountability.

I appeared on Tucker Carlson's show to discuss the latest bombshell in Russiagate.

The law firm that Hillary Clinton hired during the 2016 campaign and which paid for the Christopher Steele dirty dossier housed a working room for Deep State FBI agents.

**I hope you'll take a few moments to watch my interview on Tucker Carlson's show, where I expose the next layer of the swamp's corruption.**

**[After watching the video, please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250, so I can elect America First conservatives that will join me in voting for Donald Trump as the next Speaker of the House](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r) [**WATCH MATT GAETZ
DROP A BOMBSHELL**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r) **FBI agents worked side by side with Hillary Clinton's goons as they planted lies about Donald Trump and Russia in the fake news media.**

The Sussmann acquittal shows you, and I cannot trust a jury handpicked with Democrats from the D.C. swamp to deliver justice.

I know the only way to expose the crimes committed against Donald Trump and the American people is to haul Hillary Clinton and her Deep State co-conspirators before Congress and demand they answer questions under oath.

**And the only one I trust to follow through and hit the Clinton crime family with Congressional subpoenas is Speaker Donald Trump.**

**[But I need your help to make that happen](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r).**

So please watch my interview with Tucker Carlson, where I break the news about the latest Russiagate bombshell.

**After you watch my interview with Tucker, please[chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r), so I can lead the first to fire Nancy Pelosi and elect an America First majority that will join me in voting for Donald Trump for Speaker of the House. [**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN BELOW TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r) | | | [ Chip in $5 >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60261627:W-_5Y8hNw:m:1:2365227053:CE061244E757E0D2AE168EE45C3604C8:r) |

name: Wes Moore
subject: I want to thank you
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46043627/348578961/72861625?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220602thankyou_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWY2M2FmZC05ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLQGKtzKzANZXcT4coaeqyLCD25gw1lvw9GWo_L4vso=)
---
Team, I want to thank you, once again, from the bottom of my heart. With your support, we crushed our May fundraising goal, putting us on a positive path to the July 19 primary election here in Maryland. We’re hosting more events, knocking doors in more neighborhoods, giving out more yard signs, and meeting with more voters — all thanks to your grassroots contributions. Now that June is here, we’ve got to make sure we keep our foot on the gas and continue to move this incredible, people-powered movement all the way to victory in both the July primary and November general elections. Our next filing deadline is fast approaching on June 7 — and once it passes, our fundraising numbers up to this point will go public for all to see. **[With that in mind, can you spare $10 or more today to help us reach our next goal by Tuesday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46043628/348578962/72861625?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220602thankyou_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWY2M2FmZC05ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLQGKtzKzANZXcT4coaeqyLCD25gw1lvw9GWo_L4vso=)** | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46043629/348578963/72861625?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220602thankyou_wm_60da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWY2M2FmZC05ZGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLQGKtzKzANZXcT4coaeqyLCD25gw1lvw9GWo_L4vso=)
---
Thank you again for everything you do to move this campaign and our state forward.
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---

name: Team Sinema
subject: LGBTQ+ rights are human rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, We’re joining LGBTQ+ Pride celebrations in Arizona and around the country to mark how far we’ve come in our work to build dignity, respect, and support for every LGBTQ+ American. While our efforts to ensure equality for all Americans continue year-round, there is much work left to do. Every American should be treated equally regardless of who they are or who they love. We’ll keep working in Washington to project LGBTQ+ rights across the country because _LGBTQ+ rights are human rights_. Kyrsten is an original cosponsor of the _Equality Act_ , which would explicitly prevent discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity, and extend civil rights protections in the workplace, housing, education, and other federally funded areas. **Every LGBTQ+ American deserves to live without fear of discrimination. We must all take a stand, use our voices, and continue working to achieve equality for all.** [**Today, and every day, please join us in reaffirming your commitment to LGBTQ+ rights and help advance freedom and equality for all Americans. Sign your name next to Kyrsten’s >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46043926/348580095/-1474082766?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWJiMzg0NS05ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwusJEJvOPf64s_rTZn68hdssXiDGrFJ2MHzAAJNUBI=&emci=5cbb3845-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=5ebb3845-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2415496) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46043927/348580096/-1474082766?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWJiMzg0NS05ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwusJEJvOPf64s_rTZn68hdssXiDGrFJ2MHzAAJNUBI=&emci=5cbb3845-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=5ebb3845-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2415496)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWkz3b8hfN

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only
take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives-but
supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we
elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the
Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWkz3b8hfN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent
matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but
the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by
progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to
change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do
away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our
Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a
National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to
me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more
clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning
this issue-views we will make available to policymakers and
opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on
Presidential Selection by using the link below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

For most of our nation's history, the
Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution,
was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to
preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have
joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional
bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution
has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to
provide young people with a proper grounding in American
civics-too many Americans simply don't understand the importance
of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has
expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide,
directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the
Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide
through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The
Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over 5.6 million households and
businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of
liberty;

Promoting constitutional education
through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of
America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across
America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education
through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which
launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools
nationwide.

Your answers to the National Survey on
Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most
effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the
importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this
critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent
topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection
and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a
few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure
link I've provided below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

And after you take your survey, I hope you
will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing
truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its
extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is
essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the
National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for
your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of
liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWkz3b8hfN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

**This is HUGE:**** Election experts are saying Val Demings is our BEST hope at flipping Florida's Senate seat blue – and if she wins, ****Democrats will have a better shot at holding Senate control.**
This is no exaggeration, friend. Republicans are spending up a storm to keep Florida red,_ _ and Val Demings is our LAST shot at stopping them from succeeding.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46044377/348582297/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3264-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY0NGI4NS05ZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8pzGXdW1Nvi6HXtTxnF7uOg-pdfgp0WyWPVE8exfkw=)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Here’s the action we’re calling for
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Many of you have asked: what are we hoping Congress will do in the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, Texas?
#

Friends -
Many of you have asked: what are we hoping Congress will do in the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, Texas?
We’ll share that below, and then we want to ask you to make your voices heard on these issues:
1\. **Pass universal background checks** : The Senate needs to pass gun background checks on all sales. This foundational gun safety policy is broadly popular and underpins many other gun safety laws. The House has passed this legislation, now it’s the Senate’s turn to do its job.
2\. **Confirm an ATF director** : The Senate must swiftly confirm Steve Dettelbach as the next director of the ATF so that the agency is better equipped to enforce our nation’s gun laws, combat illegal gun trafficking, and hold the gun industry accountable.
3\. **Keep moving forward with bold executive actions from the Biden Administration** : President Biden led the gun violence prevention efforts after the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting. He ran on gun safety. It’s time for the Administration to develop a comprehensive strategy for executive actions relating to gun violence and public safety.
Every day, we are in touch with members of Congress on these issues and more. And every day we are asked if the desire for change has waned since Uvalde and Buffalo the week before.
We want to tell them NO. People are demanding action because action means saving lives. So please:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition saying you support universal background checks, confirmation of Steve Dettelbach for ATF Director, and bold executive action on gun safety from the Biden Administration.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220602-1-subs&t=1&akid=2097%2E3935704%2Ee5q_By)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220602-1-subs&t=2&akid=2097%2E3935704%2Ee5q_By)**
We know that there are many evidence-based policies that can help prevent mass shootings and school shootings. It’s time to get them done.
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220602-1-subs&t=3&akid=2097%2E3935704%2Ee5q_By)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2097%2E3935704%2Ee5q_By) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: I appreciate your support so much, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
I grew up in Barrio Logan. From a young age, I knew I wanted to spend my life fighting for people like the ones I grew up with.
From my time as a community organizer, to my work on the San Diego City Council, to now, that's always been my main priority.
That's why I'm so glad to have you on my team, friend. I wouldn't have been able to do any of this if it wasn't for the support of folks like you. Together, I know we can build a more just and equitable California.
Election Day is just five days away. Your donation helps my field team (the people I'm in the photo with below!) knock on more doors and get our message out to undecided voters. Can you help them keep going by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays]
http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly [http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly] http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80 [http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80] https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.
Can you give now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_Footer]

Peter, I was proud to join my friends at Newsmax on Memorial Day to talk about how my service in the U.S. Navy inspired my run for Congress.

---
[](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9fe96629624e4dd984c3537706ac4906&_e=WGU14VnK-2suOlthIr-m1sU07_Eohn0Mb-ZBriY-jDh-kom5SPVrPB35781UZg6uNwC3mXU9_Xo7T8eH8mMExC-iXA6sAwPDLlMdY6-VG2EvclIQSqsj9seBwu_e8D8jop55v30fZwzZDHUjfTE5vGQa4iBbgOfITO26BH9ZAMDHPpdUlxSjSGvX-8xwJ6sqjH12jxEBxxpHz1Alzlpa1Npw8vU3S862oqnZeoGz1K8PTblTP_vFVVZPOnl-MmsEdhQTYmuCrU668Wlfq4BKsdrVgVAkbQBy59J_wyf8e0GHAQh9FPelW_0wrpBgsXooBhCfoKVupglpBYXOOrRIdCF747RlBXi87YeRaLHNGfoysurjF8CrCLvWyWwFYFg6-NQCMqLzR4RUMt3cnRrkDBAhHX-UMV6-KU-LtxfoMJs%3D)
---
I saw the destruction of socialism as a young child in Vietnam. We woke up every day wondering if it was our last because my father was brave enough to speak out about the evil regime.

_But then, we were fortunate enough to legally come to the United States._

I pledged to never let this great country go down the path of Communist Vietnam, so I graduated from the U.S. Naval Academy and fought terrorists in the most dangerous corners of the world.

**But now, I’m watching AMERICAN CITIZENS try to push the same dangerous socialist ideology that almost got my family killed.**

_I didn’t put my life on the line for this country to watch it fall to the radical Left._

[**I’m fighting to ensure America is NEVER a socialist country, and I need your help. clean_body: I was proud to join my friends at Newsmax on Memorial Day to talk about how my service in the U.S. Navy inspired my run for Congress.| | | Peter, I was proud to join my friends at Newsmax on Memorial Day to talk about how my service in the U.S. Navy inspired my run for Congress. I saw the destruction of socialism as a young child in Vietnam. We woke up every day wondering if it was our last because my father was brave enough to speak out about the evil regime. But then, we were fortunate enough to legally come to the United States. I pledged to never let this great country go down the path of Communist Vietnam, so I graduated from the U.S. Naval Academy and fought terrorists in the most dangerous corners of the world. But now, I’m watching AMERICAN CITIZENS try to push the same dangerous socialist ideology that almost got my family killed. I didn’t put my life on the line for this country to watch it fall to the radical Left. In Liberty, | | CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)Former Navy Special OperationsCandidate, U.S. House (VA-10) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Cao for Congress

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this [form.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508427:6AlfY9ohN:m:1:3299561967:C8B51AB8D462FC49E04C843A68E1C49D:r) To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508432:6AlfY9ohN:m:1:3299561967:C8B51AB8D462FC49E04C843A68E1C49D:r) The Promotion begins on Monday, May 16th, 2022, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Thursday, June 2nd, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST June 2nd 2022. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Westchester NY hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump with Dinner provided, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,400. Additional restrictions apply as outlined in these Rules. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [Official Rules.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508433:6AlfY9ohN:m:1:3299561967:C8B51AB8D462FC49E04C843A68E1C49D:r) The Sponsor is Elise for Congress, PO Box 500, Glens Falls, NY 12801.

I wanted to take a moment and say thank you for all your support. Because of you, our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the general election was a huge success. None of this would be possible without the support of this grassroots team, and I am so grateful to have you on my side in this fight. From the bottom of my heart: Thank you. I have no doubt that together, we will win this race and deliver real change for Northeast Ohio. –Emilia

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Cruelty, incompetence, and corruption
body:
Dear Derek,
Last week made it more clear than ever that if we care about protecting the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want every child in this state to be healthy and happy, if we want to safeguard those who are closest to us from violent crime and gun violence, then we must overcome and defeat Greg Abbott.
After each mass shooting in Texas, he has promised solutions but provided none. In fact, he’s made it easier for violent criminals to carry guns on our streets and set the stage for more tragedies like Uvalde, Midland-Odessa, El Paso, Santa Fe and Sutherland Springs.
And if anyone still gave him the benefit of the doubt, he cleared that up Tuesday night when he read the details of the school shooting to the press like he was reading the weather forecast and then, instead of traveling the 245 miles to Uvalde to be with grieving families, he chose to travel 300 miles in the opposite direction to a fundraiser. He was literally counting dollars while first responders in Uvalde were counting bodies.
Who does that? Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press conference feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent the next tragedy?
It’s the exact same guy who bans women from making their own health care decisions in a state with one of the highest rates of maternal mortality in the developed world, and sets a $10,000 bounty on the back of any Texan who helps any woman seek an abortion.
It’s the same person who does nothing after being told repeatedly by a Federal judge that his Child Protective Services is understaffed and unaccountable, and that children emerge from the foster care system “more damaged than when they entered.” Over 100 Texas kids have died in Abbott’s child welfare system since 2020. Instead of fixing it, he’d rather try to scare you about transgender kids and prosecute their loving parents.
It’s the same governor who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat running in the energy capital of the world, causing more than 700 Texans — including children — to die because he cared more about his donors’ profits than about fixing the grid after being warned it could fail.
We must overcome his cruelty, incompetence and corruption if we are going to save lives and allow our children to live without the constant fear of being murdered in their schools, supermarkets, and places of worship; or be left to fend for themselves in a foster care system that has gone from bad to worse on his watch.
We overcome that by beating Greg Abbott in November.
Help me by ensuring we have the resources to reach every Texas voter and ensure they know the cost and consequence of keeping Abbott in office, and our opportunity to choose a better future for ourselves and our kids. Split a contribution between our campaign and CommonGood today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220602_CGVA_Beto]
Your help makes our victory possible.
Thank you,
Beto

| | | |

Two years ago, Maura Healey responded to looting and rioting in cities across our country (including Boston) by saying, "Yes, America is burning, but that's how forests grow."
Her callous indifference to the plight of our inner cities and the people who live and work there is as inexcusable now as it was two years ago.
Please help Geoff make sure Maura Healey and her progressive policies never get to control the Governor's Office.

name: Cindy Banyai
subject: I broke my leg in 3 places
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC3-DK4Z78BRJqQKESaXaqjR8g2RJbFZQPvOLZMonjmwwLaTvtIsRc9b3mz_v5zeVjvJyUBtDswpd9ghucsaeerHuh0Ad6BikFa9BD_ePI-Tj55sqmmBypVQrM2U7z-Hwhhn6aI1jSA-ugQsCkGa_uGbe8AAF7qnflsnw53-7ocdJ9Y0BCjRoiTE895bRxJD0KgISG2HcTeSbpa3q-DMMzGABR1_QB6ib_Wardof93sS3apaqw6H-nBumsWdU5aV5g/3mk/nc08-8FlRLq6fkS9NK7uaA/h0/0d3JlYTCaYiu_Idm3LBeRNaLKUieLjzL1H3J5f2gNwc)
---
Friend, Over the holiday weekend, I had the misfortune of breaking my leg in three places. I saw my youngest being pulled under our boat and immediately my mama bear instincts kicked in and I jumped into action.
---
|
---
I am thankful that I was able to get my daughter to safety and that my injuries were not more extensive. So, I'll be slowing down to take care of myself for a minute, but am sure I'll be back in action in no time! Unfortunately, in today's political world, fully pausing our campaign is not an option. In order to beat Byron Donalds in November, every day counts. There are only 16 days left for me to gather the required 2,500 signatures to get on the ballot, or I will be required to pay $10,000. My team and I have been working diligently over the past few months to gather as many signatures as possible, however we're still a couple hundred short. With my recent injury, I will be unable to continue reaching out to the community until I have healed a bit more. **[Will you help ensure that my name is on the ballot by donating $25, $50, or $100 today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrI_tbP2DwU-kUfkEvGTwq574Gdl-_YFvVG7Gf4_fK3RKf5YSNfRVhDLmSKBtxCqboMReruHVkmVJQnAO3QdjH2l-98XNuy7TptK040lgwt8LoUfFFNoPgUHwiz_RXGvCyumBwO3yGxQflWLdKuf9DDVPQOAe7m-Z5WO5eAMdxq_WD1lAwsKoFyBiGYtKt4EDQhNovrbKDYK90dE391454rEi31OeSDfOQ9F9t7vxt3p7ZU9atiyPtp1LibFkoXisc_iGifLPVjpK7RN8bneNNl48hE7yKVYw4bRgACqYhypmk3cnsFzEBTchDrvMYipkJSvWN1S40z1IrNirLXZUusIRL6r7MaXNASWItljwUGM_AR56njtPEpd_J3VS3pUwOr2SBMPv-w8QUZkOeLr5_/3mk/nc08-8FlRLq6fkS9NK7uaA/h1/Bmz1KKxPkQqfUFTc94SlC8P_gZmT9DLhHDwRo-V6TSg) **

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Flipping Arizona is clearly one of McConnell’s top priorities right now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

$3.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today to help re-elect Mark Kelly this November.
Last year, more than 200,000 people contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. It’s a number we’re VERY proud of.
But it’s a different race today. If Democrats lose even one Senate seat, we could wake up on November 9 with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
And National Republicans know this too. That’s why the NRSC spent $1,000,000 in attack ads against Mark in just ONE WEEK with plans to spend at least $8,000,000 more — and we don’t even have an opponent yet.
So, flipping Arizona — a seat we won by only 2.4 points in 2020 — is clearly one of McConnell’s top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and we know that this is only the beginning. It’s going to take a BIG team to hold this seat. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation to help Mark hold this seat? We have to be ready for whatever comes next.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220602-1-7&t=1&akid=2968%2E6688874%2EWvhAZ_)

name: T.W. Shannon
subject: Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by T.W
body:
| | | Peter, We're hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. _But let me tell you what our nation needs to hear right now._ **America 's young men and women need hope -- and better role models. But the Woke Left can't stop corrupting our children with perverted ideas like:**
* You can change your gender to whatever you feel like it.
* Killing an unborn child is "healthcare."
* America is an irredeemable "racist" country.

---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507646:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)
---
| | **My name is T.W. Shannon. I 'm a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. ** I've spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507647:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)
---
[**SUPPORT T.W. SHANNON >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507647:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma's fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students' skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients - which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507647:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)
---
Even though I've been successful in the legislative arena, I've also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets - an accomplishment I'm extremely proud of.
**What makes my story so remarkable, Peter, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is**** _impossible, yet here I am!_**
---
[**SEND A PROVEN LEADER TO DC**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507647:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)
---
**Peter, I 'm running for the U.S. Senate so I can take on the woke Left, tell our kids the truth about America, and fight for the America First agenda.** **[Can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60507647:JDOsb9omN:m:1:3317145305:E08AD121E1DBA3F891010FB251D4A0D5:r)**

subject: A few articles that I think you should read
disclaimer_text:
