Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

The fight for free and fair elections is one of the top storylines of this year and Michigan is at the center of it. Every week, we are learning more about our organized and increasingly anti-democratic opposition and the election lies that are motivating them. I listed a few articles I've read recently that have helped me understand the importance of this moment. Check them out and share with your friends and family.

- Liz

A Politico investigation shows that partisan operatives are training an "army" of poll watchers to monitor our elections and report their findings to local district attorney's. This is more evidence of an organized partisan assault on the integrity of our elections. >> https://www.politico.com/news/2022/06/01/gop-contest-elections-tapes-00035758

The Detroit Free Press details Kristina Karamo's dangerous rhetoric and her role in the nationwide movement to overturn the 2020 election. This article explains exactly the stakes of why Jocelyn must defeat Karamo in November

>> https://www.freep.com/story/news/politics/2022/05/31/kristina-karamo-michigan-secretary-state-trump-jocelyn-benson/9963197002/

We're already seeing false claims of election fraud this election cycle. Read this CNN explainer on the crazy conspiracy Trump is talking about in Georgia. >>https://www.cnn.com/2022/06/01/politics/trump-kemp-gop-primary-voter-fraud-conspiracy/index.html]

Friend,

This is _outrageous._

The Biden Administration just canceled a planned oil and gas lease sale in Alaska. **This decision will be disastrous for everyday Americans.** At a time when gas prices are skyrocketing, we should be drilling MORE, not LESS.

Make no mistake. _**Joe Biden wants YOU to pay more for gas**_ while promoting his insane green energy policies. The number one thing we can do to decrease gas prices is increase drilling in America, but Biden REFUSES to do it.

We need to send a message to Biden and the rest of the radical Left in Washington that we are FED UP with their ridiculous green agenda. I'm asking you to sign my campaign's official petition to tell Biden to reverse the decision to stop drilling in Alaska.

_**[Add your name to the list in the NEXT HOUR to stand with me and tell Biden to DRILL MORE in Alaska.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkft89mccu5u1di8oosafqnr4thg60g7n2bop28_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chieapj3c3h2bs)**_

The price at the pump is getting out of control, and we all know whose fault it is, Friend. **It's time to hold Joe Biden accountable.**

My team is sending this petition to Washington soon. I need YOU to add your name in the next hour to make sure that Biden and the Democrats know that it's time to DRILL in America.

**[Sign the petition in the NEXT HOUR to tell the radical Left you want MORE DRILLING in Alaska.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl1v7jmvbuirna64bcainphi047nunh9bqn9vj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chieapj3c3h2bs)**

The truth is, this election isn't about these emails.

It isn't about red or blue or Democrat or Republican.

It's not about me.

And it definitely isn't about Mike Garcia.

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Happy Pride Month! 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍⚧️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Here at the Fairness Project, we believe direct democracy is a vital tool to exercise our collective power. All of our fights are connected, whether that’s codifying abortion rights, raising wages, protecting access to the ballot box, or advancing LGBTQ+ justice. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46046219/348591020/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk3MmFiNi1hNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Vvv-u5f8LUt7KnM7bqyqZsJHqZyOk4M2bk4a0UppKQ=&emci=b1ac598b-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=fa972ab6-a6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=561582) | Happy Pride Month, friends! 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️ As we kick off the celebration this June, from all of us here at the Fairness Project, I wanted to send a note to all of our LGBTQ+ supporters: Please know that _we see you, we support you, and we will _always_ fight for you._ **We know that our work would not be possible without you!** And we are beyond grateful for your continued support. Here at the Fairness Project, **we believe direct democracy is a vital tool to exercise our collective power.** All of our fights are connected, whether that’s codifying abortion rights, raising wages, protecting access to the ballot box, or advancing LGBTQ+ justice. _When we uplift the most marginalized voices, especially those of queer and trans folks, we all rise. _ [_**As Pride Month begins, we wanted to share with you today some fantastic national organizations that help LGBTQ+ folks secure resources they may need.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46046220/348591021/-1790204528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk3MmFiNi1hNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Vvv-u5f8LUt7KnM7bqyqZsJHqZyOk4M2bk4a0UppKQ=&emci=b1ac598b-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=fa972ab6-a6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=561582) We’re in this fight for social and economic justice together and we couldn’t be more grateful to our supporters who have shown up to support our efforts to win ballot initiatives and improve lives across the country. From our team at the Fairness Project, Happy Pride Month, friend! Kelly Hall
_Executive Director
Fairness Project_
---

All of our fights are connected, whether that’s codifying abortion rights, raising wages, protecting access to the ballot box, or advancing LGBTQ+ justice. | | Happy Pride Month, friends! 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️ As we kick off the celebration this June, from all of us here at the Fairness Project, I wanted to send a note to all of our LGBTQ+ supporters: Please know that we see you, we support you, and we will always fight for you. We know that our work would not be possible without you! And we are beyond grateful for your continued support. Here at the Fairness Project, we believe direct democracy is a vital tool to exercise our collective power. All of our fights are connected, whether that’s codifying abortion rights, raising wages, protecting access to the ballot box, or advancing LGBTQ+ justice. When we uplift the most marginalized voices, especially those of queer and trans folks, we all rise. We’re in this fight for social and economic justice together and we couldn’t be more grateful to our supporters who have shown up to support our efforts to win ballot initiatives and improve lives across the country. From our team at the Fairness Project, Happy Pride Month, friend! name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: a personal thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
This campaign means so much to me – as a parent, a Missourian, and an American – and none of it would be possible without your support.
| | |
---
Peter, it's Trudy. I have a couple of spare minutes between campaign events, and I wanted to reach out to personally thank you for believing in my campaign.
**This campaign means so much to me – as a parent, a Missourian, and an American – and none of it would be possible without your support.** When I say thank you, I really, sincerely mean it.
I know that our movement is still in its early days. There's a long road ahead of us, but if we put in the work required, there's nothing we can't do. Folks here in Missouri are ready to elect a senator who will make sure that Washington works for them. **Together, we are going to end the opioid crisis, work for Missouri families, and bring real compassion and kindness back to Washington. **
But none of that will happen if we don't band together. **So please, if you haven't yet weighed in on my race, now is your chance!** **[Our campaign strategy survey will still be open for a few more hours – so can you take a minute right now to share your opinion and make your voice heard? As one of my very first supporters, it's so important that I hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046255/348591363/621711743?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk45-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ3MTJlYy1hNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJfNqW0tcT0EaNJcoIrAk6RkE5xb8bAkLpO0pOs-8Cs=&emci=c04d41fe-81e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=094712ec-a6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4450063)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: I had a dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I’m sharing my unredacted, personal story with you.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znv271ounel9qo499slrumll7letgtcc3q69d53g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ueom6tllm5j79or2m9oe8tr2edi74d1heiq60olkmcr74dr0slom1o70spi3cdpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqr1o3ncpj3ao5jc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c5i69or1c9h649fg)

|
---
| | |
Friend, I just wanted to take a moment and share with you what I've been reflecting on in the past few days.

I was looking through some old photos, and I feel so incredibly lucky to be where I am today.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhk07hsgrtrktbge469do2eglvvsd7j8o9nb658_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie6ob2c9h2bs)
---

In this picture, I was a young boy growing up in South Carolina. I had no idea what life had in store for me.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mom, my brother, and me into their home when my parents split up. My mom worked long and hard hours each and every day to put food on the table.

My wonderful mom and grandparents stressed the importance of an education - even though my grandfather never learned how to read. They knew an education was the closest thing to magic and a ticket to the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjn49b1nckl2odb8casp6k0mt2pvkqrj7j3h9u88_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie6ob2c9h2bs)
---

Here's me playing football in high school. I had dreams of playing for the Dallas Cowboys when I was older. I'd be able to buy my mom a house, so we wouldn't have to bounce from apartment to apartment like we did when I was young.

It was simple: football was my ticket out, and a chance to give back to my mom for all the love and support she showed me.

But then, because life often does not go the way we expect, my dream was shattered.

I fell asleep behind the wheel of her old AMC Gremlin and flipped it. I nearly died in the wreck and lost myself forever.

I had a dream that one day football would be my family's ticket to the American Dream, but it nearly killed me instead.

But as you might have guessed - my story didn't end there. The injuries I sustained in the car wreck kept me from playing big time college football, and I walked away from the game after realizing there was a better way.

In college I became a Christian, I dedicated myself to a life of meaningful service, and long story short...now I'm living my mother's American Dream.

With the help of some important mentors in my life and the grace of God, I discovered that I could use business and financial literacy to help many people improve their lives.

After a career in sales and insurance, I ran for political office in the Charleston area -- as a Republican.

Along the way, I became the first African-American elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern state in modern history.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4416b9f2jbrkcg0hbkvk6oq03r79jd8d2e9k320_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie6ob2c9h2bs)
---

Here's what I learned along the way: **Every American can achieve their own American Dream when given an equal opportunity, and when the government gets out of their way to let them do it.**

That's been my mission in the Senate from Day 1, and it will forever be my mission. I'm not here to shake hands and make friends with powerful people. I'm here to serve the American people and make sure they have the same opportunity for success I had.

But it's hard to do alone. You're reading this email because I know that you are a fighter and protector of the American Dream like me - so I'm asking for your help.

As election day draws closer and closer, I'm humbly asking you for your endorsement of me today. In order to continue to fight for the American dream, I need a grassroots team behind me. Your endorsement would mean the world to me:

---

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

clean_body: I’m sharing my unredacted, personal story with you. | | | | Friend, I just wanted to take a moment and share with you what I've been reflecting on in the past few days. I was looking through some old photos, and I feel so incredibly lucky to be where I am today. | In this picture, I was a young boy growing up in South Carolina. I had no idea what life had in store for me. When I was young, my grandparents took my mom, my brother, and me into their home when my parents split up. My mom worked long and hard hours each and every day to put food on the table. My wonderful mom and grandparents stressed the importance of an education - even though my grandfather never learned how to read. They knew an education was the closest thing to magic and a ticket to the American Dream. | Here's me playing football in high school. I had dreams of playing for the Dallas Cowboys when I was older. I'd be able to buy my mom a house, so we wouldn't have to bounce from apartment to apartment like we did when I was young. It was simple: football was my ticket out, and a chance to give back to my mom for all the love and support she showed me. But then, because life often does not go the way we expect, my dream was shattered. I fell asleep behind the wheel of her old AMC Gremlin and flipped it. I nearly died in the wreck and lost myself forever. I had a dream that one day football would be my family's ticket to the American Dream, but it nearly killed me instead. But as you might have guessed - my story didn't end there. The injuries I sustained in the car wreck kept me from playing big time college football, and I walked away from the game after realizing there was a better way. In college I became a Christian, I dedicated myself to a life of meaningful service, and long story short...now I'm living my mother's American Dream. With the help of some important mentors in my life and the grace of God, I discovered that I could use business and financial literacy to help many people improve their lives. After a career in sales and insurance, I ran for political office in the Charleston area -- as a Republican. Along the way, I became the first African-American elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern state in modern history. | Here's what I learned along the way: Every American can achieve their own American Dream when given an equal opportunity, and when the government gets out of their way to let them do it. That's been my mission in the Senate from Day 1, and it will forever be my mission. I'm not here to shake hands and make friends with powerful people. I'm here to serve the American people and make sure they have the same opportunity for success I had. But it's hard to do alone. You're reading this email because I know that you are a fighter and protector of the American Dream like me - so I'm asking for your help. As election day draws closer and closer, I'm humbly asking you for your endorsement of me today. In order to continue to fight for the American dream, I need a grassroots team behind me. Your endorsement would mean the world to me: | | | Thank you and God Bless America, Tim Scott | | | Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think. Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is frightening. If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come. But we can only do that with YOUR support. There is no one else** we can rely on at this point. name: SCOTUS Update
subject: A.G. Holder said it plainly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
“The Supreme Court was broken long before the leak”
|
---

---
A.G. Holder said it plainly, friend – “the Supreme Court was broken long before the leak” of Justice Alito’s draft decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health_.

**So where do we go from here?

Option 1:**
We give up. We assume that with the Supreme Court under the control of a conservative majority, nothing we do will be effective. Republicans immediately take advantage of our lack of fight and are able to hang on to their gerrymandered maps, reelect map manipulators, and elect judges who they believe will rubber stamp their gerrymanders. Our democracy is weakened even further.

**Option 2:
We keep fighting for our democracy – no matter what SCOTUS does.** The NDRC keeps working with our affiliates in courts, in the states, and at the ballot box to protect the right to vote and to have every vote count equally. We build on our wins to make redistricting even more fair, now and in the future. We return the power to the people, where it should be, and take it away from extremist politicians.

**Friend, what happens to our country depends on what option you choose. We know you’re a fighter – so will you make a donation to the NDRC to show that you’re still fighting for our freedom to vote and our democracy, no matter what SCOTUS does?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Gwen Moore
subject: the reason I get up every morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
It's an honor to be your voice in Congress.| | |
---
My Sisters and Brothers, Your continued support is the reason I get up every morning and work around the clock to deliver on our most important issues. As our hearts continue breaking for the loss of 21 tragic deaths in Texas just days ago, so many of you have asked how you can help. [**You’ll find a list of ways to support the families and the Uvalde here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046274/348591469/1918201252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQyMzUwZi1hN2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zBJyG6ssd9KPmh4UC8_KO_rieHCEZFSAuzbdtGNDZUw=&emci=f37379dd-9ee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e6d2350f-a7e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1486204) In no other industrialized nation in the world do mass shootings and gun violence take place at the extreme rate they do in the United States. Preventing gun violence deaths, including what happened in Texas and just hours ago in Oklahoma, shouldn’t be a political issue, and I’ll work with anyone, Democrat or Republican, to put a stop to it. It’s the honor of my life to serve you in Congress. I truly value your support, and I vow to do everything in my power to prevent senseless gun violence in our nation.
---

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Help elect a leader who is going to put Illinois first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I have an important request.
#
Illinois deserves leaders who are ready to fight for working families no matter the stakes, Peter,
That’s exactly why I’m supporting Nikki Budzinski for Illinois’ 13th District—**[and why I’m asking for your support, too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046352/348591835/934887430?refcode=dd_em_220602_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzBmMWY2Ni1hN2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bJHqB8ByMqTc-mokqMebXXpxBczQGDnyKghWs_JqtZo=)**
Nikki has spent her career as a public servant and labor advocate working for the people of Southern and Central Illinois. She’s fought to make education more accessible and affordable, to pass paid sick leave, to raise the minimum wage, and more.
We need more leaders like Nikki fighting for the issues that matter most in Washington.
If elected, I know Nikki’s going to continue delivering for working Illinoisans.
**[I’m for Nikki. Will you join me and chip in $5 now to help ensure that we send Nikki to Congress this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046353/348591836/934887430?refcode=dd_em_220602_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzBmMWY2Ni1hN2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bJHqB8ByMqTc-mokqMebXXpxBczQGDnyKghWs_JqtZo=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Let’s make history together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We can win the Georgia governorship, but it will take all of us working our hardest to get it done.
| | |
---
Friend,

In 2018, supporters like you fought our way to winning the most votes of any Democratic campaign in the history of Georgia state elections at the time.

In 2020, you put Georgia’s electoral votes in the blue column for the first time in nearly three decades, and you delivered two historic Senate runoff victories last year, electing Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock as our state’s first Jewish and Black senators, respectively.

Now, I’m asking you for the same level of vigor and determination as we work to deliver for Georgians in this time of crisis– and to make history again. We can win the governorship together and create One Georgia, but it will take all of us working our hardest to get it done.
**[Your support is indispensable to our campaign. Will you split $3 between Maggie Hassan's campaign and my campaign to help us kick off the next phase of our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046336/348591707/1257788923?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1000-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQ3MTJlYy1hNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mYbMEaI2FB6-HzcIEUoPclTIpodS_JvrL_uWAoixqM=)**

Whether you were part of our efforts since the early days of the 2018 campaign or you are just joining us for the first time, I’m so grateful for your support.

A year from now, we could be preparing to deliver results for the people of Georgia, to expand access to health care, and to increase opportunity across our state. But I know how much of your time, talent, and treasure winning this fight will require.

[So, friend, will you split a $3 contribution between Maggie Hassan's campaign and our campaign to fuel our fight for One Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046337/348591708/1257788923?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1000-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQ3MTJlYy1hNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mYbMEaI2FB6-HzcIEUoPclTIpodS_JvrL_uWAoixqM=)

Thank you so much for your support,

Stacey

In 2020, you put Georgia’s electoral votes in the blue column for the first time in nearly three decades, and you delivered two historic Senate runoff victories last year, electing Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock as our state’s first Jewish and Black senators, respectively. Now, I’m asking you for the same level of vigor and determination as we work to deliver for Georgians in this time of crisis– and to make history again. We can win the governorship together and create One Georgia, but it will take all of us working our hardest to get it done. = Whether you were part of our efforts since the early days of the 2018 campaign or you are just joining us for the first time, I’m so grateful for your support. A year from now, we could be preparing to deliver results for the people of Georgia, to expand access to health care, and to increase opportunity across our state. But I know how much of your time, talent, and treasure winning this fight will require. = Thank you so much for your support, Stacey = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Beto for Texas
subject: No other option.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We have to win political power. There is no other option.
#
Following the tragedy in Uvalde, Beto took a break from campaigning to be on the ground with this community. We also halted our fundraising efforts, including emails like this one asking for grassroots donations. It was the right thing to do as we focused on supporting those in Uvalde and people across Texas.
But the reality is that if we want to finally save lives and get our state on the right track, then we have to win political power. There is no other option.
[Will you contribute $3 right now to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott? If we want to put the people of this state first, then we have to do everything possible to win this race.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220602.tsLdyy&refcode=ema20220602-192093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220602.tsLdyy&refcode=ema20220602-192093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)**
Greg Abbott has spent the last seven years hurting the people of Texas. He has outright refused to put the lives and livelihoods of Texans first — from his deadly power grid failure and his foster care crisis in which kids have been trafficked, to his attacks on teachers, transgender kids, and a woman’s freedom to control her own body, health care, and future.
Abbott’s objection to taking any meaningful action to prevent mass shootings across our state — after Santa Fe High, after Sutherland Springs, after El Paso — only makes it more clear than ever that the only way to help the people he’s hurting is to win this election.
But it’s on all of us to make that possible. That’s why we’re building the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen in order to reach millions of voters, bring new people into our campaign, and win this race.
[Instead of relying on corporate PACs and NRA checks to fund our campaign, we’re relying on support from people like you. Please make a $3 contribution right now to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott and finally put the people of this state first.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220602.tsLdyy&refcode=ema20220602-192093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)
Together, we will keep standing up, keep organizing, and keep fighting.
More soon,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220602-192093-footer&t=22&refcode2=192093_444211_wunUNc&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=192093%2E444211%2EwunUNc)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Watch Keeps Winning!
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

On May 16th, a California court found California's gender quota law for corporate boards _unconstitutional_ in _Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla_ , a lawsuit that **Judicial Watch** filed in 2019 on behalf of three California taxpayers.
The verdict in this case comes after a 28-day trial, and it follows a similar ruling in **Judicial Watch 's** favor last month finding California's diversity mandate for corporate boards unconstitutional.
Thanks to the generous commitment of our members across the country, we are winning major victories for the core American value of equal protection under the law!
And today, [I urge you to join with us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59039&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) so that we can _keep __winning_ on behalf of the rule of law and for the American people.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59039&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Our most recent victory came out of our challenge to a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director "_who self-identifies her gender as a woman_ " on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law also requires corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board.

Judicial Watch argued that the quota for women on corporate boards violates the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution...and California Superior Court Judge Maureen Duffy-Lewis agreed with us!

The Court found that "_putting more women on boards demonstrated that the Legislature 's actual purpose was gender-balancing, not remedying discrimination_."

And, "_There is no Compelling Governmental interest in remedying discrimination in the board selection process because neither the Legislature nor Defendant could identify any specific, purposeful, intentional and unlawful discrimination to be remedied. "_

This is the second California court decision finding that quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left's _unprecedented attacks_ on anti-discrimination laws have suffered _another_ stinging courtroom defeat at the hands of **Judicial Watch** attorneys!

**Judicial Watch 's** legal team is helping protect the civil rights of every American with these successful lawsuits.

But every one of our lawsuits come with real price tags attached.

[That's why I am sohopeful you will make a tax-deductible contribution and join the Judicial Watch team today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59039&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) Your donation will help us take on new challenges to the rule of law whenever and wherever they arise, and help keep us on track with all our current lawsuits and investigations

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59039&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

I urge you to join with us today!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59039&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---
|
---
|

Washington, DC 20024

I’d like to introduce you to someone who gives me hope: my friend (and Frontline candidate) Congressman Josh Gottheimer.

We’re less than one week away from the New Jersey primaries, where voters will have the opportunity to show their support for candidates across our great state. Josh needs your help to make sure that Team Gottheimer has the strongest showing of support possible.

Having partners in the House is so important to me and my colleagues in the Senate. We know we can count on representatives like Josh to keep progress moving forward and make sure we get bills passed that will benefit hard-working families.

Josh is facing multiple opponents in a district that Governor Phil Murphy only won by fewer than one point, and the far-right knows that the path to reclaiming the House majority requires flipping seats like Josh’s.

[So, will you join me in supporting Josh Gottheimer, a fighter for Jersey Values, by contributing to his campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046700/348593415/617509343?amount=20&refcode2=0f7b4e23-aae2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&refcode=JG_EM_FR_12MO_20220602_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdiNGUyMy1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMfn4DazHPkAeFnZ8S54FVSd8ebnzhyQpBER7gyM7rw=) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
subject: RE: Gun violence is rampant. We must act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
Dear Peter,

**Did you catch my email last week? Enough is enough. We are fed up with gun violence.**
**This has to stop.** Whether it's Uvalde, Tulsa, or right here at home in Tennessee, the epidemic of gun violence has led to a continuation of bitter and senseless violence while destroying countless lives of innocent people.
Why do Republicans sit idly by as we continue to see a skyrocket of mass shootings? While Democratic leadership across the state and country are working to pass red flag laws, end loopholes, further expanded background checks, and improve access to mental health services, our counterparts are taking hush money from the NRA, and offering nothing more than patronizing and actionless words. Far right extremist law makers in Tennessee even went as far as to remove permits for concealed carry weapons this year.
**Enough is enough.**
**[Join us in standing up to Republicans, so we can work to end gun violence across Tennessee!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046727/348593911/22228921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ajKiErvk9j_20ZXMlIxnxrgnScNens1FZo-PoCCkVA=)**
Thank you,
Caucus Chairman, Rep. Vincent Dixie
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046728/348593912/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ajKiErvk9j_20ZXMlIxnxrgnScNens1FZo-PoCCkVA=)
Dear Peter,

**I’m tired and fed up.** Too many times we've seen the same thoughts and prayers be issued by politicians around the country in the face of all parents' nightmares. When I drop my kids off at school I want them thinking about math and science, what's going on with their friends, and building towards a bright future--not looking over their shoulder preparing for a mass shooting.
**Did you know that we've had over 200+ mass shootings in 2022 alone? ****Enough is enough.**
Republican leaders across the country offer no solutions, no legislation, and no answers on how we can end this epidemic. While we offer sensible and meaningful policy alternatives, the other side continues to take contributions and directions from the NRA to enact policies that endanger our children.
**Enough is enough.**
Elections have consequences and for too long we've let out-of-state, out-of-touch ideologies lead our state into this dark place. Every session we hear from victims of gun violence beg us for action from around Tennessee, only to see them be met by the national Republican/NRA talking points that lead to the same outcomes.** **
**Enough is enough.**
Our state, community, and country have been hurting for far too long. From Johnson City to Memphis, it's time to send a message. **Enough is enough.** **It's time for results in Tennessee. **

Thank you,

Caucus Chairman, Rep. Vincent Dixie
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046729/348593913/1395796377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ajKiErvk9j_20ZXMlIxnxrgnScNens1FZo-PoCCkVA=)

Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-WXYYta9O02fOdv20S16HA2?unsubscribedata=he7zPgnxqVqGfxNxeSIt9oFFeSyyIgop3MCEpdcm1wXwIzgqvXBC7weHzW1JlMLTdB4uH73UeD52M%2BXqfl96jvGUjgFiB5mvLhGe9MNw8xZ1T5Tp8y%2BJr5xfKDvEnhdxhLA0zTayrrEHrpY4FKQ2kRliJDrQkG3OyPHLo1tnSg%2Fl%2BbBC2HfCEs02FhSZisqv60%2FJwBSsUuFNz0rBLFEMRwbnHKQASvlxBEOfbOOb3pxHNuPQfLTKGoBPGqC39f1W1txLyNFfOHdEC1687oUQWnMQ1CgqAI40a5HpQpHyWlDp8MrF5xOI7s4PjlEBeLWGHCexJDWyqGFQTw5VURWAwPtdsuXtmaVPHJ6oTW%2FHWDe0tGFrBDz36iRcl9GIVP7FKGqrZtZDVdMQExXeyfeVA6j2juSRtnHfYdB7REW9g8nWp0nGYFpiFnb8oPgen1jT).

subject: This is serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Hoosier Democrats – This is serious: the 2022 election will be the most important election of our lives. This isn’t hyperbole - **_this is a fact_**. The stakes could not be higher with Republicans trying to strip away our constitutional freedoms like access to safe and legal abortions - all for political power. They refuse to examine outdated systems that afflict our country and in communities like Indianapolis. [Get your Hoosier Hospitality Dinner tickets here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046730/348593916/-1823536925?refcode=220519-em-carville&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1ObM2MDKmAuWU5CRHsILoJwE8jGW1_TSmtZuhum8Jw=) What’s worse: Republicans refuse to solve the kitchen-table issues that are important to Hoosier families. They’ve said “NO” to broadband, “NO” to better roads and bridges, and “NO” to transformative investments across the state. Instead, they seek to govern by outdated agendas that endanger the lives of many. **Hoosiers, we must be proud of what we’ve accomplished together since President Joe Biden took office**. From the American Rescue Plan to The Infrastructure and Jobs Act - and putting the first Black woman on the U.S. Supreme Court, Democrats are delivering on our campaign promises. [Get your Hoosier Hospitality Dinner tickets here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046731/348593917/-1823536925?refcode=220519-em-carville&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1ObM2MDKmAuWU5CRHsILoJwE8jGW1_TSmtZuhum8Jw=) This is why events like the Hoosier Hospitality Dinner matter. We are facing the fight of our lifetimes, and we must do everything we can to equip our counties and candidates - in all corners of the state - with the resources for this challenge. **Democrats know when we lead with our values, we win.** It’s why we need your support and your effort to help us get across that finish line - and events like Big Dem Weekend will help us get there. **So on June 17, join Hoosier Democrats in Indianapolis as we come together for our Hoosier Hospitality Dinner and a recommitment toward building a better tomorrow for our families - regardless of community or Zip code.** [Help us in this fight. Help us build a better Indiana and a stronger country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046732/348593918/-1823536925?refcode=220519-em-carville&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1ObM2MDKmAuWU5CRHsILoJwE8jGW1_TSmtZuhum8Jw=)
**– Congressman André Carson** Get your tickets for the Hoosier Hospitality Dinner [here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046733/348593919/-1823536925?refcode=220519-em-carville&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1ObM2MDKmAuWU5CRHsILoJwE8jGW1_TSmtZuhum8Jw=)

name: Jenny Delwood, Campaign Manager
subject: Checking in about our stretch goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I have just a couple minutes free.

Hey there —

I have a few minutes before my next meeting, so I wanted to check in. With only days to go, this race is still a toss-up. The success of our campaign hinges on how many people we can reach with Karen's message before polls close on Tuesday, so we're contacting voters anywhere we can, including on TV, online, and face-to-face.

But, I'm going to level with you: this is the most expensive mayoral race in Los Angeles history. That's why we launched our $75,000 stretch goal to stay on top of fundraising and make sure we can keep reaching voters through the primary.

Will you chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to fuel our voter engagement efforts through the primary? Every dollar goes a long way. Please chip in what you can at this link: **[https://act.karenbass.com/a/2022-2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046755/348593943/-1030761386?ms=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&refcode=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&source=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=oDvCzy6J5yki8JdP2vRSj1tEArgyhNK2yMiCYOm9OE0UH4rO6rUSpqzkVvErIzswWooCkmBLpQQjV9BqrzyPpMY7pRatZ2WHXnB1l6CmI7sCs9JbhpNE0LfKhPXit%2B5Y6xzqNRNa3OT0B1D14RikOw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKx8krMXbQimGjwKqcFK4R2yLAAN1AfEiugKHLy-u-8=&emci=e277b175-92e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=0a99ae65-aae2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

Karen has proven she is the leader with the vision to move Los Angeles forward. And she has the plans to back that vision up.

Winning or losing could come down to a single vote, so we can't leave anything on the table. It's not just Karen who needs your support — it's the volunteers who are out in the field right now having important conversations with voters. Don't leave the future of our city to chance. Chip in what you can now to help us reach our $75,000 stretch goal >>

**[https://act.karenbass.com/a/2022-2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46046761/348593955/-1030761386?ms=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&refcode=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&source=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_prim2_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=oDvCzy6J5yki8JdP2vRSj1tEArgyhNK2yMiCYOm9OE0UH4rO6rUSpqzkVvErIzswWooCkmBLpQQjV9BqrzyPpMY7pRatZ2WHXnB1l6CmI7sCs9JbhpNE0LfKhPXit%2B5Y6xzqNRNa3OT0B1D14RikOw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5YWU2NS1hYWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKx8krMXbQimGjwKqcFK4R2yLAAN1AfEiugKHLy-u-8=&emci=e277b175-92e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=0a99ae65-aae2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

Thank you,

Jenny Delwood

clean_body: I have just a couple minutes free. Hey there — I have a few minutes before my next meeting, so I wanted to check in. With only days to go, this race is still a toss-up. The success of our campaign hinges on how many people we can reach with Karen's message before polls close on Tuesday, so we're contacting voters anywhere we can, including on TV, online, and face-to-face. But, I'm going to level with you: this is the most expensive mayoral race in Los Angeles history. That's why we launched our $75,000 stretch goal to stay on top of fundraising and make sure we can keep reaching voters through the primary. Will you chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to fuel our voter engagement efforts through the primary? Every dollar goes a long way. Please chip in what you can at this link: Karen has proven she is the leader with the vision to move Los Angeles forward. And she has the plans to back that vision up. Winning or losing could come down to a single vote, so we can't leave anything on the table. It's not just Karen who needs your support — it's the volunteers who are out in the field right now having important conversations with voters. Don't leave the future of our city to chance. Chip in what you can now to help us reach our $75,000 stretch goal >> Thank you, Jenny Delwood Campaign Manager P.S. From Saturday, June 4th until election day on Tuesday, June 7th, we will have events and volunteer opportunities across the City to help get out the vote. Sign up to join us for a weekend filled with voter engagement and entertainment to elect Karen! » Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

| Friend,

It’s June, which means wedding season is here, and so is the Utah primary election.

**Save the date; the republican primary election is June 28th. **

We invite you to participate with us by voting. **The results of the primary election will most likely determine the outcome of the general election in November.** It is essential that every eligible Utahn voter speak up and vote!

**Do you have an objection to Mike Lee representing Utah for another 6 years?** Do you object to being tied to him as your Senator? If the answer is yes, it is essential that you speak up now!

Contribute to Becky’s campaign for a brighter future for Utah now:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Kim Schrier and I are holding Big Oil companies accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
My friend Kim and I led legislation to stop Big Oil from price gouging. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031411/348548244/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=&emci=1dbad34f-dfe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e69dd8e2-88e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Hey Peter,

While Americans feel the squeeze of rising gas prices, Big Oil company profits are at a 7-year high — with Shell reporting three times the quarterly profits they made a year earlier.

That’s why my friend Kim Schrier and I introduced the **Consumer Fuel Price Gouging Prevention Act** , which would lower gas prices by making these predatory price hikes illegal. I’m proud to share that it passed the House, but now we need it to pass in the Senate so it can become law. **[Will you sign our petition to tell the Senate to get this passed?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031413/348548246/-384708567?ms=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&refcode=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&source=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8Qr9wK2Kr/e2am9DbrUgxBirF6h99DALaX4JWb4KSSFIT7NZUcGRC8oIzEnnGaHiPcT4XQNK6fBoAAFG7xW0FNv4eibYyMAR4gZ/UCM+Y89ZXmrJmgJBvcF/XMgnLbkpKysLd5dkG2zbg0BjJw8nLwbxlhAQrLiD69E4dy6AHr0=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=&emci=1dbad34f-dfe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e69dd8e2-88e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031420/348548250/-384708567?ms=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&refcode=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&source=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8Qr9wK2Kr/e2am9DbrUgxBirF6h99DALaX4JWb4KSSFIT7NZUcGRC8oIzEnnGaHiPcT4XQNK6fBoAAFG7xW0FNv4eibYyMAR4gZ/UCM+Y89ZXmrJmgJBvcF/XMgnLbkpKysLd5dkG2zbg0BjJw8nLwbxlhAQrLiD69E4dy6AHr0=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=&emci=1dbad34f-dfe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e69dd8e2-88e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---

Fossil fuel companies are taking advantage and raising their prices well above the rate of inflation. It’s price gouging, plain and simple. Big Oil is showing us exactly why capitalism needs guardrails to work for working people.

Without passing legislation to hold Big Oil companies accountable, corporations are free to continue price gouging American families. Kim and I will keep fighting to hold them accountable, and I hope Republicans will put the needs of American families ahead of the profit margins of fossil fuel companies. [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031423/348548258/-384708567?ms=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&refcode=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&source=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8Qr9wK2Kr/e2am9DbrUgxBirF6h99DALaX4JWb4KSSFIT7NZUcGRC8oIzEnnGaHiPcT4XQNK6fBoAAFG7xW0FNv4eibYyMAR4gZ/UCM+Y89ZXmrJmgJBvcF/XMgnLbkpKysLd5dkG2zbg0BjJw8nLwbxlhAQrLiD69E4dy6AHr0=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=&emci=1dbad34f-dfe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e69dd8e2-88e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---

Thanks for your support!

Katie

P.S. -- Kim and I are running in two of the most competitive House races in the country. We could really use your help to ramp up our campaigns. **[Use this link to make a donation that will be split between our campaigns.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031426/348548261/1562344759?source=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46031429/348548264/1562344759?source=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_gaspet_engg_gq_act___kp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjlkZDhlMi04OGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfrpnulBCQj23EvwqbXA32TaxDXjm7gIVefbJNx9jAQ=)

clean_body: My friend Kim and I led legislation to stop Big Oil from price gouging. Hey Peter, While Americans feel the squeeze of rising gas prices, Big Oil company profits are at a 7-year high — with Shell reporting three times the quarterly profits they made a year earlier. That’s why my friend Kim Schrier and I introduced the Consumer Fuel Price Gouging Prevention Act , which would lower gas prices by making these predatory price hikes illegal. I’m proud to share that it passed the House, but now we need it to pass in the Senate so it can become law. | Fossil fuel companies are taking advantage and raising their prices well above the rate of inflation. It’s price gouging, plain and simple. Big Oil is showing us exactly why capitalism needs guardrails to work for working people. Without passing legislation to hold Big Oil companies accountable, corporations are free to continue price gouging American families. Kim and I will keep fighting to hold them accountable, and I hope Republicans will put the needs of American families ahead of the profit margins of fossil fuel companies. Thanks for your support! Katie P.S. -- Kim and I are running in two of the most competitive House races in the country. We could really use your help to ramp up our campaigns. = = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5seuv9aa8033parlls3dk6ldr5m52t46b8smmno_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5meco62chie9hmecb1cdg64pbimqq70sjlcdin8t3k65p7addjespm9dr6m9gefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phgmiqj8ptim5j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Senate Defense

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zki609n2q2p3340r0u87070lv7bou28ct36fh0q0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)
---
Folks,

**We are on the precipice of a monumental victory: A Conservative Senate Majority.**
Do you know what that means? Chuck Schumer will be dethroned. Joe Biden will no longer have a Senate Majority to cushion and support his chaotic presidency.

## **[We have to fight for a Senate Majority.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj2mdav5o1c99hmu41joalsj40adbf13orqvhup0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)**
| [**$25 FOR A SENATE MAJORITY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zds1ls05hfn7tbpm1659s53rmsmdrosdgc5h2vk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)
---
[**$50 FOR A SENATE MAJORITY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zha2683aqc3su5td2l955sedge9efhp2gd36jts8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)
---
[**$125 FOR A SENATE MAJORITY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zagvm9jekl2rqh3tarug3h51ivshclcsrfqp0c50_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)
---
[**$250 FOR A SENATE MAJORITY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgunf01s6aah8fuecjai79jf42ldglp94ae3kaho_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)
---
[**$500 FOR A SENATE MAJORITY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z216o83p9i78tu7olasqf1ac36tm6h2rrv06min8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj4cth2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The 500,000
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbjametoercta7qhsjj0l1rrbp0uu9rcmd5rbcig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbcdlm8r38c34mgob5cpmeaqras3j6qr68dpn6kob8phle8q6ecdks9ib9oph6urt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddgs1rm0pjks2pm2ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zij3ko6q21rsc5oguhqc1vf2jiq0i58a2sjufik8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo7hl9lf4t8ft5a919026a1autj4m477mjhciemo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt4a2g4sqt6voakivfsr934issj9ud6sblci8mjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbif3e9l973oul6aghrttmpburntn0o3eg1tvkq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zecnu3b6ccl71dr8sgbktmr7j37qeu6b3pint4no_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfl7stueh1q2fpmajt1bdu515se2ht3m1s35se30_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chie1oj2c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508342:61rbl9onN:m:1:3317145305:7195BCF8D01432CFFBC34A9F755729DF:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508343:61rbl9onN:m:1:3317145305:7195BCF8D01432CFFBC34A9F755729DF:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508343:61rbl9onN:m:1:3317145305:7195BCF8D01432CFFBC34A9F755729DF:r "Please click here to donate now")**

---

We have just 5 days before our primary in this critical battleground House district. 🚪 5 days to knock on as many doors as possible. 📺 5 days to fund our proven-effective ads and digital programs. 📞 5 days to call as many undecided voters as possible. 🏃 5 days to make sure we’re running full-steam ahead. = | = Peter, far too much is on the line in this battleground race for good Democrats like you to stand on the sidelines. name: Ally For Utah
subject: Jeanette Bennett Endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate
body:
"It’s time for us to step forward, let our voice be heard by choosing the person that can take our views and values to Washington."
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KcdbUQuQsvDWVTvmILe17mcdvE8sJS4NfNUgxST2xo51tu7imyHWss4O2dGLLHHfiY5XU-0k1yn2jOl9vtUYuTiJgZzRHbiP3M-rhLPglxxxyfOfdV4U0TmLQ_aW6MqNnmvd359mtkbXymM8FwPjIQ==&c=wBhX4tqBUOaIOIDwznSbFGn6oW0hsTU9AYzwMYZoQ8TT3UdwiHmv_Q==&ch=ewanyRH3wXPWkojdP-yl9qcM0z8ZOjcUa2PMOoGWatMWBFpaD0HxKA==)
---
---
| |
---
| Utah business leader Jeanette Bennett has publicly endorsed Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. [Watch her video on YouTube here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KcdbUQuQsvDWVTvmILe17mcdvE8sJS4NfNUgxST2xo51tu7imyHWsigHZs-Y7JhYhJf4-JVnNsvekfSSgxhqhJIUOYdj4t8ecpBxQl1x192EX5WIcnQu5HM_T7XSj2EFv63gM7ObkKg3xWKtoVmYGQ==&c=wBhX4tqBUOaIOIDwznSbFGn6oW0hsTU9AYzwMYZoQ8TT3UdwiHmv_Q==&ch=ewanyRH3wXPWkojdP-yl9qcM0z8ZOjcUa2PMOoGWatMWBFpaD0HxKA==)
"I think it's time for a change. I think we need a fresh voice in Washington. We have some big problems, we have some new problems. And we need new thoughts and new voices. I think Ally Isom will be an amazing senator because she's smart, she listens, she knows she doesn't know everything and she's willing to learn and grow and learn from other people. That is what I want in a senator.
I love that Ally cares about the individual and she shows that in her walking a mile in every city. I love that she feels that part of her preparation should be getting to know the people throughout the state of Utah, and that's the type of person that I want representing me. The person that knows the individuals that make up the millions of people in Utah.
She also has a lot of hope. Hope that there are answers. If we can keep people accountable, bring fresh ideas to the nation's capital, that we can make progress for the challenges that this country faces. It's time for us to step forward, let our voice be heard by choosing the person that can take our views and values to Washington."

Tune in tonight as Ally shares her vision for Utah:
June 2 Debate Hosted by the Utah Debate Commission

I think we need a fresh voice in Washington. We have some big problems, we have some new problems. And we need new thoughts and new voices. I think Ally Isom will be an amazing senator because she's smart, she listens, she knows she doesn't know everything and she's willing to learn and grow and learn from other people. That is what I want in a senator. I love that Ally cares about the individual and she shows that in her walking a mile in every city. I love that she feels that part of her preparation should be getting to know the people throughout the state of Utah, and that's the type of person that I want representing me. The person that knows the individuals that make up the millions of people in Utah. She also has a lot of hope. Hope that there are answers. If we can keep people accountable, bring fresh ideas to the nation's capital, that we can make progress for the challenges that this country faces. It's time for us to step forward, let our voice be heard by choosing the person that can take our views and values to Washington." disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
The Republican Primary is Approaching Fast, Peter. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=97f54a9835&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **Peter -** **we are just two months out from the Republican Primary on August 2nd.**

For over a year, Garrett Soldano has been rocking the campaign trail and taking We the People's campaign to every corner of Michigan. The grassroots movement we've built is truly unprecedented - and we have two months to make our case to the citizens of our great state.

With several of our primary opponents removed from the ballot for [submitting forged and fraudulent signatures](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=b38fe65c9a&e=fe4b890356), our campaign has never been in a better position to WIN BIG in August.

**With just two months until the Republican Primary,[ can you rush a donation to ensure we have the resources to finish strong?](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=46a36f540d&e=fe4b890356)**
---

---
| Because of your continued support and dedication,**we have been able to outraise all other candidates on the ballot __combined__**. But to combat silver spoon self-funders and establishment RINOs backed by special interests, Garrett needs your financial commitment \- _now more than ever._

We have only 60 days to grow our movement before election day. [**Are you able to chip in $60 today to help Garrett secure victory on August 2nd?**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=44df04e97a&e=fe4b890356)
---

---
| | _There are other ways to support our grassroots campaign, Peter._
\- Join Garrett at an upcoming event and bring a friend with you! We're making 4 stops this weekend in the Upper Peninsula before returning to Kent, Hillsdale, Ottawa, Montcalm and Macomb Counties later this month. [See Garrett's full schedule and RSVP here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=94ad688b23&e=fe4b890356)

\- Sign up to volunteer or get involved in our campaign [here. ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=c29f88725d&e=fe4b890356)

\- Order your campaign bumper magnet [here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=9e6ac9e70a&e=fe4b890356)

\- Spread the word with some custom campaign merchandise. [View our online store here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2d924c3dfc&e=fe4b890356)

Thank you for joining us on this incredible movement. Two months to go!

_\- Team Soldano_

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The general election just started in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Peter, it’s Josh Shapiro here
| | |
---
Peter, it’s Josh Shapiro here, and I asked Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham if I could reach out to you.

**I’m humbled and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania. The general election starts now —[will you join me and Gov. Lujan Grisham and donate $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46047950/348601158/2064524224?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1297-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdhNzc0OS1hZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioay4TI4GogpQKXBmJZKb-VFHVSNZhfMmgxGL4OeQUU=)**
I’m a Pennsylvanian. I was raised here, and my wife Lori and I are raising our four kids just a few miles down the road from where I grew up. I’ve spent my career serving the people of our commonwealth, as a State Representative, a County Commissioner, and now as the People’s Attorney General.

We need all hands on deck to hold on to Pennsylvania in 2022, and I’m ready to work hard with this team to make it happen.
During this campaign and as Pennsylvania’s next Governor, I’m going to take my cues from people in places like West Philly and Washington County — not from special interests in Washington, D.C., or big corporations trying to screw over Pennsylvanians. Because I’m not working for them — I’m working for Pennsylvanians.

**[If you’re with me and Gov. Lujan Grisham in this fight to protect our democracy, defend our rights, and win our tough races — can you split $5 today between my campaign and Gov. Lujan Grisham's?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46047951/348601159/2064524224?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1297-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdhNzc0OS1hZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioay4TI4GogpQKXBmJZKb-VFHVSNZhfMmgxGL4OeQUU=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46047952/348601160/2064524224?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1297-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdhNzc0OS1hZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioay4TI4GogpQKXBmJZKb-VFHVSNZhfMmgxGL4OeQUU=)
---
We’re facing unprecedented challenges here in Pennsylvania, but I’ve taken on the big fights for the communities we call home — delivering for working families and holding special interests and bad actors accountable.

The fact is, our GOP opponent wants to bring an extremist, conservative agenda to Pennsylvania — and I’m ready to take him on with everything I’ve got.
I’ve spent my career taking on the big and powerful, whether it was taking on well-connected corporate interests to protect health care for nearly two million Western Pennsylvanians, holding accountable predator priests to get justice for survivors after decades of sexual abuse and cover-ups, or standing up to Trump’s election lies in the courtroom to protect our democracy.
As Pennsylvania’s Governor, I’ll keep taking on those big fights. I’ll fight to defend your right to vote, I’ll fight to defend access to abortion, and I’ll fight to defend our democracy — right here in the birthplace of our nation.

**[Can I count on you to join this important fight? Make a donation of any amount now to support my campaign for Governor and Governor Lujan Grisham as we fight to win our races this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46047953/348601161/2064524224?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1297-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdhNzc0OS1hZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioay4TI4GogpQKXBmJZKb-VFHVSNZhfMmgxGL4OeQUU=)**
This is going to be one hell of a fight — but with you, I know we can win it.

Thanks for joining this team,
Josh Shapiro
_Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania_
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sfqyJbcdG0CqssOMlyXdkQ2?unsubscribedata=1b4DzyWfP5HRERpsyRCrWxyWV6bWmXwesGe2%2Fus%2BS1VyE9Whye5ciwp4oc9C0sww7O2Nj%2FI7UNqh2alkgkbFMGQdbjctC0Mb42H5H76oU7jpKCYW8G%2BJCt4z%2FmJl6WkUBTUC9phqPauYFAXxq4xOIMtMjt3Ogk8y4gs3%2FzSfjHRKvpMCceFqS3H3NgEKEmX%2B7PMADCB9VLwcUnjn24CGYbDPmBxPJPhJ3sQWipspbXfKKb77NW71kt56TPRrlAyhpKjCCojYztN%2FUYf9p5XWEmB1Q3C5uEEQ%2Fj4jvSn%2Bj8xM3t3ZAww9QgXs2P%2B6f13jy%2FbvzQBasG9ED7GKFMGbB6V3%2BOKU0OCFsj%2FZwEkPE8YYlYS%2B5WMd5okTXuIsEhRWcqdhsktTnSLBs83L2SIWk%2F2HBFVqxR03fuQ%2B%2FMx2stQuLifkWf1OCetYj6J0AjOu) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
---
