name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6093%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V39aQOX1TdaJj7ynohqVPw&sysid=1)
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62922%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LyMksoPBliaC%2bmIvx1Z5dg&sysid=1 "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62923%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFjTGE%2f9RoJvPxs8VrArxQ&sysid=1 "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62924%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LgIREX6rvxZ35JCEiDXRnQ&sysid=1 "Please click here to
donate now")**
---

---

I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Friend, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. body:
When Republicans attempt to overturn elections, whose voices rise above in the fight to protect our democracy?
#
Derek -
When Republicans attack Democrats for being weak, whose voices can effectively counter that charge?
Veterans.
When Republicans spread lies and disinformation, whose voices are trusted that can cut through the clutter?
Veterans.
When Republicans attempt to overturn elections, whose voices rise above in the fight to protect our democracy?
Veterans.
VoteVets has a HUGE role to play in the 2022 elections. We give voice to progressive veterans in these critical campaigns in a way no other group can.
But we cannot do it alone. Almost all of our donations come from people chipping in small donations.
That’s why we’re emailing. Because all of those donations add up and help us make a difference in these close races.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Peter, help me SAVE AMERICA! 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508345:Jknv29oNe:m:1:3253819041:25F27AC964C08086E3BF8488C3DCD312:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508346:Jknv29oNe:m:1:3253819041:25F27AC964C08086E3BF8488C3DCD312:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508346:Jknv29oNe:m:1:3253819041:25F27AC964C08086E3BF8488C3DCD312:r "Please click here to donate now")**

Hi friends, I've been a supporter of Doug's for years and I'd love to share a little bit about why I'm certain he's the best candidate for Governor of Maryland. Doug knows that elected officials have to stand up for what's right, even if it's not popular. As Attorney General, Doug tirelessly advocated for families like mine. **He had the guts to support marriage equality before any other statewide official.** He even received Equality Maryland's "Ally for Equality" award in recognition of his support for LGBTQ+ rights.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrbX48rtyZKDgfG4uTIuAkVGK4UdrmFlokRA4DqEE2-k0U1FTOo38RCXXq5jCVHv5xuvxRbmBI778gkznPRZFQXKLwmwHUivNd_76p06GcoYDMaLBlxGgcLEpdwgon3DlE4b2RijV8-gkJs0EqHBcuoLoBfwJGc_pPr5p5Puk-be4vMbzWjGH8iTz443LlFeBJ0KLb76NX6MR0zJbaixGoqgHw4m5CQvh8ScfK-5aRNedVorIxJ0D9NeVYa2_BmTV9ZhgeTNi7MWavv6kDQ24k/3mk/p0URewgVQJGS4o_KuOYB1Q/h1/B5uMbls_WRA-tFbvbZnzaF3-nxI42VMkqqfpU23wFo8)
---
My wife and I celebrating our engagement in May of 2020.
---

name: Ed Rollins
subject: will you be Ready for Ron?

subject: As we close in on Election Day, McCarthy has never been more vulnerable.
body:
New polling suggests his approval rating is plummeting. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46048773/348605161/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjQwOGNmMi1iMmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-uK4LZiYyJyI6ySIF3fAT7RZT1liQ7RStwEqfHRhTs=)
Friend,

As voters in CA-20 begin to cast ballots ahead of the June 7th primary election, here are two things you need to know about my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy: 1\. Right now, I’m the only viable Democratic candidate running to unseat McCarthy. I’ve been endorsed by the California Labor Federation, the California Teachers Association, and the California Democratic Party.**Democrats haven’t been this unified to unseat Kevin McCarthy in decades.**

2\. Kevin McCarthy has never walked into an election on more vulnerable footing. He was caught LYING in the aftermath of January 6th, and voters in our community are turning on him. **New polling suggests his approval rating is plummeting.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46048774/348605163/-674430938?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjQwOGNmMi1iMmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-uK4LZiYyJyI6ySIF3fAT7RZT1liQ7RStwEqfHRhTs=) Tuesday’s primary election is going to be a critical test of our grassroots strength in this district, and we need all hands on deck to fund our final communications plan to undecided voters in this district. body:
I want to have dinner with YOU | I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508455:Js6F29oN6:m:1:3299561967:0E9BEE3040B6DA287C1DD8507B85AE3D:r)
Patriot,

I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK, and I told them I wanted to invite YOU to join me.

This isn't any ordinary trip, Patriot. This will be an _EXCLUSIVE VIP dinner_ , and I can't think of anyone else I'd rather share this special evening with as my **GUEST OF HONOR** than _**YOU.**_

_My team will cover the cost of your flight, hotel, AND meal._

_All you have to do is contribute $25 or more, and you'll automatically be entered to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. _

**[Please contribute $25 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win a trip to meet me and have dinner in NEW YORK.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508455:Js6F29oN6:m:1:3299561967:0E9BEE3040B6DA287C1DD8507B85AE3D:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508459:Js6F29oN6:m:1:3299561967:0E9BEE3040B6DA287C1DD8507B85AE3D:r)**

Remember, if you win, my team will cover your flight, hotel, and dinner. _We'll even take a photo together so we can remember the night forever._

You've always been one of my best supporters, Patriot, and I really want YOU to be there with me. _My team is sending me the first round of entries TONIGHT. I hope to see your name._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win and to get on the first list of Patriots I see.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508455:Js6F29oN6:m:1:3299561967:0E9BEE3040B6DA287C1DD8507B85AE3D:r)**

Thank you,

All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST June 2nd 2022. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Westchester NY hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump with Dinner provided, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. Dear Fellow American,
I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today.
After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate—with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left’s desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote.

It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible. [And that’s why I want to get your opinion today.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=26dc1c28a2b94b379ea6e22b30cd9337&_e=JZ9nV-_ugLFOBofQ7sl__LnZ0-Ag5oOIOhzR3im6-Z1h7Hc_KEAFkNzfHdpxa38hbYm5kJwYmT8d01M4s44wOanLQoFSo4FjPssBn60SMYj5IYFz9f5Rb0_hU7jvbbOTCaRwESDeDaIQbYCYXGxqCvLuUFwLrzegCthyBUNo1S5L3LW67_ReKdlOucMHGAJWacgq7w705HDiVy6Buh-luLnDzZ7KQvc6qjggmEB4VagbHYDpUFbjt5KkyWTp1yu0iyfTdlpe9pXMNU9D6EFffwRS_8iiiOr2Mle8IlUEpTmN1iVTB17FBBwkLoDC0JWnnRTew6pxTx6uPHuXo0Var6sqfLSBflaRVjoWx9LVZUkVS8lqXQB_7tjpO9m5R8un_xPFDLwxl1H0he7kgCzWpDPAZGcFmJuoMFFSwhsgkIrGpWnATPkaiDCzNMltDsAPulJyMnhLPJ6o8s6XDqgR-dYiaE-HrJBYE--oVrt6g9-VxMleNbkhp4Jwg44AFVZAaRkKBMk5PcbCiQSgV6MQMg%3D%3D)
Will you take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you think government should play in a free society?
I value what you have to say, and it will help us understand where Americans like you think our country is headed.
You can begin your survey below. Thank you! [https://resources.tfas.org/https/tfas.org/legitimate-role-of-government-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=26dc1c28a2b94b379ea6e22b30cd9337&_e=JZ9nV-_ugLFOBofQ7sl__LnZ0-Ag5oOIOhzR3im6-Z1h7Hc_KEAFkNzfHdpxa38hbYm5kJwYmT8d01M4s44wOanLQoFSo4FjPssBn60SMYj5IYFz9f5Rb0_hU7jvbbOTCaRwESDeDaIQbYCYXGxqCvLuUFwLrzegCthyBUNo1S5L3LW67_ReKdlOucMHGAJWacgq7w705HDiVy6Buh-luLnDzZ7KQvc6qjggmEB4VagbHYDpUFbjt5KkyWTp1yu0iyfTdlpe9pXMNU9D6EFffwRS_8iiiOr2Mle8IlUEpTmN1iVTB17FBBwkLoDC0JWn1-5ecytHg3xuLbxmqRTG4X8p6Sj12UZXWoZ5JSk1OpYrAl_auUyOcLkgdOpuLof7o8OfTVlG0o2kQDgB9rH9K-_0puXY_7_0eEdkvTa0dF_K9IE5SlwNf10Ln3LoAEW80DSOQzGTONRp1zbihG5Go0N4Lm81Qj_5mDDg3R7tnQEyeuczwAka5GM1CCItFel7d4v_2MsI9T9TMzubIiSuog%3D%3D)
Sincerely,
Roger R. Ream President The Fund for American Studies

clean_body: I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate—with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left’s desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote. It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible. Will you take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you think government should play in a free society? I value what you have to say, and it will help us understand where Americans like you think our country is headed. You can begin your survey below. Thank you! Sincerely, Roger R. Ream President The Fund for American Studies | | | | To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46048881/348605617/-42398318?refcode=em20220602pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTlhZTA3Yy1iM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXkDoJA_UDPGlw78LBoPw-8_IGSDFkSnyjHwLjFp_1o=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Mandela and I will vote to end the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Fun Fact: I was a Day One Donor to Mandela’s campaign when he launched back in July
#
Hi Derek,
It’s John Fetterman, Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. 😁
As you know, Mandela Barnes — my buddy + Lieutenant Governor counterpart — is running for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.
Yes, PA is like way cooler than WI 🙄.
**But we can *all* agree Mandela is that dude.**
If elected, Mandela and I could be *the* two votes needed to scrap the filibuster, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , and pass transformative legislation for working people.
Not to mention the fact that there are only _< checks notes>_ TWO Republican-held Senate seats that the Cook Political Report rates as toss-ups.
Which two seats are they? 🤔
You guessed it: Pennsylvania + Wisconsin.
[**Will you split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Mandela Barnes' campaign today? Every donation helps defend the Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-1?refcode=em20220602-6075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)
**[Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-1?refcode=em20220602-6075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)**
Look, we cannot afford to take any vote for granted, and we cannot afford to take any place for granted.
That's why Mandela + I are both committed to organizing all across Pennsylvania + Wisconsin.
As Lieutenant Governors, we’ve *both* traveled to every county in our state. We've gone on listening tours in urban + rural areas, talked with working people, families, and small business owners about the issues impacting their lives.
Oh, and btw, we're both funding our campaigns the right way. No dirty money. No corporate PACs.
That's why your donation is so important, and why I gotta ask:
[**Can you split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Mandela Barnes' campaign today? Together we are going to flip Pennsylvania, flip Wisconsin, and protect the Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-1?refcode=em20220602-6075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)
My race + Mandela's race gives us the chance to not only keep the Senate majority, but to expand it even further.
Thanks for chipping in today to help flip Pennsylvania + Wisconsin in November. 🥰
— John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-1?refcode=em20220602-6075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)**
P.S. Fun FactTM️: I became a Day One Donor to Mandela’s campaign when he launched back in July!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-1?refcode=em20220602-6075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220602-6075-footer&t=2&refcode2=6075_434096_FI7hb0&akid=6075%2E434096%2EFI7hb0)**

name: democracy in danger
subject: when we wake up on November 9…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
...let’s make sure Democrats are in power.

|
---

As my Republican opponents pile on against my record and the National GOP fundraising machine courts corporate PAC and federal lobbyist donors, your support helps us defend my seat and keep Colorado blue. I’m working to cap out-of-pocket insulin costs at $35/month, hold Big Tech accountable and defend small-businesses through an oversight commission, and renew the expired monthly Child Tax Credit. Feedback from Coloradans on the ground and these monthly surveys inform my fight for Colorado’s families and our future. Your input helped me ban surprise emergency medical bills; work to hold Big Oil accountable for profiteering off hard-working folks at the pump; and secure investments in our roads and bridges that will create jobs nationwide. I don’t want to lose any ground in my work to help Coloradans, so I have a personal request: [_**Will you take a moment to take the Official June Priorities Survey today? Your input helped me ban surprise emergency medical bills; work to hold Big Oil accountable for profiteering off hard-working folks at the pump; and secure investments in our roads and bridges that will create jobs nationwide. | | Team, Before the MassDems Convention kicks off this weekend, I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read [**the Globe’s newest profile on Sonia**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46049197/348606934/-542833136?refcode=06_02_22_globeprofile_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY0MDA3Yi1iNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fJ0-tiXevKt-0hPyB4EgAiY2qhr_UODR1_FJpGvKVM=&emci=444553e5-b3e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f4f4007b-b6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684840): _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46049198/348606935/-221032335?refcode=06_02_22_globeprofile_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY0MDA3Yi1iNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fJ0-tiXevKt-0hPyB4EgAiY2qhr_UODR1_FJpGvKVM=&emci=444553e5-b3e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f4f4007b-b6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684840)
"It’s a perspective engrained in Chang-Díaz, a barrier-breaker on Beacon Hill now vowing to elevate the needs of those who have felt unseen in Massachusetts to its highest public office."_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46049199/348606936/-542833136?refcode=06_02_22_globeprofile_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY0MDA3Yi1iNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fJ0-tiXevKt-0hPyB4EgAiY2qhr_UODR1_FJpGvKVM=&emci=444553e5-b3e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f4f4007b-b6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Sonia knows firsthand the kind of transformational change working families need in our state because she’s lived it, and she’s spent over a decade in the State Senate fighting for it. Even when it was hard, and even when Beacon Hill leadership pressured her to look the other way, she took on tough fights and won. And that’s exactly the kind of Governor she’ll be. Friend, we need to elect leaders who won’t shy away from the toughest challenges of our Commonwealth just because they’re politically inconvenient. We need a leader who will run towards them, head on, because she knows the glacial pace our legislature moves will only keep folks from accessing the health care they need, displaced from the communities they grew up in, and unable to afford the fundamental right to a quality education. [**If you want to help elect the only candidate in this race who had the guts to jump in early and challenge Charlie Baker and the only candidate to support key issues for Bay Staters like Medicare for all, fare-free transit, and debt-free higher education, pitch in $20 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46049200/348606937/-1964195611?refcode=06_02_22_globeprofile_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY0MDA3Yi1iNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fJ0-tiXevKt-0hPyB4EgAiY2qhr_UODR1_FJpGvKVM=) Thanks for being in this with us. Josh, Campaign Manager

clean_body: | | | | | Team, Before the MassDems Convention kicks off this weekend, I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read : "It’s a perspective engrained in Chang-Díaz, a barrier-breaker on Beacon Hill now vowing to elevate the needs of those who have felt unseen in Massachusetts to its highest public office." Sonia knows firsthand the kind of transformational change working families need in our state because she’s lived it, and she’s spent over a decade in the State Senate fighting for it. Even when it was hard, and even when Beacon Hill leadership pressured her to look the other way, she took on tough fights and won. And that’s exactly the kind of Governor she’ll be. Friend, we need to elect leaders who won’t shy away from the toughest challenges of our Commonwealth just because they’re politically inconvenient. We need a leader who will run towards them, head on, because she knows the glacial pace our legislature moves will only keep folks from accessing the health care they need, displaced from the communities they grew up in, and unable to afford the fundamental right to a quality education. = Thanks for being in this with us. ### _**EARLY VOTING STARTS TOMORROW**_

You can still vote, as early as tomorrow at early voting locations in all six counties around district.

body:
Stop the RINO’s NOW

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7v0i6WDO3nYi2qAQC6m0McvrJdVkOxRN2zMYnQJ9nksXPjm_Uj0GeO1qSXhvDBPLPjUEfJyDWpxJsxiRa71CKHZoigyZdZIzFev0hM7T8Ry9vB7HkCEenbbaEVIypJvlwQcE13TBvvWmjkk7GChaH369Grex7hMwRJ0ve3p6zAB0alucH-vxGJ3TRPUXmxaRCkSiADR1N5UQ9Ml-3LMZibD4%3D)
---
Friend,

Last night, I was stunned to find out that one of my **REPUBLICAN** opponents sent out one of those ****shadowy mystery texts**** accusing me of being opposed to taxpayer-funded “collective” monopoly bargaining for government employees.
**[](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7v99lzs0hXRzJKJbmHji7fUQBycfo0iJeA4pDA2WiPKHtitiomc1p7LlvzKVc1rrUho6I0IxTWLcARPaVRi2WWA7aVZEKwcEPjzKsufO7qGheGAv2KBv53aKtUcMZ8XwW0tCyanLfk0lFp9uAt9FUh5h_x1T3_SZRJtXJP6DBtof1TPxMqtzJDIOT_jbB3l2iyJL7U4p-wzN412wL2-DNEDQ%3D)**** ** ****GUILTY AS CHARGED!****
**That one of my**Republican-In-Name-Only** opponents in this race would attack me for opposing a concept so **radical** and **disrespectful** to the taxpayers (that even FDR opposed) tells you everything you need to know about where they’re coming from and how they’ll vote once they’re in Washington.
** ****[_I absolutely do not believe servants of the people should be allowed to negotiate against you, the American taxpayer._](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7vyp6mQx_tM0rhe3O0Wgx54BV11aPcRVQdP-T1_QQ5AJ1IOyMuf6BfBlKmWVOAkZIblr5CozbZv_TqhDgRxZju3BTS-cX9TY_kMmYilF-LNASpNc3zfoZ6l5T2bvECADLUk7-0wvD3jY90anvi6YPm8fb2u8p8Ol9gfp0BoqIy6Xqgh62-8exMGDxwGIroJEF-5za8Vue49LdRIoaJWRpsOA%3D)**
[ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7v0nM9exwuu9TyJ7YKqxRHjMv5m4Ovol7n5U0MX4SFVxdyHj_KZ3X3lfSe1XTtwHR78Eb_oMW52MtvOFvfi5mdzaW-dfutq3zCx-nhBqNBZpCxDUD5Q18putGVM8ajAD_DtaZq1i-20YO_51k5HAMMJT7_GgxL6fB0oTrKF5R8hcw5qNyED8-7cpJSbnMFeuuDQxyaBwwXRQahQxPxN2KaiA%3D)** **[ **** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7vzo39ul8eqVefw7iDpWl-qPoJ4yBwqfMvk3SOmteJNN9HF7RYFBMBDdSrcBMJozfnUefIHRb0jQ-h_bBq3D-2k6pcczi2uTCPft4lkbwpeBiv6Zas9EwQTBG28z3SJfictDZc1vxPzbWE1Cce9GkmJSY7gxJ8oSjsbdM0bTp438-0gxD78qmuaDnGAMwFziIE6RR6jVV4uuOXkuyxqhF5ok%3D) ** ****_[I do not believe your tax dollars should be going to fund Democrat political campaigns by way of taxpayer-funded union dues and PACs.](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=83f951b389934d8d84c39af27be19c9e&_e=FS8bCm09aa3EGr05gRRLeBscqpdUpvUnsxe0eVzLOEoAuimcvrQdiJvI4WwRfPgANZmlddFNLhBew6ux77gFHKFo9peLHsnhgEDHqC9yDo0qM4e59gPwJ9pM-_89KdqPtPfiXHpWgznMe4gxHQzA8kSgi5E33d4gZLWE4W6L5V64cZFm5lqaAuEnwMIwHgwYi3ruDpwcxIybyUvTx6UK-wwSxih1aOwo3SDCrKe_WnLLF7BJiBs6MiWA-rAi6lvF64_uMuX8ACttHN80j0i7vzUbJOyo-bnfCpXy53kj-o-LjibISSGfH0GJNMarlkzmF6wXfLbn_FBz0yUaZmjfOSSFGwWjbEILxjegPOTWoebJI_JMau0LF9e0SEyEEfrwBBplzdCnxS_xzt88YtIwhFBq3GdtUVOKT964RWoClYvph57evd5trFzNJgpVR7ZU21aYmX6W_NcDp7bCQQboEnO9n3NxCoXgMNkn2GhZjuM%3D)_****
**[As a law enforcement officer, I support our police and first responders. But unlike my opponents, I don’t believe supporting law enforcement means supporting a taxpayer-funded union or a unionized workforce.

Yet some Republicans in this race think this is perfectly acceptable.

_**Your hard-earned tax dollars should not be forcefully taken from you to fund left-wing Democrat political campaigns or a unionized public workforce.**_

name: Rob Astorino
subject: HELP IS ON THE WAY
body:
SEVEN-POINT UPSTATE JOBS PLAN
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKLLFy_axZY8w1ZaJdcz-XokPiuj9agizHuw1Nf3qulDOzGGAuYbQFC0KCBsHD1ufC4yDJSeP2brbaR7nDNAAgyf5I77hv1kBbkuKdPRu0QR2V6RDQqe0_rhqLmQ55x87fTMUVtj9DcdR&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
|
---
| Friend,
Under Kathy Hochul, New York has officially been ranked as having THE WORST ECONOMIC OUTLOOK IN AMERICA.
That's right - New York was once the state of opportunity and economic growth, and under Andrew Cuomo and Kathy Hochul we're now ranked dead last! It's clear to all New Yorkers that the over-taxation, over-regulation, and blatant red-tape harassment of our small businesses have crippled our economy.
The time is now to make a real change for all New Yorkers. As the Former Westchester County Executive, I worked hard to lower taxes, reduce red tape, and bring more than 44,000 new private-sector jobs to Westchester County, and I'll work even harder to revive New York's economy and send our economic trajectory upward instead of downward.
HERE'S MY UPSTATE JOBS PLAN

---
| STEP 1:
Tax Relief - New York State is the highest taxed state in the nation. Goal - make New York the most competitive in the Northeast.

* Reduce the current 10 state income tax brackets to just three with lower rates.
* Reduce property taxes by allowing counties to opt-out of certain non-mandated Medicaid services and reduce mandates imposed on local governments.
* Eliminate the 2% Gross Receipts Tax on energy and the 18a tax assessment on utility ratepayers.
* Rein in state spending. New York has two million fewer residents than Florida, yet we have a state budget that is double Florida's.

---
| | | [$25 TAX RELIEF SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 2:
Regulatory Reform - New York State is the most regulated state in the nation with over 750,000 business regulations on the books, many unnecessary and strangling job growth and innovation.

* Institute a moratorium on any new regulation and a thorough review and cost/benefit analysis of the hundreds of thousands of regulations currently on the books, and the elimination of any regulation deemed high cost with little to no benefit.
* Reform the State Environmental Quality Review (SEQR) process by reducing costly delays and redundancies and increasing timeframe predictability.
* Reduce the number of licenses and fees.
* Reform the Workers Compensation system to include adopting American Medical Association guidelines and American College of Occupational and Environmental Medicine treatment protocols to cut down on costs.

---
| | | [$50 REGULATORY REFORM SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 3:
Invest in New York's infrastructure - National Transportation Research Nonprofit finds half of major locally or state-maintained roads are in poor or mediocre condition and 10% of bridges are rated poor or structurally deficient.

* Reallocate budget dollars to prioritize spending on New York's roads, bridges, Upstate broadband and other infrastructure needs.

---
| | | [$100 INVEST IN NEW YORK SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 4:
Accelerate Energy Development and make low-cost energy a competitive advantage for Upstate NY - The closing of Indian Point, banning of natural gas exploration in the southern tier and cancellation of numerous natural gas projects and pipelines have driven energy costs higher and made energy reliability uncertain.

* Lift the ban on natural gas exploration and drilling in the Southern Tier. A percentage of gross revenue will be returned directly to taxpayers in participating counties for property tax relief.
* Lift the bans on natural gas pipelines and natural gas hookups in new construction. *** Natural gas is not only the cleanest fossil fuel, emitting half the carbons that oil and coal emit, but it is incredibly abundant in the southern tier - Marcellus Shale (13 trillion cubic feet of gas) and the Utica Shale. It would be a boon to the economy (tens of thousands of new jobs Upstate, lower utility rates and billions in new revenue to the state).
* Explore siting a new nuclear power plant in the North Country, possibly in Massena. It was a big mistake to close Indian Point and the decision was based solely on politics. The people who lived closest to the plant supported it the most, it produced great jobs and safe, reliable and low-cost power that made up 25% of the energy needs of NYC and Westchester. A new plant Upstate could be an economic boon not just for the host community but also the region as a source of safe, reliable and low-cost power, which could help attract manufacturing and high-tech economies (such as crypto mining).

---
| | | [$250 NEW YORK ENERGY SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 5:
Accelerate Technology Start-Up Creation and Grow the Innovation Economy - Manufacturing sector historically has had the best job multiplier effect (1.6 jobs created as a result of 1 manufacturing job being created). Innovation sector has a 5-1 multiplier effect. New York State with its great engineering schools, colleges and universities stands poised to grow the innovation economy with a little assistance.

* Offer individuals a state income tax credit to encourage private investing in qualified start-up ventures.
* Streamline the tech-transfer process at state colleges and universities so students and professors can more easily commercialize their inventions.
* Pass a law that bans the enforceability of "non-compete agreements" - keeping more top talent in New York as it would open up greater opportunities for hi-tech workers and entrepreneurs by eliminating unnecessary restrictions on the flow of talent between companies.
* Support entrepreneurial networks with technical assistance to encourage collaboration across communities and organizations that support start-ups.
* Work with local colleges, universities and local businesses and investors to build commercial innovation campuses near local colleges and universities and incentivize recent graduates and other innovators to start their ventures and grow in New York.

---
| | | [$500 NEW YORK TECHNOLOGY SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 6: Increase Availability of Skilled Workers

* Create regional councils of local educators and employers to help high schools tailor vocational education programs to match the needs and demands of local employers.
* Make job-training investments directly to community colleges to streamline the training of new workers for local industry needs.
* Increase coordination between community colleges, local school districts and local industry so students can be properly counseled on the present and future availability of jobs, the types of jobs, their pay and benefits, and the skills needed to do these jobs.

---
| | | [$1,000 NEW YORK SKILLED WORKER SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| STEP 7: Strengthening our Agricultural Heritage and Economy

* Reduce taxes, fees and regulatory burdens on New York's family farmers.
* Eliminate Death Tax.
* Support a pilot program where beginning farmers receive tax incentives to start a farm in New York State.
* Restore whole milk to New York's schools.

---
| | | [$2,000 NEW YORK AGRICULTURAL HERITAGE & ECONOMY SUPPORTER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)
---
| It doesn't take a miracle to turn around an economy, it takes vision, discipline, and hard work. I'll bring all three to the job as governor. My principles and policy ideas are time-tested and proven to turn around this disastrous economic situation and encourage robust growth for all New Yorkers.
[Join my campaign today by contributing $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 you'll be sending a message to Kathy Hochul and the Democratic party that enough is enough.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xxKKqEk0Al9sxqL7jNqcrXEFvxh0_Vb4h8Cq-U9wlVIKGKRs5h_IKPCaueRHzhuOLDOp4eAoWoLXdcuEPHpCDh2fSWrgkQVDH0OatcTkksi8LXQgWKTjQVGio5ZzFUqYxevpUQY32TTTlZ4s8w6kBZg2wml3GfyucKUsshqdUXoUTFp_bxQwzFh2jtwRVR1I&c=TJ5wNIyp8JdJNcSiYyTdKTTIwznXL-OR6kU8LRFdJ09dxwcflQtI-Q==&ch=WQWMKJHxsxGn1LJRfa0JYVp6BFhcZilpo26ph3oRYAPLZqhT_0xYYA==)

It's clear to all New Yorkers that the over-taxation, over-regulation, and blatant red-tape harassment of our small businesses have crippled our economy. The time is now to make a real change for all New Yorkers. As the Former Westchester County Executive, I worked hard to lower taxes, reduce red tape, and bring more than 44,000 new private-sector jobs to Westchester County, and I'll work even harder to revive New York's economy and send our economic trajectory upward instead of downward. HERE'S MY UPSTATE JOBS PLAN | STEP 1: Tax Relief - New York State is the highest taxed state in the nation. Goal - make New York the most competitive in the Northeast. Reduce the current 10 state income tax brackets to just three with lower rates. Reduce property taxes by allowing counties to opt-out of certain non-mandated Medicaid services and reduce mandates imposed on local governments. Eliminate the 2% Gross Receipts Tax on energy and the 18a tax assessment on utility ratepayers. Rein in state spending. New York has two million fewer residents than Florida, yet we have a state budget that is double Florida's. | | | == | STEP 2: Regulatory Reform - New York State is the most regulated state in the nation with over 750,000 business regulations on the books, many unnecessary and strangling job growth and innovation. Institute a moratorium on any new regulation and a thorough review and cost/benefit analysis of the hundreds of thousands of regulations currently on the books, and the elimination of any regulation deemed high cost with little to no benefit. Reform the State Environmental Quality Review (SEQR) process by reducing costly delays and redundancies and increasing timeframe predictability. Reduce the number of licenses and fees. Reform the Workers Compensation system to include adopting American Medical Association guidelines and American College of Occupational and Environmental Medicine treatment protocols to cut down on costs. | | | == | STEP 3: Invest in New York's infrastructure - National Transportation Research Nonprofit finds half of major locally or state-maintained roads are in poor or mediocre condition and 10% of bridges are rated poor or structurally deficient. Reallocate budget dollars to prioritize spending on New York's roads, bridges, Upstate broadband and other infrastructure needs. | | | == | STEP 4: Accelerate Energy Development and make low-cost energy a competitive advantage for Upstate NY - The closing of Indian Point, banning of natural gas exploration in the southern tier and cancellation of numerous natural gas projects and pipelines have driven energy costs higher and made energy reliability uncertain. Lift the ban on natural gas exploration and drilling in the Southern Tier. A percentage of gross revenue will be returned directly to taxpayers in participating counties for property tax relief. Lift the bans on natural gas pipelines and natural gas hookups in new construction. Natural gas is not only the cleanest fossil fuel, emitting half the carbons that oil and coal emit, but it is incredibly abundant in the southern tier - Marcellus Shale (13 trillion cubic feet of gas) and the Utica Shale. It would be a boon to the economy (tens of thousands of new jobs Upstate, lower utility rates and billions in new revenue to the state). Explore siting a new nuclear power plant in the North Country, possibly in Massena. It was a big mistake to close Indian Point and the decision was based solely on politics. The people who lived closest to the plant supported it the most, it produced great jobs and safe, reliable and low-cost power that made up 25% of the energy needs of NYC and Westchester. A new plant Upstate could be an economic boon not just for the host community but also the region as a source of safe, reliable and low-cost power, which could help attract manufacturing and high-tech economies (such as crypto mining). | | | == | STEP 5: Accelerate Technology Start-Up Creation and Grow the Innovation Economy - Manufacturing sector historically has had the best job multiplier effect (1.6 jobs created as a result of 1 manufacturing job being created). Innovation sector has a 5-1 multiplier effect. New York State with its great engineering schools, colleges and universities stands poised to grow the innovation economy with a little assistance. Offer individuals a state income tax credit to encourage private investing in qualified start-up ventures. Streamline the tech-transfer process at state colleges and universities so students and professors can more easily commercialize their inventions. Pass a law that bans the enforceability of "non-compete agreements" - keeping more top talent in New York as it would open up greater opportunities for hi-tech workers and entrepreneurs by eliminating unnecessary restrictions on the flow of talent between companies. Support entrepreneurial networks with technical assistance to encourage collaboration across communities and organizations that support start-ups. Work with local colleges, universities and local businesses and investors to build commercial innovation campuses near local colleges and universities and incentivize recent graduates and other innovators to start their ventures and grow in New York. | | | == | STEP 6: Increase Availability of Skilled Workers Create regional councils of local educators and employers to help high schools tailor vocational education programs to match the needs and demands of local employers. Make job-training investments directly to community colleges to streamline the training of new workers for local industry needs. Increase coordination between community colleges, local school districts and local industry so students can be properly counseled on the present and future availability of jobs, the types of jobs, their pay and benefits, and the skills needed to do these jobs. | | | == | STEP 7: Strengthening our Agricultural Heritage and Economy Reduce taxes, fees and regulatory burdens on New York's family farmers. Eliminate Death Tax. Support a pilot program where beginning farmers receive tax incentives to start a farm in New York State. Restore whole milk to New York's schools. | | | == | It doesn't take a miracle to turn around an economy, it takes vision, discipline, and hard work. I'll bring all three to the job as governor. My principles and policy ideas are time-tested and proven to turn around this disastrous economic situation and encourage robust growth for all New Yorkers. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | I know you're sick of watching New York fall to the wayside. Together we can stand up for New York and bring economic prosperity back to our great state. HELP IS ON THE WAY! Don't forget to vote in the CRITICAL REPUBLICAN PRIMARY on JUNE 28. Thank you and God Bless, | | Rob Astorino Former Westchester County Executive Republican Candidate for Governor | PS: Make sure you get out to VOTE in the REPUBLICAN PRIMARY on JUNE 28! | | | == | | | == | | | | Rob Astorino for Governor | == | | Friends of Rob Astorino | PO Box 100, South Salem, NY 10590 | | Sent by mailto:info@robastorino.com powered by

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I don’t know how to say this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNkT9vwyAQxT-Nvdky2MFePFSqsqVrR4ThbNPwT3BulG9fnMbqkKWCAf24e8d7qFFJJYgs9UgbShvWUNIT2nR121M2t2KYuoaIExVF1wgDEesIYZuMlsKhSNfZRwm19LZcR9ay09DORErVNYMispfDNJB-omJSp3kuPy_8IrTRbvkQFsaIM4-Jo1j4FZwDda8w-iwOnFW0opST0owrYkhF-1bQc94J5BahvmkXQe1zM3s259PDQ16Vdk-lKgSJe2t7tt7BnQcDaoGifce4QUGZ5T6gdn9gQ8stKL3ZzCJ8p1XEgye_ZbuZ_6o-GELcK7_86g4XRlQJ3PNeChuEXvYJr887arxDcHiUsBcHVc6qjKMKN22MTqzP37HYnOUjevxPlD9QMaS-)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

name: Fight for Progress
subject: Honoring pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee

Happy Pride month! It’s not just a time of celebration, but also for reflection and action.

| Happy Pride month! It’s not just a time of celebration but also for reflection and action.

Right now, Republican state legislatures continue to push anti-trans legislation, with as many as 17 states enacting laws to ban transgender athletes from participating in organized sports alongside their identified gender, and that’s just the tip of the iceberg.

Organizations like the National Center for Transgender Equality fight every day to ensure the transgender community is represented at all levels. No matter the amount, your contribution can help push back against these harmful laws and create change for the better.

[_**So please, could you pitch in and support the National Center for Transgender Equality this Pride month?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46050044/348610676/329311962?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220602-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkOWI4NjgwLWI5ZTItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LfkXQ6qRDvXP_wrTJHMo0jFnncvEAty5i4c5Xds662o=)

Now it’s time to **show up & WIN for New Mexico!** Your support for my campaign through every step of this election has **proven** to Michelle Lujan Grisham & her out of state donors we have the momentum needed to take back New Mexico.
Now, with early voting open & votes rolling in, I'm **counting on you** to act today & help me **get out the vote by responding to my plan to vote survey immediately!**

The need to defeat MLG cannot be expressed strongly enough. She’s a **disaster** for our economy, our safety, & our schools. Her administration has left our borders **wide open,** our families **at risk** with the second highest rate of violent crime in the country, & left our kids **behind.** MLG is now trying to hide student testing data from the public until after the November election. She kept schools closed longer than our surrounding states, hurting our kids emotionally and academically. She has no plan to help them catch up, but apparently she does have a plan to protect herself politically – hide the test results!
I’m ready to FIGHT for a STRONG New Mexico, & we **need your help!** Share your plan to vote & help us **double down** on our voter outreach to ensure we earn **as many votes as possible.**

clean_body: Early voting ends THIS SATURDAY, June 4th! We’ve worked hard to get our message in front of as many New Mexican voters as possible. Now it’s time to s| | | | | Peter, Early voting ends THIS SATURDAY, June 4th! We’ve worked hard to get our message in front of as many New Mexican voters as possible. Now it’s time to show up & WIN for New Mexico! Your support for my campaign through every step of this election has proven to Michelle Lujan Grisham & her out of state donors we have the momentum needed to take back New Mexico. Now, with early voting open & votes rolling in, I'm counting on you to act today & help me get out the vote by responding to my plan to vote survey immediately! Every single response to the “Plan to Vote” survey ensures our success! I’m counting on collecting as many responses as possible to this crucial survey so that my team can spend these final days allocating our time & resources to voters we haven’t heard from yet. Peter, because we know that you’re such a strong supporter of my campaign, we don’t want to leave you behind! Do you have a plan to vote? Please take a moment to respond today! The need to defeat MLG cannot be expressed strongly enough. She’s a disaster for our economy, our safety, & our schools. Her administration has left our borders wide open, our families at risk with the second highest rate of violent crime in the country, & left our kids behind. MLG is now trying to hide student testing data from the public until after the November election. She kept schools closed longer than our surrounding states, hurting our kids emotionally and academically. She has no plan to help them catch up, but apparently she does have a plan to protect herself politically – hide the test results! I’m ready to FIGHT for a STRONG New Mexico, & we need your help! Share your plan to vote & help us double down on our voter outreach to ensure we earn as many votes as possible. We can’t afford to leave even one vote to chance. You have supported us for too long & together we’ve come too far to achieve anything less than victory on election day. | | We have to give everything we’ve got until election day on June 7th! For early voting location near you, visit my website: Thank you, Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. | | Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46050184/348611680/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQzOTMyZC1iYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2Atfz3R9_T3Aqc0V_5u-wxh80E7x02Nk524udxFzk=)
I'll cut to it, Peter.

I'm humbly asking you to **[contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46050186/348611681/976319900?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQzOTMyZC1iYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2Atfz3R9_T3Aqc0V_5u-wxh80E7x02Nk524udxFzk=)** to bolster our final turnout efforts so we can win the primary and unseat Ken Calvert. With just 5 days until ballots are counted, we're picking up incredible momentum. Let me explain what I mean, and why this request is so important.
1. We just got word that for the first time in our district's history, Democrats now hold a narrow registration advantage in CA-41. **Registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans in this district.**

2. A recent survey conducted by a third-party pollster showed our campaign neck and neck with Ken Calvert in a General Election matchup. **42% of likely voters support me with 41% backing Calvert. We're the strongest Democratic candidate to unseat him.**

CA-41 is no longer the Republican stronghold it once was. It’s clear local voters are ready to part ways with Calvert, but we need to keep pushing through next Tuesday:

**[Our data shows that we still need to increase Democrat turnout if we’re going to win this primary, so we set an end-of-week goal of $15,000 to keep our momentum going. Will you rush in $3 or more to help us win this primary, defeat Calvert, and flip this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46050187/348611682/976319900?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQzOTMyZC1iYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2Atfz3R9_T3Aqc0V_5u-wxh80E7x02Nk524udxFzk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46050188/348611683/976319900?refcode=em-6.2.22-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQzOTMyZC1iYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2Atfz3R9_T3Aqc0V_5u-wxh80E7x02Nk524udxFzk=)

clean_body: | = I'll cut to it, Peter. I'm humbly asking you to = to bolster our final turnout efforts so we can win the primary and unseat Ken Calvert. With just 5 days until ballots are counted, we're picking up incredible momentum. Let me explain what I mean, and why this request is so important. 1. We just got word that for the first time in our district's history, Democrats now hold a narrow registration advantage in CA-41. Registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans in this district. 2. A recent survey conducted by a third-party pollster showed our campaign neck and neck with Ken Calvert in a General Election matchup. 42% of likely voters support me with 41% backing Calvert. We're the strongest Democratic candidate to unseat him. CA-41 is no longer the Republican stronghold it once was. It’s clear local voters are ready to part ways with Calvert, but we need to keep pushing through next Tuesday: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all that you do, Will Rollins = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. I’m so proud to have you by my side

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46050312/348611833/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQzOTMyZC1iYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tf6ChPYXhAwmMnN1YjmaCUqSbAiomFZ0LW14uk4VjsM=)

Hi friend, it’s Nikki.

I’m reaching out with fantastic news – thanks to the support and generosity of this grassroots team, _we exceeded our May fundraising goal!_

**THANK YOU, from the bottom of my heart!**

I'll be honest: Running for office isn't easy. It takes up all of your time and energy, but I'm constantly revitalized and motivated to keep pushing ahead because of the wonderful people that I'm meeting on the campaign trail.

We have our Primary Election coming up this month, and I’m so proud to have you by my side. I know that together we _will_ win this race and make sure that the voices of Central and Southern Illinois are heard in Washington.

With gratitude,

_Nikki_ | **_A BRIEF NOTE FROM NIKKI'S TEAM:_**

Nikki is running for Congress in an ultra competitive district – her campaign has been added to the prestigious "Red-to-Blue" list.

**Republicans are fighting HARD to keep this seat – Nikki is already facing far-right attacks and the GOP is preparing to launch ads against Democrats. Heading into the primary election, we need to raise money to turn out _every voter possible._**

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: Gun Lobby or our Children?
body:
This must come to an end.
| | Dear Peter,

It's time to ask this question: **What is more important, the gun lobby or our children?** David Schweikert has voted to protect the NRA and keep military guns in the hands of people with mental behavior issues. To make matters worse, he has voted against background checks.

Do you want Schweikert to stay in Congress and continue allowing voting to promote military-style guns in the hands of wrong people? Or will you help me defeat Schweikert and _fight for our children_?
I will work with Gabby Giffords and her organization to stop gun violence, bring mental health nurses to schools, get bills passed to have mandatory background checks and more. These horrific killings of our children must come to an end.
It's time to get things done in Congress.
Please, help this campaign today and say you're with me in this fight! Thank you for your support,Delina
---

clean_body: This must come to an end. | | Dear Peter, It's time to ask this question: What is more important, the gun lobby or our children? David Schweikert has voted to protect the NRA and keep military guns in the hands of people with mental behavior issues. To make matters worse, he has voted against background checks. Do you want Schweikert to stay in Congress and continue allowing voting to promote military-style guns in the hands of wrong people? Or will you help me defeat Schweikert and fight for our children? I will work with Gabby Giffords and her organization to stop gun violence, bring mental health nurses to schools, get bills passed to have mandatory background checks and more. These horrific killings of our children must come to an end. It's time to get things done in Congress. Please, help this campaign today and say you're with me in this fight! Thank you for your support,Delina | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | | | | | | | | | | == | == | == | | PO BOX 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327, United States of America | | or | |

_
_ Peter,

A lot has happened in the last month: I not only won my primary on May 17th, one the same day I learned that my opponent in the November election is going to be a member of the far-Left. A woman who has previously served as the Oregon Labor Commissioner, no less. We're going to have our work cut out for us.

This race isn’t going to be won on November 8th, it’s going to be won by acting like each day between now and Election Day (**159 days from today**) is Election Day.

I firmly believe that when someone does an act of kindness for another person, and I do consider a donation to be an act of kindness, then they deserve a "**thank you.** "

Guess which state was ranked #1? Pennsylvania. 😱 Believe it or not, Peter, this is the fourth consecutive time that PA was ranked as the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we raise as much money as possible to show that John Fetterman is the candidate who can win in this tough and expensive general election against and the Republicans. = | | = This is really big news for our 67 County grassroots campaign. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing! Thanks for everything, Team Fetterman | |

| | Friend, My name is Katie Sawyer and I’m reaching out to you for the first time as Derek’s new running mate. I wanted to say - THANK YOU! Thank you for the outpouring of support for me and most importantly thank you for your steadfast support for Derek Schmidt and his campaign to be our next Kansas Governor. I'm honored to answer this call to service and humbled that Derek has placed his confidence in me to help him get Kansas on track after years of continual disappointment from the Kelly administration. **Kansas needs stronger leadership and Derek Schmidt will provide it. ** Derek Schmidt and I will be a Governor and Lieutenant Governor who fight every day for families like yours and mine to make Kansas the best state in America to live, work, raise a family, and grow a business. I can’t wait to hit the campaign trail and share our positive vision for a brighter future for our state, but Derek and I are going to need your support along the way. **Will you chip in anything you can, right now, to help us jumpstart the Schmidt-Sawyer ticket?[https://secure.winred.com/schmidt-for-kansas/contribute](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=c94be00ff8514343a2b14c19bcf18513&_e=QVWkshSSqnCP9mM0AAOAmBR-Zj5l4epWHfVH6ssEjk-4lqhqbe3WYgnqw8izikpzZOzOIrXKk7jNtzDfuYePax2u_Iv2J5Lz22he3GqkPLVnMzj36i2dxe2DNqGa3jgDCO589trL1IGmCTeM6iB102mcyvYNmWRcnXank7g0qb7rjD2exAfXG9Lez_CPieI05xIS-UXkJ6OYY-MmRyI5mwC8JNDWYLgDiOqx2YfVXDbr2qa1XKHIOXgo3r5W6f4bPafoWcrkLoiMK22O2myrxN12G5wXBG3z9I-11RNzIYmJMJxxLzRDSR_-X6qyHRDrx08GyPqv6ydz8ScSBiMOlHJ1XF2nd9a2WjtvsFZGnjeDRafMrrRZYbhqOqTDHp4VFvivY5hzVbx_L8Ul3iEkyPkfkqixJoA52zBBa0OY97Kpcx-g_P_66XrzsdaA1TsZDATNUt6JJnEuaeiFf1UzFfCVfAgwFcp9Tf7r-1LktiCnnEa2omr8_PG9kSc_rc0cXMyP6hN4ObO9iev9GyhqRA%3D%3D)**

I don’t know about you, but I’m tired of leaders like Joe Biden and Laura Kelly pandering to the Woke Left instead of prioritizing our values. Support for things like religious freedom, the rule of law, life, freedom to speak openly, and the Second Amendment - these are the values that make Kansas great. There is nothing better than a hard day’s work and quality time with family. Kansas families, small businesses, farmers and ranchers, schools and communities are the backbone of our state. We need a small, efficient, and effective government - for the people and by the people. Not one that overreaches into our everyday lives and tries to tell us it is a crime to go to church or that our job is non-essential. Not one that spends far more money than it takes in, and uses that reckless spending as an excuse to raise taxes on hardworking Kansas families.
---

clean_body: My name is Katie Sawyer and I’m reaching out to you for the first time as Derek’s new running mate. I wanted to say - THANK YOU! Thank you for the out| | | | | Friend, My name is Katie Sawyer and I’m reaching out to you for the first time as Derek’s new running mate. I wanted to say - THANK YOU! Thank you for the outpouring of support for me and most importantly thank you for your steadfast support for Derek Schmidt and his campaign to be our next Kansas Governor. I'm honored to answer this call to service and humbled that Derek has placed his confidence in me to help him get Kansas on track after years of continual disappointment from the Kelly administration. Kansas needs stronger leadership and Derek Schmidt will provide it. Derek Schmidt and I will be a Governor and Lieutenant Governor who fight every day for families like yours and mine to make Kansas the best state in America to live, work, raise a family, and grow a business. I can’t wait to hit the campaign trail and share our positive vision for a brighter future for our state, but Derek and I are going to need your support along the way. Will you chip in anything you can, right now, to help us jumpstart the Schmidt-Sawyer ticket? I don’t know about you, but I’m tired of leaders like Joe Biden and Laura Kelly pandering to the Woke Left instead of prioritizing our values. Support for things like religious freedom, the rule of law, life, freedom to speak openly, and the Second Amendment - these are the values that make Kansas great. There is nothing better than a hard day’s work and quality time with family. Kansas families, small businesses, farmers and ranchers, schools and communities are the backbone of our state. We need a small, efficient, and effective government - for the people and by the people. Not one that overreaches into our everyday lives and tries to tell us it is a crime to go to church or that our job is non-essential. Not one that spends far more money than it takes in, and uses that reckless spending as an excuse to raise taxes on hardworking Kansas families. Serving as Kansas’ next Lieutenant Governor alongside Derek Schmidt will be a great honor, and I’ll need your help every step of the way. Derek’s excited for what the next five months or so between now and Election Day will bring. I’m excited to help share our positive vision for a brighter Kansas future. Can we count on you to be a major part of our team? Thank you,Katie Sawyer | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | | | ---|---|---
