name: American Action News
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqk0slhjhe493vj4h4p3hhe3sjfb4a1aadmhk9ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecrlmmp31d5gepprapb7cmrr2ctimho70tdk63gj6d5jm5j36pllmdhrac5kcsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddhcur6cphkciqj4ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeljkmeatsecfbev12gagglthg1323avoipvtus0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziep6ffjp4dr0ni84k03iopbnorg1c90teupo4d8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h2bs)**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fuhkeo0nqta1a6kvor74f9fjghd2c2pdipe0c8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2v2g7f269jf4h9g5o1c2v00osa9fdik6v5nppo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv5v8hf1uftka1p39i9rlgeoubet9qngd9gou4r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h2bs)**_
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4jq3sem2tabq81esrgmj678f07pe6frq6p31m20_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9g66o34s5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Louis Lyras Campaign
subject: March For Our Lives Volunteers
body:
Hi everyone!

A March For Our Lives march will be taking place on Saturday, June 11th from 11:00 am - 2:00 pm. The march will start at Youngstown State. We are looking for volunteers to walk in the march on behalf of the campaign. We must push back against the efforts of the gun lobby, and fight to protect our fellow citizens! If you are interested in volunteering, please respond to this email.

Let's march, fight, and win.
Phone: (330) 301-2059
Address: 3763 McCartney Rd, Lowellville, OH 44436

body:
This election is about defending the freedom to vote.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46051186/348615028/1793776944?refcode=em_20220602_f_f_ffbn_s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk0MjU4Yi1iZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c95aly3tx47A8U2drD8x7VVOKZ_I1Jl9oxMtKNw1szo=&emci=aa94258b-bee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=ad94258b-bee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1037277)

| | It’s official. After earning 44% of the vote in the primary, Bee Nguyen is heading to a runoff election on June 21. We were proud to endorse Bee for Georgia Secretary of State, and we’re ready to do the work to help Bee win the runoff in June. [_**That’s why we’re asking: Can you please split a $20 contribution to Bee and Fair Fight to power her campaign to victory and support voting rights champions like her down the ballot and across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46051187/348615029/1742460602?refcode=em_20220602_f_f_ffbn_s1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk0MjU4Yi1iZWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c95aly3tx47A8U2drD8x7VVOKZ_I1Jl9oxMtKNw1szo=) Bee is committed to protecting the future of our democracy and to ensuring we have free, fair, and efficient elections across Georgia. As founder of a non-profit organization to support and educate girls in underserved communities and a current member of the Georgia legislature, she knows what it means to fight for our communities. This runoff will determine who will go up against the Republican incumbent Brad Raffensperger in the general election and preside over the 2024 elections. clean_body: This election is about defending the freedom to vote. Fair Fight | | | It’s official. After earning 44% of the vote in the primary, Bee Nguyen is heading to a runoff election on June 21. We were proud to endorse Bee for Georgia Secretary of State, and we’re ready to do the work to help Bee win the runoff in June. = Bee is committed to protecting the future of our democracy and to ensuring we have free, fair, and efficient elections across Georgia. As founder of a non-profit organization to support and educate girls in underserved communities and a current member of the Georgia legislature, she knows what it means to fight for our communities. This runoff will determine who will go up against the Republican incumbent Brad Raffensperger in the general election and preside over the 2024 elections. And with the tactics we’ve seen to limit voting access in this presidential battleground state, it’s never been more important to elect Bee — a strong leader in the fight to protect voting rights. This deadline expires SOON!

Friend - this is URGENT!

Our impending deadline is JUST around the corner, and the **Democrats have pulled ahead of our fundraising numbers! **

If we don't catch up in the next 30 minutes, we will FAIL to reach our goal - and the radical left will achieve victory! As the underdog in this race, the Democrats have made me their TOP target - I've taken on the bureaucratic left before, but this is a whole new ball game.

_Everything is on the line with this deadline and we need your help immediately. There's no time to waste._

That's why, for the next 30 minutes until our deadline, we're activating our RARE 3X match. ANY and EVERY donation made will now have THREE TIMES the impact to ensure our success.

BUT - you have to claim this offer IMMEDIATELY. Without your immediate action, all hope of flipping the Senate could be lost! [**Please, stop what you're doing and send your support now before it's too late:**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248550/1/)
**[**ACTIVATE 3X MATCHING**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248550/2/)** **[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT NOW**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248550/3/)**
Please, Friend - I'm really counting on your help. You've always been one of our top Patriots, so I know I can rely on you.

[**Don't let our whole team down - act now and help us BEAT the Democrat's today!**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248551/4/)

Onwards to victory,
Tiffany Smiley
_P.S: Make sure you never miss an update from Tiffany or Team Smiley! Be sure to add <info@smileyforwashington.com> and our phone number 47682 to your contacts so you stay in the loop!_

* * *

**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home.
Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That is why I'm running for Senate. **

[](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248039/5/)

[**If you agree we need to stand up for our nation's heroes, will you chip in to help me reach my major upcoming goal? I need your support, Friend!**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12981210/407426320/248039/6/)

Here we go again, friend. In a recent op-ed, Biden finally admits that inflation is a serious crisis for America. But instead of taking accountability, Biden blames everyone else for the current inflation spike. The partisan blame game is a major reason why nothing ever gets done in Washington, and we're going to do something about it. **Let's show Washington the strength in numbers of Americans that are fed up with politicians on both sides of the aisle who would rather pander to the extremes of their party than take accountability and get things done.** [**Add**** your name to our petition and demand the Biden ****administration & Congress**** take responsibility for their actions and work to solve the inflation crisis.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=b4435ee4b1d4493b882bf517ed11a7eb&_e=YToNC28tNBQsBj5npXsw9fkRrfF_1otlLtJuJNRdFIphfhZnVTo2YBRH0xXoKomSgwlzrJWxs9rVMuRcaMZHjeQnxOcwr7knqKW20RJB6-QqGHczQgw0B07PmHQV0csdKwomERNLO58zdsTFfBHrFfgwMGk5YopLrqLWlcYFcvtG9qMd6_XvPCA7V_VMSw8uGQH6Hva68wXBgDkmMfmKlKQ9iTa8xLhNuHIRzoq3MWbbt_RNK-CWK_Zdz0aKxFFx9XpXA6D9dLO0Ezpem1z3gAg4Nrc9JbPjHFN76iKnQ9rIL04UDLl4yxwZclPODSp6IjgAedWeLChvPWzvXhCcQhjhUYN18Vdc4XeqH3sSMPs%3D)

| | _**Governor Larry Hogan said it best: "Joe Biden caters to the far-left extremes of his party and flails from crisis to crisis, showing weakness to the world."**_ Biden is constantly searching the horizon for a boogeyman that can shoulder the blame for his administration's failures, rather than focusing on and solving our country's challenges through old fashion common sense compromise. Inflation is not a problem that just impacts Republicans or Democrats. _**It impacts all Americans!**_ Both sides continue to play partisan politics and the blame game rather than face the issue straight on. Let's show Washington the strength in numbers of Americans that are fed up with politicians on both sides of the aisle who would rather pander to the extremes of their party than take accountability and get things done. | | Governor Larry Hogan said it best: "Joe Biden caters to the far-left extremes of his party and flails from crisis to crisis, showing weakness to the world." Biden is constantly searching the horizon for a boogeyman that can shoulder the blame for his administration's failures, rather than focusing on and solving our country's challenges through old fashion common sense compromise. Inflation is not a problem that just impacts Republicans or Democrats. It impacts all Americans! Both sides continue to play partisan politics and the blame game rather than face the issue straight on. Thank you,Team An America United | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | Paid for by An America United | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | |

Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. clean_body: “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” | Peter, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Greg’s opponent has been in Congress in parts of four different decades, and all he has to show for it is a mountain of gun lobby and corporate PAC dollars.**All while Ohio families have been left behind.**

But our campaign isn’t built on dark money dollars, it’s backed by folks like you, chipping in just a few bucks at a time. **Here’s how we put every dollar to work:**

🚪 Funding our **on-the-ground operations** to meet voters where they are and to build our grassroots movement.
📺 Powering our **TV and online ads** to sway undecided voters and turn out strong Democrats.
💪 Fueling our team to keep growing, **hiring organizers** and campaign staff to make an impact in communities across the first district.

[**In this crucial battleground district, we’re counting on you to chip in $3 and help fuel our movement to victory and help save our razor-thin Democratic House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052122/348619261/1550471497?amount=3&refcode=GLFC_20220602_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmU5MjM3Ny1jMWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCvxa88gNihmZA4TYZxK0M2kVy28zAvFj_D0UaY269w=)

clean_body: This is where your $3 goes: | = We know this is probably one of about a dozen fundraising emails that have hit your inbox today, but we think you deserve an explanation of where exactly your donations actually go on our campaign. = | = Greg’s opponent has been in Congress in parts of four different decades, and all he has to show for it is a mountain of gun lobby and corporate PAC dollars.All while Ohio families have been left behind. But our campaign isn’t built on dark money dollars, it’s backed by folks like you, chipping in just a few bucks at a time. Here’s how we put every dollar to work: 🚪 Funding our on-the-ground operations to meet voters where they are and to build our grassroots movement. 📺 Powering our TV and online ads to sway undecided voters and turn out strong Democrats. 💪 Fueling our team to keep growing, hiring organizers and campaign staff to make an impact in communities across the first district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for being on this team, — Team Landsman | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. | | Peter, We had steep fundraising goals in May, and thanks to this team of grassroots supporters, we were able to hit those goals. And it’s critical we did, because we just launched our very first ad of the primary. Ads like these are an integral part of getting our message out across the district. [_**Click here to watch our ad, and then chip in to help keep it on the air.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052159/348619331/-1772031328?refcode=em_20220602_f_a_ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4MjBiMy1jMWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GdDDa8s-uJ0GZiiDOrMTbk3rf4yl-lQxPxJ02uj0NI8=) Our campaign is the only one in the race not taking any contributions from corporate PACs. And we’re building the movement that puts workers at the center of every decision. We’re fighting for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. And we’re going to get it done, together. Our opponent has a lot of money from Republican-funded special interests. We’re fueled by folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can — our most common contribution is $10. [_**Can you pitch in $10 to keep our ads on the air?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052160/348619332/-1772031328?refcode=em_20220602_f_a_ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4MjBiMy1jMWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GdDDa8s-uJ0GZiiDOrMTbk3rf4yl-lQxPxJ02uj0NI8=) This race is going to be tight — and with early voting starting in just a few weeks, we’re doing everything we can to reach voters where they’re at. I’m proud of what we accomplished in May, and I can’t wait to see what we do in June. Thanks for being a part of this team. I’m glad you’re here. Let’s go!

name: Tara Pohlmeyer
subject: Celebrate PRIDE by fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Pride Month is here.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052201/348619489/-86756021?refcode=emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ExOGRkOS1jMWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6tHiHJKEDuJe3U4UIYi7gNBM3mENKkYz9UXUVV-HRg=)
---
Hi Peter, Pride Month is here, and we’re taking this time to recommit to our shared fight for equality. This year has been difficult for so many of our LGBTQIA+ neighbors, who are being attacked by extremist politicians relentlessly right now. That’s why it’s important we continue to fight back with everything we have to protect our fellow Texans. We just [launched our 2022 Pride merch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052202/348619490/1403401676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ExOGRkOS1jMWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6tHiHJKEDuJe3U4UIYi7gNBM3mENKkYz9UXUVV-HRg=&emci=f163520f-bce2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=a7a18dd9-c1e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6830379), and every dollar donated goes toward promoting progressive policies and candidates. clean_body: Pride Month is here.| | | = Hi Peter, Pride Month is here, and we’re taking this time to recommit to our shared fight for equality. This year has been difficult for so many of our LGBTQIA+ neighbors, who are being attacked by extremist politicians relentlessly right now. That’s why it’s important we continue to fight back with everything we have to protect our fellow Texans. We just , and every dollar donated goes toward promoting progressive policies and candidates. No matter what month it is, we must commit to fighting for equality. clean_body: Its now or never for persuading voters in IL-7 | | | Dear Team, The mail ballots have arrived. Early voting has begun. Today, hundreds of people will vote in the primary election for IL-7. Here's the question I’m asking myself: Did we reach them? We have knocked over 18,000 doors, made close to 150,000 phone calls, sent out 4,000 postcards, and tens of thousands of pieces of mail. We have to do more. We are making calls and knocking doors every single day. If you cannot make it this week, there is next week. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Peter -

In April, a terrorist was released into the U.S. by Border Patrol and was given a GPS monitoring device instead of being held in jail. **_A KNOWN TERRORIST was given a GPS monitor and set loose into our country!_**

The FBI identified him as a terrorist threat, and then WEEKS later, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement arrested him in Pinellas County, FL!

**The Biden Administration allowed a known terrorist to live in my community for weeks!** The wide-open border and lax enforcement put you at risk for a terrorist attack in your own backyard. We need to seal the border now.

[**Will you support my campaign to enforce immigration laws and keep terrorists out of our nation?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=ab1e3ce5ef4c4ebb907c7e73cd857ee9&_e=LCCadSkzjgp5Pf25qqoeoaaGzxmvXU22TKeDZv78ttM4Mxg4tAx7JWY8sb4MuMNtx8MsxqtRNtRpXxEMLNhE6Bx3TWHO8ZOtleqQPLRJKepO-Jq7LuHl57ZgxTylrajK5y8w8SVa59rgIMKK74KjrWfAoEj0QXxxLpPAPDeeZqqNJ_GINo-qa3xKAzCaEsyHT-gtePZu7osxaUfeTGGXyaAEhb0XvGVELyW9nU0n1BwpqOuKXr_2K1Max6qRU1IiOswnualhkXjJbh0xsSyK6lXzUhuh7D0E5GmKq6hqRFII9XPk7ZMZmiqkTpIy7eFEFOn2SVs7fu6poxxg7xYvRi715_trUgV6iofSVJkkkQc-F9jxWvkVNsMpAAEw87lzWtqKKIFkoK8X7uaiGaf2UIVXXzyll_lHAsCL1Qz5-ITU2krlVRkDQXVvJld5BpUVp71PyJKKJASe8JvMQdFONQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: A KNOWN TERRORIST was given a GPS monitor and set loose into our country! | Peter - In April, a terrorist was released into the U.S. by Border Patrol and was given a GPS monitoring device instead of being held in jail. A KNOWN TERRORIST was given a GPS monitor and set loose into our country! The FBI identified him as a terrorist threat, and then WEEKS later, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement arrested him in Pinellas County, FL! The Biden Administration allowed a known terrorist to live in my community for weeks! The wide-open border and lax enforcement put you at risk for a terrorist attack in your own backyard. We need to seal the border now. Governor DeSantis has demanded that the Biden Administration tell them how many illegal aliens have been dropped into Florida, but now we need to know how many know terrorists are living next door! President Biden is allowing us to be directly terrorized by his relaxed immigration policies. The road to a Republican House Majority runs through FL-13, but we need to make sure the right conservative is elected. Thank you, Amanda Makki Community Conservative for FL-13 | | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! ---|--- | Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but . A KNOWN TERRORIST was given a GPS monitor and set loose into our country!

name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: the NBA Finals 🏀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
a look inside our campaign — and our budget shortfall | | |
---
Folks, it’s game time. And we’re facing a budget gap. In a sec, I’m going to ask you to **[make a contribution to our campaign,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052519/348620815/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1127-fr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGIyY2VhNy1jM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWYfGjDG6H-Uk4GGDH06y1w0ZoFcLJzAMz-VFdq8h80=)** but first, I want to explain why this week is particularly important. Right now, the Boston Celtics are in the NBA Finals. That’s a big deal for New England sports fans – and it’s also a big deal for our race. The good news? Senator Hassan is a lifelong Celtics fan. The bad news? **In order to get our ads on the air for the NBA Finals, we needed to increase our weekly ad budget by nearly 50%. That means we still need to raise an additional $9,432 before midnight.** You may know that a big chunk of New Hampshire is in the Boston TV market. That makes it expensive any time of the year to run a campaign here — but especially right now. And this extra cost wasn’t in our budget. I told Senator Hassan that the Celtics making the finals would be expensive for the campaign. And she (respectfully) told me to shut up, because it was well worth it. **[Anyway, I need your help right now. We’ve got to make up this budget gap — and fast. Mitch McConnell just poured an additional $4.7 million dollars of attack ads into New Hampshire, and we can’t fall behind now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052522/348620817/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1127-fr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGIyY2VhNy1jM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWYfGjDG6H-Uk4GGDH06y1w0ZoFcLJzAMz-VFdq8h80=)** | | [RUSH $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052524/348620818/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1127-fr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGIyY2VhNy1jM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWYfGjDG6H-Uk4GGDH06y1w0ZoFcLJzAMz-VFdq8h80=)

Thank you for your support.
Aaron Jacobs
Campaign Manager

name: Wisconsin Senate Alert
subject: NEW POLL: Godlewski surging in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:

body:
Now is the time for bold leadership.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052737/348621552/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220602-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZiMThkMy1jNGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1d_gsSzfwF7pd6l8wRAAawl4n1nJ_ISl8ArpDvpocw=)

| Recently, our primary opponent refused to answer **“yes”** or **“no”** on whether he would support a federal assault weapons ban.

On the heels of three devastating mass shootings – one of which took place in our state – _**supporting this commonsense measure is a no-brainer.**_

Now is the time for bold leadership, and in the wake of senseless violence, there is no room for the kind of political calculation our opponent is making.

_**This is a simple question to answer, and that answer is a resounding “yes.”**_

[_**The choice in this race is clear. Democrat Matt Putorti is the only candidate who represents our values. Can you give $5 right now to help him pull ahead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052738/348621553/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220602-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZiMThkMy1jNGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1d_gsSzfwF7pd6l8wRAAawl4n1nJ_ISl8ArpDvpocw=)

More than that, we need to implement the following reforms, **and Matt Putorti is driven to fight for each in Congress:**
* Universal background checks
* Red flag laws
* Closing the gun-show loophole
* Increased funding for the CDC to study gun violence
* A federal assault weapons ban
* Repealing the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act

As a lawyer, **Matt devoted hundreds of pro bono hours to working with the Giffords Law Center to Prevent Gun Violence.** He was part of a team that filed a lawsuit to ensure the national criminal background check system had accurate information so that guns were kept out of the hands of people who are legally not allowed to have them, like those convicted of domestic violence.

Matt is the only candidate in this race to present a plan to curb the gun violence epidemic. _The call of the moment is too strong to ignore._

[_**Please, to support honorable, decisive leadership, contribute to our campaign today. We deserve an action-taker in Congress, and Matt Putorti is that leader.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46052740/348621556/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220602-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZiMThkMy1jNGUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1d_gsSzfwF7pd6l8wRAAawl4n1nJ_ISl8ArpDvpocw=)

body:
Peter,
We have BIG news!
Today, Florida College Democrats formally endorsed Nikki! Click here to stand with them and chip in $20 right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=602fcd]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=602fcd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=602fcd]
Not only did the Florida College Democrats endorse Nikki, but she won their endorsement with 75% of the vote!
And here’s why: Young Floridians are sick and tired of watching Democrats run the same playbook and lose.
They saw Nikki’s groundbreaking campaign in 2018, and they know Nikki’s the ONLY Democrat who has what it takes to defeat Ron DeSantis, end the GOP’s one-party rule, and bring something new to Florida.
We don’t need more of the same. We need someone with the courage and the compassion to deliver for all Floridians. If you agree, click here to join Florida College Democrats and support Nikki Fried. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=602fcd]
Thanks!
— Team Nikki

subject: Evil Attacks Innocent Children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
My advice for Americans during these dark times | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/my-advice-for-americans-during-these-dark-times?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=12290c3744&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,
**Pure evil struck an elementary school, ripped families apart, and shocked our nation.**

The immediate reaction by the Left was blaming Republicans for the actions of this murderer.

The Biden Administration and most Democrats have taken this tragedy to push for gun control, suggesting that if it wasn’t for a gun, this murderer would be a well-adjusted individual.

**_Yet schools remain the most unprotected institutions in America_**.

I discussed this in a recent op-ed, which can be read [here](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e4e1935f8e&e=645b3b1338).

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=00643a1a1c&e=645b3b1338)

My colleagues and I in government are surrounded by a large police force. Entrances are guarded. If Congress can be afforded this protection, so can our children.

If Ukraine can receive the shipment of $62 billion in aid to empower self-protection of foreigners, _our American taxpayer dollars should also be available to safeguard our most cherished children_.

**The attempt to radically transform our nation is being fought before our very eyes. The values we have held dear since our nation’s founding are under assault at the time when we need to uphold them the most.**

As we battle together for the soul of our nation, **_I reject_** the attempts by the Left to render Americans defenseless.

**I encourage every American to take gun training and learn self-defense.**

**As your Congressman** , I will stand against any attempts to disarm law-abiding Americans. Together we can lawfully exercise our God-given right to defend the lives of our loved ones.

Your support of my reelection campaign [**with a donation of any amount today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=23604339f9&e=645b3b1338) will show Democrats our determination to preserve American life through our Constitutional freedoms and rights.
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=71a1c6193e&e=645b3b1338) In Liberty,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7a01efa894&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Currently Serving Arizona’s 4th CD
Candidate for Arizona’s 9th CD _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=918c04e0fe&e=645b3b1338)**_

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The Ban Corporate PAC Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220602&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220602&amount=28]
Team,
For far too long, corporate money has flooded Michigan’s elections. To put it in perspective, $4.4 billion from outside groups has been spent in federal elections since the Supreme Court’s Citizens United decision 12 years ago – determining that the political contributions of corporations are protected under the First Amendment.
It’s warped our country’s political process, and bent it to suit the corporations’ narrow agendas – drowning out the voices of everyday Michiganders in the process.
That’s why I co-sponsored the Ban Corporate PAC Act. The corrupt influence of corporate money has real consequences for Michigan families – just look at our inability to take on the pharmaceutical industry and lower the cost of prescription drugs.
When I first ran for Congress back in 2018, I pledged to never accept a dime of corporate PAC money. I never wanted my constituents to question whose interests I was fighting for, or why I voted the way I did. But, the reality is that some self-interested politicians end up bowing to special interest groups, ultimately parroting their talking points and voting their way in exchange for funding for their campaigns. Take my opponent, for example — during his time in the state legislature, over 90% of his funding came from PACs and interest groups. I’m proud that my campaign is funded by individuals – in fact, over 89% of our contributions are of $100 or less.
This bill will serve as a shot across the bow to our system, and I will continue to push Democratic Party leadership to bring it to the House Floor for a vote.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220602&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Matt Benda Withdraws Bid for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | JUNE 2, 2022
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
---
For more information contact:
Gregg Peppin 612-209-9351
---
|
## MATT BENDA WITHDRAWS BID FOR CONGRESS
---
| ALBERT LEA, MINNESOTA – Matt Benda has withdrawn his candidacy for Congress in Minnesota’s First Congressional District. The unique circumstances of a special election being held in an overlapping time frame with a regularly scheduled general election necessitated detailed reporting requirements and thorough due diligence to ensure compliance.

“There were unprecedented federal election commission details that needed to be resolved prior to me formally withdrawing from this race. I spent the past two days working with my compliance and legal team to resolve these issues. I was in contact with Brad Finstad and his team throughout this process and want to thank him for handling this matter professionally. I attended last week’s 1st District Republican endorsing convention and joined with other Republicans in endorsing Finstad in his run to fill this important seat. He has my full support,” said Benda.

“Running for higher office can be a toll on candidates both emotionally and financially. Many familiar with these challenges have been very supportive throughout this campaign and their support is greatly appreciated,” Benda stated. ###
---
|
---

subject: Together We Can Keep OR-05 Safe
body:
Can I count on you? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bcf5bbe33ef7/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7129601?e=c87c5d8d97)

---
| Friend,

Over the last two years, **our first responders have suffered due to a lack of funding.** Last year in Portland alone there were 90 reported homicides, _a record high for the city. _

As a former mayor, I know how vital first responders are in ensuring the safety of our communities and our families.

_Your continued support is key in saving the great state of Oregon._

[_**Together we can strengthen our police force and refund our first responders! Donate ANY AMOUNT TODAY to start fighting for our state! >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a09ff62eeb&e=c87c5d8d97) [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=2b9cc48b8c&e=c87c5d8d97)
**[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=5109faaa3c&e=c87c5d8d97)
[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=3c06d85e76&e=c87c5d8d97)
[__](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=b56e39775c&e=c87c5d8d97)**_It's time to stop the rampant crime in OR-05._ Like you, I am tired of watching our state being overrun by crime.

As your congresswoman, I will work to refund the police and repeal the budget cuts our first responders have faced!
[****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a788ecade0&e=c87c5d8d97)
Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer
_Republican Nominee for U.S. Congress_

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: we're tied
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw one of the newest polls of our race:
#

We wanted to make sure you saw one of the newest polls of our race:
Ted Budd (R): 45%
Cheri Beasley (D): 45%
We’re _tied_ -- putting us on the verge of flipping this seat.
Everything we do between now and November is going to make a difference, so please help us put our foot on the gas:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate and expand the majority.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220602-1-ma&refcode2=988.357359.spVbLY&t=1&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY)
This is why nonpartisan elections analysts across the board are rating this race one of the best pick-up opportunities for Democrats.
But there’s a catch: Since CNN, FiveThirtyEight and NBC all ranked us as one of the races most likely to flip, Republicans’ Super PACs and dark money groups have already started pouring in millions of dollars to try to keep this seat.
To win this race and expand the majority, it is going to take all of us working together. That’s the only way this works.
[**So if you can, please chip in $3 today to help us flip this Senate seat and elect Cheri Beasley.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220602-1-ma&refcode2=988.357359.spVbLY&t=2&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220602-1-ma&refcode2=988.357359.spVbLY&t=3&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY)**
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=988_357359_spVbLY&akid=988%2E357359%2EspVbLY) today to help us make history.

clean_body: My brand new ad shows exactly why I can and will beat Tony Evers. | Friend, I’ve been a fighter my whole life... ...As a reporter exposing corruption in the swamp, as a mother battling cancer, and as Lieutenant Governor fighting the liberal mob. My brand new ad tells my story of these battles I’ve fought and won, but for this next battle, I’m going to need YOU fighting by my side. Together, as relentless fighters, we will win this governor’s race and flip the battleground state of Wisconsin back into conservative hands. Tony Evers is getting desperate, Friend. Between his own warchest and the DGA, they’re shelling out millions of dollars to try and BUY his reelection. But while Evers may think his cash on hand advantage is the end all-be all. He’s wrong. What’s most important is the sheer size of our grassroots army of conservative patriots. Which is why I want to amass a list of dedicated supporters so large it will leave Evers trembling. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
We knew it would be challenging to pass some of the most ambitious items on our agenda. We didn’t let that stop us. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46054208/348626746/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzg5NjZkOC1jOWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UAicYzLhZ6Yy2UoaODfT8ova2_feTmivS7m5y2evEUo=&emci=a501cae5-c4e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d38966d8-c9e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8943725) Peter,

When Democrats won our razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate last year, we knew it would be challenging to pass some of the most ambitious items on our agenda. We didn’t let that stop us.

Democratic majorities in Congress delivered relief to millions of Americans when they needed it most, put more than 200 million vaccines in arms, made the largest investments in infrastructure in generations, put millions of people back to work, and gave working families more opportunities to thrive.

But our work is far from over. We continue to face incredible Republican obstruction and, in order to continue our progress, it’s critical that we defend and expand our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate this November. If we have a few more votes in the Senate after this election, we’ll be able to pass critical legislation to reduce gun violence, curb prescription drug prices, raise the minimum wage, and defend the rights of every person.

There’s so much left to do, which is why I'm so thankful to have your support right now.

Each day, donors are fueling our team and helping us support campaigns across the country that will help us defend and expand our majority. Your support is critical as we look to the fights ahead. I can’t thank you enough.

As we plan for the months ahead, please know how much I appreciate everything you do for our team. It matters.

Thank you,

Bob | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46054209/348626747/-51410016?refcode=em22_220602_eomty_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220602_eomty_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzg5NjZkOC1jOWUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UAicYzLhZ6Yy2UoaODfT8ova2_feTmivS7m5y2evEUo=)

name: Peter Welch
subject: My thoughts on the filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Our democracy is on the line, and we need to act.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=487%2E61531%2Es1rxJ8)
Hello,
My colleagues and I are hard at work in the House, voting to pass legislation that would make a tangible difference in the lives of Vermonters across the state.
But time and time again, we’ve seen Republicans stand in the way of progress. We can overcome their obstructionist agenda if we make one basic change to the Senate rules.
Here’s one example that’s urgent: I’ve cosponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA), which passed the House and would codify abortion rights nationwide, no matter what the Supreme Court rules on Roe this month.
But the Republican minority blocks critical bills like the WHPA time and time again through the filibuster. This means the bills can’t pass the Senate, and aren’t sent to the president to sign into law. As a result, the Republicans continually stand in the way of progress, and the filibuster is to blame.
**[We must eliminate the filibuster. Add your name to our petition right away if you agree.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster/?source=em_20220602_p_p_filibuster&t=3&akid=487%2E61531%2Es1rxJ8)
**
Even with Democrats holding the majority, the filibuster allows for minority rule. Senate Republicans have filibustered more than just the WHPA. They’ve also employed it to block raising the minimum wage, protecting the right to vote, and passing common-sense gun safety reform.
These bills have broad support from folks across Vermont and the country—which is why I’ve fought so hard to pass them in the House. But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are fighting for failure, and we’re all suffering as a result.
**The filibuster has to go. It’s a relic from the Jim Crow era, used by segregationists to block civil rights. It continues to undermine our democracy and it’s time to abolish it.**
**If I become Vermont’s next senator, I will vote to end the filibuster so we can protect Americans’ basic rights and deliver results for families. But I can’t win this fight by myself—we all need to raise our voices.**
[**Add your name right away to say it’s time to get rid of the filibuster.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster/?source=em_20220602_p_p_filibuster&t=4&akid=487%2E61531%2Es1rxJ8)
Thanks,
Peter

clean_body: Our democracy is on the line, and we need to act. Hello, My colleagues and I are hard at work in the House, voting to pass legislation that would make a tangible difference in the lives of Vermonters across the state. But time and time again, we’ve seen Republicans stand in the way of progress. We can overcome their obstructionist agenda if we make one basic change to the Senate rules. Here’s one example that’s urgent: I’ve cosponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA), which passed the House and would codify abortion rights nationwide, no matter what the Supreme Court rules on Roe this month. But the Republican minority blocks critical bills like the WHPA time and time again through the filibuster. This means the bills can’t pass the Senate, and aren’t sent to the president to sign into law. As a result, the Republicans continually stand in the way of progress, and the filibuster is to blame. Even with Democrats holding the majority, the filibuster allows for minority rule. Senate Republicans have filibustered more than just the WHPA. They’ve also employed it to block raising the minimum wage, protecting the right to vote, and passing common-sense gun safety reform. These bills have broad support from folks across Vermont and the country—which is why I’ve fought so hard to pass them in the House. But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are fighting for failure, and we’re all suffering as a result. The filibuster has to go. It’s a relic from the Jim Crow era, used by segregationists to block civil rights. It continues to undermine our democracy and it’s time to abolish it. If I become Vermont’s next senator, I will vote to end the filibuster so we can protect Americans’ basic rights and deliver results for families. But I can’t win this fight by myself—we all need to raise our voices. Thanks, Peter | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT Welch for Vermont P.O Box 909 Richmond, VT 05477

President Trump is attending a VIP event in NEW YORK, and I want YOU to be there.

Sit at President Trump's table
Take a photo
AND have your hotel and flight covered**_

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this [form.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508920:JY27v9oaN:m:1:3317145305:159716F46B9BE1A75E7E29ACEB98DCF2:r) To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508925:JY27v9oaN:m:1:3317145305:159716F46B9BE1A75E7E29ACEB98DCF2:r) The Promotion begins on Monday, May 16th, 2022, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Thursday, June 2nd, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST June 2nd 2022. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Westchester NY hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump with Dinner provided, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,400. Additional restrictions apply as outlined in these Rules. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. | | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=d4b8e70581&e=292fde286a)

| | | Hi team,

Thank you for all you've done this cycle to ensure we have the resources and community support necessary to run one of the most powerful primary campaigns in this congressional district in years. We are just five (5!) days out from 🗳️ Primary Day! (June 7th, in case you haven't heard) 🗳️. We've asked a lot from you over the past few months — and again, I could not be more grateful — but I have one last ask before Primary Day and before we head into the November General Election.

Will you please join us to 🎉 celebrate 🎉 how far our campaign has come next Tuesday night for an election night watch party? The details are below. Please RSVP for the watch party, and while you're at it, feel free to sign up for some voter contact mobilizations at this link [RSVP HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e2d3e490ea&e=292fde286a).

[RSVP HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=d765046c5b&e=292fde286a)

**Who** : Kevin Mullin For Congress
**What** : Election Night Watch Party
**When** : Tuesday, June 7th, 7:30 PM
**Where** : UA Local 467 Plumbers Union Hall at 1519 Rollins Rd, Burlingame, CA 94010
---
| | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=540b2f8c8d&e=292fde286a)
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=19592d2309&e=292fde286a)

Thanks again, excited to see you all soon!

Brian Rogers
Campaign Manager
Kevin Mullin for Congress

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Team, Houston’s financial future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
City budget faces challenges | | | Hi team, On June 1, 2022, City Council approved the **FY 2023 City of Houston budget. Key elements of the $5.7 billion budget** include pay raises for municipal workers, fire fighters and police as well as a general fund balance surplus of up to approximately **$305 million**. While the surplus is definitely a positive feature of the budget, there are also some critical challenges that we must face in the very near future. First, the full budget calls for an approximate **9.3% increase of approximately $487 million** over FY 2022. Understanding that approximately 2/3 of our total budget is for personnel costs, this rate of increase without corresponding new sustained sources of revenue is problematic in that it creates ongoing obligations that are not sustainable over time without alternative solutions. Second, the budget relies on**$160 million of federal American Rescue Plan Act (ARPA) relief funding to eliminate a deficit in this fiscal year.** The federal COVID-19 funds (namely ARPA funds) awarded to Houston have been used to help balance our budget for the past few years but will run out in 2024. The next Mayor of Houston will not be able to rely on such temporary funding to balance our City budget and **_must_** have a clear and realistic plan to balance the budget without these temporary funds going forward. Just these two issues alone highlight how critical it is going forward for our city to be led by a mayor who has the municipal finance expertise, experience and collaborative leadership skills needed to address these challenges and chart a fiscally sustainable future. **My formal training is as a municipal finance attorney coupled with my experience as the Vice Chair of the City’s Budget & Fiscal Affairs Committee while serving as an At-Large member of City Council make me uniquely equipped to lead our city in facing these challenges**. In fact, several of the budget policies that I authored while on Council demonstrate my commitment to taking an innovative approach to managing the City’s fiscal affairs. City finance is incredibly complicated and managing the financing of the fourth largest city in America is a huge responsibility. But if we are to meet our obligations and promises to our residents and to be a thriving city for every Houstonian, **_we must be one of the best financially managed cities in America_**. I am up to that challenge and have the technical and leadership skills needed. [**With your support we can and will achieve this goal so please donate $25 today to support our push to ensure that Houston stands on a strong foundation to support the quality of life we all deserve!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wLx0bZSuyTdTYS4amt8f-HTYfxPRNklx_hKkWO1VGWW6mwj_OW51x1-g6nzrhtfBuAIZ0kQAqucC166McCpWaod9tGtmh5upOgssSPFhBHMKzBDam7i6diDAy773q9riYxtwr4j71SMG0DZBgyntsXPqpIr2gzDTw32pikInPSioffEXtS1F4VX6hkR5y8XkOC1rB1ndiZrhz09QtIgirETgJbAuNqeil0ZRhn8YhtjkOAiYuyLUg2V9p4w6h1gZoBaecWHnMh-wtyvFTdMcCP0XmJvfxejwg8H5sWiPq7vnznYwSgB1kSWAdvL7vt_zXuOZvEI3i0spuaXeEtavaxz6rzNcEW0flKindNXv8RNQ/3mk/dhaV7qEoTHWyLcWzHzduGQ/h0/73rkWeCjeI_3sIQ5c7t9stP0h-Bh9jbncElPiVuOpps)

Friends,
_***5 Days Until Election Day, June 7th!***_ There's a lot on the line for this election. In 2020, the people of this district had a referendum on the status quo. They voted overwhelmingly for progressive policies and ideas that Bernie Sanders was espousing. What the Ortega campaign has been doing has been dismantling the centers of power that the establishment have in place, and igniting the progressive support base: regular, every day working people. They should be in charge of what happens in Washington, not special interests. This is why, with **5 days** left, we need your help. We cannot wait for change - that's why we've been doing this work. The climate crisis will not wait for a more convenient time. If we're going to deliver this change, we need to succeed here. We need to reach more voters in these last 5 days, and that takes people and money. Our volunteers and staff are hard at work, but to pay for the outreach we need to hit our goal of raising $4,100 in 5 days. Can you help us make it that much closer when we need it most? clean_body: With 5 days left, we need your help. | = Friends, *5 Days Until Election Day, June 7th! There's a lot on the line for this election. In 2020, the people of this district had a referendum on the status quo. They voted overwhelmingly for progressive policies and ideas that Bernie Sanders was espousing. What the Ortega campaign has been doing has been dismantling the centers of power that the establishment have in place, and igniting the progressive support base: regular, every day working people. They should be in charge of what happens in Washington, not special interests. This is why, with 5 days left, we need your help. We cannot wait for change - that's why we've been doing this work. The climate crisis will not wait for a more convenient time. If we're going to deliver this change, we need to succeed here. We need to reach more voters in these last 5 days, and that takes people and money. Our volunteers and staff are hard at work, but to pay for the outreach we need to hit our goal of raising $4,100 in 5 days. Can you help us make it that much closer when we need it most? = _________________________ = Sign up to Canvass with Team Ortega, or Virtual Phonebanking with Our Revolution - In case you missed it, please check out our campaign video and share on social media and with with friends, family: Yours In Solidarity, Alex Coronado Campaign Manager | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? =** | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: | = | | Peter, I’m so grateful for all of the support you’ve shown us. Thanks to you, we’re already polling within a six point margin of Republican Chuck Edwards and with each day between now and November, we’re going to close the gap. Your grassroots donations have gotten us this far, and now I need your feedback. | | | In order to meet with new voters and increase our fundraising efforts, we need to know what about our campaign resonates with you. Whether it’s our fundamental message of spreading love, hope, and empathy, my Democratic platform focused on combating climate change, enacting universal pre-k, and codifying Roe v. Wade into law, or the unique background I bring to this race as a minister, mom, and proud member of the LGBTQ community, I want to know. As one of our strongest supporters, your feedback is invaluable to me and will help us make decisions about the next steps in growing this grassroots movement. | | Thank you so much, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . Peter, did you see Michelle’s email yesterday? **We’re going to the general!!** **[Before we get there, can you chip in to our Voter Protection Fund? We still need to prepare for a few scenarios, and we don’t want anything to slow our momentum now! ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zkW1GKFpf5sfDT0xnR92j0Wt5ajs6KgxiVnjhkTJohd_KHSd4WAl-tx15QG-MQk8cZGZrJt-8tV5hkzNtLmX-I2ON-myJMSQRTERKT5y98-eX_A7C1NgyhB0sodpuU1aaUoQIPUf_jL9fp66Hl49TTX-HLpEgrwnZmBSX3G9lq1zOCDJIWvt-iKqp2hP_akSJCwG_fxl-oWnZ15cgppXr2i1xUPi4FjXJ6YLN8SRGBqfl9zwJLLFHjWIKvYb5Ye8TeiuSVF5Z6oFdRSlDGzUL_RM1QQnTrzgMzl_pj0TifkoY8kKk6TbED2k3IgzL_gR7WaDesAkn7ZbMY6iqcOOr1/3mk/gdi7sWFLQ4-QpdJNdN8abw/h1/YmJ2SxRojHgmlqnz6fUJ2KrVpO9AfHDB7VOKoCOBJSE)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zkW1GKFpf5sfDT0xnR92j0Wt5ajs6KgxiVnjhkTJohdysCPm6uY453uJBSfo63NjE4gAx15oYZIk2qClvWpDEN_TOqkMeqfjHfAe4sLzidlSFc4O6neGWcEA8oNGstHuYlLIBwhQH3vQQWWUnxtpM0S_h2sJPemLqSFnXPKA4Q4wis3qSH_OJ4ztj4xo-z22H8qBn6q2GT4-o22DRnjp98C5fIrEzpGEcKYY3KLcQTY6CAnlmxUI38GQeRYrbKUoc4XLOR6qQceL6VxwcDJduB65KWUtF5na_1t46JCgswJa2cMEtDdz0S1ih6qNCim5LeA0gz7GmK-2oOBMxgSfHv/3mk/gdi7sWFLQ4-QpdJNdN8abw/h2/uuZ5ilQ17NQ0dLmzT5g2BlwZEwfhi1xJUGeSRaV55FY)** Thank you so much for being with us throughout this whole ride — from knocking doors in the primary to making calls during the runoff, to chipping in to keep our ads on the air, to hanging with us through a week of nail-biting as we waited for results. Your support has always made this campaign run, and we are so pumped to keep moving into whatever our next steps are. And we mustn’t waste any time getting ready. **[With just 33 votes between winning and losing, a recount is still possible, so we need to make sure our Voter Protection Fund has the resources needed to keep up our momentum and be ready for whatever may come our way. clean_body: | | | Peter, did you see Michelle’s email yesterday? We’re going to the general!! Thank you so much for being with us throughout this whole ride — from knocking doors in the primary to making calls during the runoff, to chipping in to keep our ads on the air, to hanging with us through a week of nail-biting as we waited for results. Your support has always made this campaign run, and we are so pumped to keep moving into whatever our next steps are. And we mustn’t waste any time getting ready. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

Hi Peter Willis!
I have some good news for you today: with your help last month, we doubled our fundraising haul from April and pulled in a near-record amount of recurring donations. THANK YOU, from the bottom of my heart, for your incredible ongoing support.
We know not everyone can donate, so **we also wanted to thank our amazing volunteers, and ask you now:[Can you become a volunteer and help continue to build our on-the-ground coalition?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0t0Cxq2kWskp9t0NeDZIPbgNbwx0KEoGaDe-ZupDluiU1OBtv_Ewtb-04eSgIv6fQVicVjQ0yj-4SOmki-8i7hkuuPs2_jjs_yDzUjyryPkFaWNH_I8Za0Ufyz6V5L799GWmDhIRjHDf3EiPm-Hro2m9DH7WSIGyljMiHcw4JYpxqvpDdzEh-500twphrBARf-MgekZlnGRzrGTpMz-U2W3FF5Sh2Ac_QcNfG-xfnROy/3mk/EinI4aguSQS60h3vkMgajA/h1/kk2KZrPQhU0X_of3KsnujoABee229j9BDpe1whgWYN4)**

Melanie

I want to have dinner with YOU | I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)
Peter,

I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK, and I told them I wanted to invite YOU to join me.

This isn't any ordinary trip, Peter. This will be an _EXCLUSIVE VIP dinner_ , and I can't think of anyone else I'd rather share this special evening with as my **GUEST OF HONOR** than _**YOU.**_

_My team will cover the cost of your flight, hotel, AND meal._

_All you have to do is contribute $25 or more, and you'll automatically be entered to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. _

**[Please contribute $25 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win a trip to meet me and have dinner in NEW YORK.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $100>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508914:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508915:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $25>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508916:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**

Remember, if you win, my team will cover your flight, hotel, and dinner. _We'll even take a photo together so we can remember the night forever._

You've always been one of my best supporters, Peter, and I really want YOU to be there with me. _My team is sending me the first round of entries TONIGHT. I hope to see your name._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win and to get on the first list of Patriots I see.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

To enter by making a contribution use this [form.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508912:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r) To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60508917:6Cmf-9oNK:m:1:3253819041:DB29C0BE90B9CAE328CE03101AA7F1D0:r) The Promotion begins on Monday, May 16th, 2022, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Thursday, June 2nd, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST June 2nd 2022. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Westchester NY hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump with Dinner provided, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,400. Additional restrictions apply as outlined in these Rules. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Why are they defending the right to own an AR-15 instead of our children’s right to live?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220602-3076-header&t=1&akid=3076%2E2526796%2EPRdDR4)
_Alexandria shared her thoughts on the Uvalde shooting and where we go from here on Instagram Live last week. Here is an abbreviated version of her remarks below. If you prefer to listen, you can watch the IG live[here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14650?utm_source=em20220602-3076&t=2&akid=3076%2E2526796%2EPRdDR4)._
---
This is such an embarrassing, shameful, deeply violent, and inexcusable moment.
There are so many politicians defending AR-15s and the right of radicalized teens to impulse buy an AR-15. They have more to say about guns than they have to say about the kids who were killed.
**_It’s just ‘prayers, prayer, prayers.’ They love to talk about a book they’ve never even read. “Faith without works is dead.” We don’t want to hear it unless you are doing something about it._** These politicians aren’t trying. They’re only interested in defending themselves and the special interests that they work for. There’s no money in protecting kids, apparently.
**_I don’t like, as a leader, telling you this, but so long as a Party, especially a Democratic Party, thinks there is some level of horror that will convince Republicans to change their minds, this is going to keep happening._**
Everyone wants to reach for the easy solution. More police in schools does not solve this problem. That is not an opinion, look at the data. More money to policing does not do anything. If it did, it would have by now.
We have teachers who are not even making a living wage, who have sold their blood plasma to make ends meet. And they are now sacrificing their lives for the chance of possibly saving their students’ lives. And where are we talking about putting resources first? Not to them. Not in health care. But in the place, policing, that already has the resources that have yielded the least amount of change.
There are no easy solutions here. And as long as we continue to ignore the difficult issues, this is going to happen. Something we have to talk about is the radicalization of young men. This is about an ideology of hatred and violence, whether it’s the explicit white supremacy we saw in Buffalo or simply the silos that young men radicalize themselves in online. People like Mark Zuckerburg are busy having dinner with people like Tucker Carlson, who’s airing “Great Replacement” theories and inciting violence, and platforming the very people that mass shooters are citing in their own clearly written manifestos.
Another issue we have, and the reason we can’t get these broadly popular gun reform bills through Congress, is the unrepresentative nature of our democracy. You have a presidency that’s often not determined by popular vote. You have a Senate where tens of millions more people can vote for a candidate or party and still be in the minority. Even the House of Representatives, that’s supposed to represent our population, gets gerrymandered to all hell. It’s becoming increasingly difficult for people to defend the stance that we live in a true democracy.
**_So what do we do?_** I’m not going to be one of those ding dongs who tell you to vote harder. _**But, hopelessness is not an option.**_
It’s really easy, when government doesn’t work for you, to say “screw this, I’m opting out.” By giving into that cynicism, you become less human. You turn off a part of your human experience. And, **_what all of these special interests are trying to do is to extinguish the life out of you. They want to extinguish your hope and desire to fight for a better future._**
There are so many things we can do. It’s just about getting creative and it starts in one place. It’s not top down. It almost always starts with a small group or one community that decides to take a creative action that works for them. And it works on a small level and it inspires others. Right now is the moment to try *anything.* Even, just keep an eye on the young men in your life. Because you all are the ones who have the power to deradicalize. And it’s never just one conversation, but it always starts there.
I wish I had easy answers. I don’t.
**_It’s appropriate to feel rage at injustice. But the moment they take that away from you, is the moment they get you to acquiesce. And we will not acquiesce. We reject dystopia till the end._**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=3&akid=3076%2E2526796%2EPRdDR4) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=4&akid=3076%2E2526796%2EPRdDR4) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=5&akid=3076%2E2526796%2EPRdDR4)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
