If it did, it would have by now. We have teachers who are not even making a living wage, who have sold their blood plasma to make ends meet. And they are now sacrificing their lives for the chance of possibly saving their students’ lives. And where are we talking about putting resources first? Not to them. Not in health care. But in the place, policing, that already has the resources that have yielded the least amount of change. There are no easy solutions here. And as long as we continue to ignore the difficult issues, this is going to happen. Something we have to talk about is the radicalization of young men. This is about an ideology of hatred and violence, whether it’s the explicit white supremacy we saw in Buffalo or simply the silos that young men radicalize themselves in online. People like Mark Zuckerburg are busy having dinner with people like Tucker Carlson, who’s airing “Great Replacement” theories and inciting violence, and platforming the very people that mass shooters are citing in their own clearly written manifestos. Another issue we have, and the reason we can’t get these broadly popular gun reform bills through Congress, is the unrepresentative nature of our democracy. You have a presidency that’s often not determined by popular vote. You have a Senate where tens of millions more people can vote for a candidate or party and still be in the minority. Even the House of Representatives, that’s supposed to represent our population, gets gerrymandered to all hell. It’s becoming increasingly difficult for people to defend the stance that we live in a true democracy. So what do we do? I’m not going to be one of those ding dongs who tell you to vote harder. But, hopelessness is not an option. It’s really easy, when government doesn’t work for you, to say “screw this, I’m opting out.” By giving into that cynicism, you become less human. You turn off a part of your human experience. And, what all of these special interests are trying to do is to extinguish the life out of you. They want to extinguish your hope and desire to fight for a better future. There are so many things we can do. It’s just about getting creative and it starts in one place. It’s not top down. It almost always starts with a small group or one community that decides to take a creative action that works for them. And it works on a small level and it inspires others. Right now is the moment to try anything. Even, just keep an eye on the young men in your life. Because you all are the ones who have the power to deradicalize. And it’s never just one conversation, but it always starts there. I wish I had easy answers. I don’t. It’s appropriate to feel rage at injustice. But the moment they take that away from you, is the moment they get you to acquiesce. And we will not acquiesce. We reject dystopia till the end._ | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

**** Peter, let’s be very clear here. The United States of America needs meaningful gun safety laws to address our gun violence crisis and stop horrors like the massacre of children in Uvalde, Texas, the racist killing spree in Buffalo, and yesterday's hospital shooting in Tulsa. **But Kyrsten Sinema refuses to back down from defending her beloved filibuster so that we can enact real, comprehensive gun safety legislation.** Instead, she’s trying to gain more headlines for herself by cutting deals with Republicans — the same Republicans who are bought and paid for by the NRA — on half-measures that may or may not even pass. **Yet again, she’s prioritizing her own political image over people’s lives.** If Sinema really cares about saving lives? She could simply stop defending the filibuster and allow meaningful gun safety measures to pass. **[Peter, join thousands of your fellow supporters by signing our petition. Sign now to demand Sinema drop her support for the filibuster and help pass life-saving gun violence legislation.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38Er7gucfwIE8yykZxXEEavBhPPh1qFsZBVrJPNgwUR5BmgXvDRpOreK44JfXcCI__yxm510-zxrsS3pUCcPAqoCcestlteWHRrpbJJDgaMiURsNqR2DBtn1KN-QZx6U61NaDsc_pCTKeBYsCyA1aLtnUknAaSPM5BHqs9EWlUF2mcH2eDye0W4g9ubK_yX5BL27MDQaZLM4JNOtcYhdLIXf8OphupHwVxDpC-LboWZ2QXDEdVbnYGyhl0DWhEsSVPktmkadYxB1a4OR3KgO8DweNA/3mk/hXsHXBITS26maWPw_nMmOw/h1/urOqYrrlsZ67RjCvoPa_5MYnzmCmJAkl5YPiSN3w5OA)** **[Sign »](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38Er6EmenufF8_bAnL4aHJJOIKLhXhS8lQjCPnjzyNGFbLPmIw1K-2M4oNejZJOrfeEjqNqWMVOAur2LTvqYo7_wL-Upmu-7BxZDjx1qDXWv98fjmZgEL7W3CRC04k-E4kE-Kp0_7MBzjuqxy7iPsjwMl0Q39fCwxW_WfJhp8mDfV17nNrQYa-WU_w1Iy_9los1clgNfnlGo139lt58TKb3grV9Vv-KZYArsFleaKSWrQZLAgr07qeTaMIS9sdVgijsMqE6Etpr6zBHXGtjohab5pA/3mk/hXsHXBITS26maWPw_nMmOw/h2/6RkL1hbhpfA_JCFa6ui5e86AIJBbcx4vIcntCO27ndw)** Children are massacred in their classrooms with alarming regularity in this country. Yet, instead of actually doing what's in her power to fix it (eliminate the filibuster and pass legislation), Kyrsten Sinema is yet again wasting everyone's time to prove how "bipartisan" she is. clean_body: = Hello, There is incredible news in the campaign against Chuck Grassley: FIRST: Three-star Admiral Mike Franken announced he was running for Senate against Chuck Grassley in Iowa, giving Democrats our best chance ever to send him packing. THEN: Poll after poll showed Grassley’s approval rating at the lowest it’s EVER been, and Franken raised more than $2.8 million from 63,000 grassroots donors like you to turn Iowa blue. AND NOW: Lieutenant Colonel Alexander Vindman just endorsed Admiral Mike Franken to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate! We have an HISTORIC opportunity to finally end Chuck Grassley’s 46-year career in Washington. The polling shows it. The experts are saying it. And if grassroots donors like you join Lt. Col. Vindman now, we can make it a reality. We’re so close to hitting our $35,000 goal before our critical deadline, but we need grassroots donors like you to give now if Mike is going to fight back against McConnell’s Super PACs and send Grassley packing this November: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support is what’s gotten us this far. [**Can you help us extend this momentum and accelerate during the last few days before the jungle primary next Tuesday?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJrX5mfUo4FV1Mq2OYGsUc_NNVY0IZTcz4eM7jPL74z4VA76xIEcm2PqRhPPPdvmSc-LDPHW_Ub7B0zrb4_eJzWw6mc74XAwPktahedfrF-FmcaEnhEyWUu4d1TD8yg78IEgAiZWQoTUhauHyuPFe7OCIw0THdfej5_LuCbaum2tsaMlkBjbz0bJETyFDtFyBsybPZKNj87Wbii8Y2sX8XTONi5hgZnyVD_ZKuhcWv8EzwPDcbLYRC9d_5fv6XZlV2raqFDIL2u1yzpuDEPpoSw42KWVLEIQ3RR6_0tL6fDCvWoIbCbHZ4aMCBe9noYEvL-wXKmTUdiNLj6nsBD9Ze1/3mk/Hsa_TLNbSSuseqR9drJ-tA/h1/_6-Z7qtvjStmKJepJ3hBd1NNm7wch8036i17uamp3nM) This week, the San Francisco Bayview, a locally published newspaper with a national audience, published its voters guide for the election currently underway. While the editors generally adopted the recommendations of a San Francisco public school teacher, they took their own positions in two races, one of which was our’s. The original author declined to endorse anyone in our race, but the editors made their preferences clear. just a few days before the voting period ends, can you join us—and the SF Bayview—to reach more voters as we close in on the finish line?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJrX5mfUo4FV1Mq2OYGsUc_NNVY0IZTcz4eM7jPL74z4UCmXfpJU_Lv68jO1QUC9wL9ntsV9bAVUeQgq05lD54NjVeyHe3z8YAPgOwSoKtAbmGIfGtZoVG2CqB0bOduoIaqbcAszW4n1d3aaVTPX07BHW5s9AZkp-8Xa3BtnIJsS7J-GSMK0PhDHG47FGs7gcnsJu3GEKpgJiFHYjVFlAAHu9yEB1JPrfsEpKd9wx6ZFykNmCvbpH69pm_C3e_XMERoxPqwOYTJTfwbSMkttzCy7AqRIufm0aJocEKOsNoCRROAhjkvkPgKWQAQy70CA43Q1nFPBiV7Eu1ruW0JUxCY/3mk/Hsa_TLNbSSuseqR9drJ-tA/h5/246mquR5Z35c_3Tjofmk6_OS-3pnfqO5Vr0uOBACyeo) One reason we’re especially grateful for the Bayview’s endorsement is because it highlights the tension in the press that our campaign forces into the public. Most newspapers practice access journalism, sadly deferring to powerful figures who they are ethically committed to holding accountable. Having seen a Black newspaper expose stories that remain suppressed by other local writers, it’s no surprise to see the Bayview continuing to demonstrate that independence. [**Are you in a position to help us continue demonstrating that same independence in the political sphere by holding the establishment accountable? Having forced Pelosi to concede her previous positions on issues from labor rights to insider trading, we need your help to repeat that pattern as we work to end her dynasty.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJrX5mfUo4FV1Mq2OYGsUc_NNVY0IZTcz4eM7jPL74z4eolQaAvFrih7UOddQxLUm9nKbTHcgA_tnTQLuAlo9d-1Ke0uq6-8f6Y0AclitSfO0aqrhOpoSLmXVl_oflAuqrnYudg2YwxE71L_LI0HBRFF8gR6PCC53L4EgQggyQPXBRmNVeltmhW04QLMj11eThisLMgc-1bAQhrYkxFGT8DG5Z-qUwVZVzNC-kf8EJaRPs8yi5PJxmOVP4ZJtIYZqBiFKfvRVRTMlz7jnZBSMeaWEKKQNBGq4Vt3HPUy6y9WHs7mzdftz5dV6Ow-ch2bnlZ6c0ilsUWWl-zv8qZ-nw_/3mk/Hsa_TLNbSSuseqR9drJ-tA/h6/aFssv5pMKLPt5ZiRYGBySPQN1tBHI-BFVl2kCSg6slM) In addition to our appearance in the _San Francisco Bayview_ , we’re also grateful for a few other media appearances this week. Reflecting bizarre ironies of political tribalism, we welcomed a story in the _New York Post_ highlighting our critique of the incumbent’s multifaceted corruption. I also appeared on a live national segment on Newsmax that reiterated that critique, while also promoting universal healthcare and climate justice to an audience that rarely gets to hear about those proposals. Finally, we heard just yesterday that KPFA Pacifica 94.1FM will broadcast this Sunday, June 5 from 7-8pm, excerpts from the Empathy Circle recently hosted by organizers of OccupySF.net. Tune in then to hear a unique dialog unlike any in which I’d participated before! Thanks for standing with us and supporting my voice! I’ve been committed for decades to ending corruption, expanding human rights, and championing climate justice—but my concerns have reached a great many more ears with your support. Yours,
Shahid PS -- **Got plans on election night?[Join us next Tuesday night at Madrone Art Bar](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkx96n-NIXDDWfVGIJ4I9GVj1uaaukqJfjudWIKC2P1fASJd3JxhfUW70WEvuYdaHncHnQq4oT78E6fnrIq9RI-94EjoI1fnQZUHog6uXpfWCpAVv_pq2UddY-jG1zKOpqpxIcrjrDxLlz9KXoe9GWvltHlezXHe-IFXWrExfKRm8GTHgmMoxMm4Gu9mXlnRz1WmyL-94HqqUL2RECywwgOsQo0Kc0-O36JK3EN_CD-Oq60eZ01rgEURR_aTQ1dV8Yop2GVUPKf6PsAk5bKqCKioSNqu2-DDIEKDFge1lmMO9-Mm67OkiDEuczAO8FNPUMiqlkTLmw6r-J6hPTjZtUL/3mk/Hsa_TLNbSSuseqR9drJ-tA/h7/h4zK1ShbzEfWAUYmVsYQ1UIRYPDKoQxnO8xNl1FIW8c) **to celebrate our primary results before the sprint to November! |

clean_body: We’re grateful for the endorsement of the San Francisco Bayview, a national Black newspaper. | | | | | Dear Peter, We’re excited to share a recent endorsement with you, as well as some recent and upcoming media appearances. This week, the San Francisco Bayview, a locally published newspaper with a national audience, published its voters guide for the election currently underway. While the editors generally adopted the recommendations of a San Francisco public school teacher, they took their own positions in two races, one of which was our’s. The original author declined to endorse anyone in our race, but the editors made their preferences clear. One reason we’re especially grateful for the Bayview’s endorsement is because it highlights the tension in the press that our campaign forces into the public. Most newspapers practice access journalism, sadly deferring to powerful figures who they are ethically committed to holding accountable. Having seen a Black newspaper expose stories that remain suppressed by other local writers, it’s no surprise to see the Bayview continuing to demonstrate that independence. In addition to our appearance in the San Francisco Bayview , we’re also grateful for a few other media appearances this week. Reflecting bizarre ironies of political tribalism, we welcomed a story in the New York Post highlighting our critique of the incumbent’s multifaceted corruption. I also appeared on a live national segment on Newsmax that reiterated that critique, while also promoting universal healthcare and climate justice to an audience that rarely gets to hear about those proposals. Finally, we heard just yesterday that KPFA Pacifica 94.1FM will broadcast this Sunday, June 5 from 7-8pm, excerpts from the Empathy Circle recently hosted by organizers of OccupySF.net. Tune in then to hear a unique dialog unlike any in which I’d participated before! Thanks for standing with us and supporting my voice! I’ve been committed for decades to ending corruption, expanding human rights, and championing climate justice—but my concerns have reached a great many more ears with your support. Yours, Shahid PS -- Got plans on election night? to celebrate our primary results before the sprint to November! | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Shahid for Change, please .

| | Peter, We need Americans to WAKE UP to the truth about the mainstream media. They continue to manipulate the American people to advance their dangerous agenda.

_The media, with the help of the Democrats, continues manufacturing outrage to support their anti-police, anti-second amendment, and anti freedom agenda_.

Nineteen children were brutally killed in Uvalde, TX and Barack Obama had one of the most insensitive tweets I have ever seen in response to this tragedy.

This shows just how senseless the Left is. **_Obama and the radical Left will say anything they can to attack the police force_**.

To make sincere change in this country, we **_need_** to band together this midterm election and vote out as many Democrats as possible.

[**Republicans are only FIVE seats away from controlling the majority in the House. If we can secure a majority, Republicans can finally put a stop to Biden and Pelosi’s reckless leadership**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8bc0d440ab&e=af4b86f5c6).

We **_CANNOT_** allow our country to continue to fall apart under their leadership.

I am running for Congress to replace corrupt Rep. Elaine Luria. My opponent is a typical stagnant Democrat swamp creature who **_REFUSES_** to represent what the American people truly want.

I am running as a Republican that is pasisonately pro-life, pro-second amendment, and pro-free speech. [**_If you want to see Republicans regain a majority and take action to advance YOUR agenda, chip in to my campaign today_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b1e9fd9f0e&e=af4b86f5c6).

[**_Our country cannot bear to suffer under Biden and a Democrat majority for two more years_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=6b10b3fda9&e=af4b86f5c6).

“Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=2807a0993fb54d97ba6c3c2d1927e3de&_e=uqhmGKvizzdVLtZWDGBjTZ0NgeXA8Fb0YITOVWXVTwIqGudor7PPGNBp1aWpZFSC6iMpQvKGW_holfNtXIMa7v3_ehu-oT54tWqDAB1m1ao4qZEJnQWzsOqrD6VbM4uEAEpL6Zvgpn-e0DKJwwZY3dNAPg7h3diTAZclVcICQofR73AYzXlQyyYJcghOhueZ0liMsWh3pyG2E-0Rnu0BVYqdlEl7CUvuNMLmw5ibwpkR7Xa6lqBngpppOJRKyi0OvJzfqY9BaBWggrKBxK1v9zFivN6UpGU9etac61KnYKkic0BQt2D8Kaz9DOBAi4-sIrxFv6a6-7w6GrLP7ObZf2mk4Q9in_zMGVIV8Ho46ombaoQtZl8eL6HVohfYVyu52nhVg1ouDJmFuYwvEZHLJU9SepJyJCxUQYtYktUUFtfZKqv6tK0StZ7juJ8DN8cy9G3ge-ZS7hBbgpLMq1axIE3dJpnkx6UoG_sYyczVf-XEwlZ7LNfW3QlTUm9JBnzA)

Fellow American,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. **[Without your support, winning will be much more difficult.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=2807a0993fb54d97ba6c3c2d1927e3de&_e=uqhmGKvizzdVLtZWDGBjTZ0NgeXA8Fb0YITOVWXVTwIqGudor7PPGNBp1aWpZFSC6iMpQvKGW_holfNtXIMa7v3_ehu-oT54tWqDAB1m1ao4qZEJnQWzsOqrD6VbM4uEAEpL6Zvgpn-e0DKJwwZY3dNAPg7h3diTAZclVcICQofR73AYzXlQyyYJcghOhueZ0liMsWh3pyG2E-0Rnu0BVYqdlEl7CUvuNMLmw5ibwpkR7Xa6lqBngpppOJRKyi0OvJzfqY9BaBWggrKBxK1v9zFivN6UpGU9etac61KnYKngz-eYRliNnk6039Mgzc8bOSf44__09T1jpJZw1jT8vzrO5X2593SpBW9QDSr5ZVuD0Aj4g0Bg1aI6mzxx6UmI-vl5dWCj369NBe1zzG2Raoc7xkJHVuG7s6OIDm_oCzAuDRRCavBwH5DqWKjblJhgJzpiVge1keRi8RhoQ8ARrHvoCCq4UuGA1AONVShQEuTkO4AcfRp471VHjv3UwU0K)**

Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. clean_body: “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” | Fellow American, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Odessa Kelly
subject: Tennessee is full of people who want change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
I was so hyped to talk about our campaign. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-bKAKSpK5IrGSyeEd9x4aQ3rI9_5YnwjteGPprXoKKgSZ0ExpskVEaV9fKboDPMuFNQTloJFT0y7ouOBhUCujpF65irYiLQ1T3gt4Y6cqyHMKE9wAEvh0uJw96oXti4h_hCaLwWswx_c0qx_jPRKt4MSoi4qFgu92ktYDJ8HaOGpmspfZZnXQyAvGQmfZAG5njqwC-OfWVIkDA5ENDYH2MpM7-AMEY7IQ5uJ81AwSU4G5BdwhE12GAlYs113exFaV0/3mk/5h2FblZrSh2HYI9W40IiYg/h0/HHLdyysMDySu-ei08uIMU7KkE5igAhwjp-kzu_BKpos) Hey Peter, We got national attention for our campaign with a profile in Vogue this week, and I’m still so hype about it. I told them I’m just as Southern as anyone else. I’m as Southern as Andrew Jackson. **And I want to redefine what it means to be from the South.** I think the Republicans that run our state legislature are racist and they are embarrassing, but that’s not the definition of Tennessee. Tennessee is full of fighters, full of people who want change, who want to be a bright beacon of what we could be in the South. [**Peter, can you help us keep fighting for change by chipping in any amount to our campaign right now? Every single dollar goes toward campaigning from the city to the hollers to flip TN-07 blue.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiyvlEMHoDzK5wCuh79iVWbX-_1t-8hbTMF_Tt8T5_8Acn9GqxlR5LAJTZTaHh7Ox6zQtyudPYTgjo2JXh7PrlrJ0UvsXYZ4O0jsNmEJuyM1zwF8UeskgqFA7myc10pCO3bAd2xa2ET2ALyjEslZji06CZB-SEC_En-I-jUqzu7rWacYKE9XjZ3707Lqp6UouVHGM4a0fVdr-FtuAxcgPd452IZs2jXse2oO0ISbCfVC4MIB0njohKPOwwc8-SXcrcsHUoGKYQ4NzZ8VWEkVDZVX5toyRdt7aJgw85Aj_VvlNO9gIDv8HSGHoWlLKqqarxzl3OYhaTpd6k5Fs884H4GcO0iQfKuYea1kYOBnZ1Xq0/3mk/5h2FblZrSh2HYI9W40IiYg/h1/fbB1jQLkLy7qOm0jXpMpECsWd1a4S7dyZrSBu3EzPTc) [Contribute »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiyvlEMHoDzK5wCuh79iVWbX-_1t-8hbTMF_Tt8T5_8AdDWMiImooyr7k0lBYBXLsxq9wWBbBOooHXzxJ-b2a-Ucjqn3uL1n_qnjTIQtrTbOIlaAjzuUtH05ZTry68S2wGSWP5zh8MCTYRhFGl74SXWzyQKaY-ohTysNdvZPFUd-T33JYWSxzFDpRbatHu2JOiWn5YzTtLNF4x5VUhsD7QHb9utC56bnauOWDlt6dkjiZtrwTYxIAWTlN2yuS2JpbAPO4MjuD2dAWplxbSexgSmaEmoE865fNpWiO981PbRcmNjO-e4ZJM__S5fgmdSlS6EmlKQ6t7g6Znnwdf-jT7x_GE08qC6lts13J-xb-8vcc/3mk/5h2FblZrSh2HYI9W40IiYg/h2/80_FEqNuaATfnF_ysP_UAtYy_t46Lrma7cxmolF4Qew) I wanted to tell everyone out there who is just as appalled and sickened by everything going on as I am to dig in and get ready to fight for what we want to see happen in this country. **The country is just as much ours. We’re the majority.** We have to stop letting a small minority rule how things happen to us. As Democrats, what we need to start talking about is protecting all of our social safety nets. What is wrong with making sure people stay healthy? Actually, making people healthy will lower a lot of the other ancillary health costs that come from illness. We should base policies on how happy we can make people, not how much money we can make off of them. And I think that’s where I come from when I talk to people, regardless of how they identify, by party or not. [**We’re unifying people from all over this district and we’re giving Mark Green a run for his (millions of dollars of) money. Please, if you can, chip in today to help us keep going.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiyvlEMHoDzK5wCuh79iVWbX-_1t-8hbTMF_Tt8T5_8AdOLCJMb690AwDE3Kl2ADDbMtEFLfZHiCetplyREHPB9KhUflqF5TVxz5rowaQZP-D3E3grV8vLnV0Qx2H5x2qnugdOIU9b72f4RK2Mn8QVpigvLvTl1UHEBFkHRsbrOtplJhzHpuePjoI-5sH_vaH9hK4Xdy4u_T84G9whsO_icB1Q6W4KoK-ZR6JXAL4G5N_wZEpWyXDbzdqm93XNMhu6jQdmcw9DiiQK5G4YwF7jocdUIupx4NptCvaAdmwX52j9bvUtklAXxwA4kM7fNiQ3yxOo4QRJbIix7daet5mgQ4Iac9lC-At01_SkX7_5Zv0/3mk/5h2FblZrSh2HYI9W40IiYg/h3/soH1pPVU5DUtaK9dRXHij2gfpMrc9-WYbEyK_rBDbLU) [Contribute »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiyvlEMHoDzK5wCuh79iVWbX-_1t-8hbTMF_Tt8T5_8AcUTCSAbTE27jvIuTtoPSbnklhi0dMGN-aFQ2JzvieQPBkMS-YnPC3byXLsVn1JoZvnyE8dAdMuahSjzzLM71amW9Q4CMXjG-T3qlg8S3Ej1jeE5QBDBtQwpQ4bbYyJB8OqDd35cOyuMjZGPLIKbCMRAZJ4RMtRtuTt8RQqRtqICkcQt1dHeD53qoEv6BHIcIyoboVO_KmMbC_XgxitgdMHJi0lPTfTDy1jLVBH3TULa6rqBGePjiJ1a8Th-YuxL-retjcosCy-YLu2r6d9ZPE0yf6aqRnGUxZh3k47gYGAV5nr91T7p6DqVyAxAyzu-ao/3mk/5h2FblZrSh2HYI9W40IiYg/h4/NVMrkHXQLSC_ecfxBurFRc4Svx2aiGKC7t4tO44H3ag) Peter, thank you above all for paying attention – not just to a presidential election, but to the midterms, to our local boards and commissions, to everywhere we can win power. It’s the biggest step we can take and it matters. Together, Odessa

clean_body: I was so hyped to talk about our campaign. | | | Hey Peter, We got national attention for our campaign with a profile in Vogue this week, and I’m still so hype about it. I told them I’m just as Southern as anyone else. I’m as Southern as Andrew Jackson. And I want to redefine what it means to be from the South. I think the Republicans that run our state legislature are racist and they are embarrassing, but that’s not the definition of Tennessee. Tennessee is full of fighters, full of people who want change, who want to be a bright beacon of what we could be in the South. I wanted to tell everyone out there who is just as appalled and sickened by everything going on as I am to dig in and get ready to fight for what we want to see happen in this country. The country is just as much ours. We’re the majority. We have to stop letting a small minority rule how things happen to us. As Democrats, what we need to start talking about is protecting all of our social safety nets. What is wrong with making sure people stay healthy? Actually, making people healthy will lower a lot of the other ancillary health costs that come from illness. We should base policies on how happy we can make people, not how much money we can make off of them. And I think that’s where I come from when I talk to people, regardless of how they identify, by party or not. Peter, thank you above all for paying attention – not just to a presidential election, but to the midterms, to our local boards and commissions, to everywhere we can win power. It’s the biggest step we can take and it matters. Together, Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

subject: Rebekah's whistleblower win makes headlines; Major speech in Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign
body:
Rebekah makes national headlines in Whistleblower win; joins Crist, Fried in Orlando in major speech | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 3 min | Rebe
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/7cO4cHcLQ/c?w=s6CGUY041uWfB2g80uenXSDv_B9b1er84e2dtrqVJvs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvLzdjTzRjSGNMUT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | New video, press and more
---
| | |
---
| | Rebekah makes national headlines in Whistleblower win; joins Crist, Fried in Orlando in major speech
---
| | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 3 min
---
| |
---
| | Rebekah Jones made national headlines this week when the state leaked an internal report from Governor Ron DeSantis' Inspector General to the press, catching the pro-DeSantis media red-handed for illegally obtaining the final version before the state even sent it to Jones' attorneys. The report, which found Rebekah told the truth about the state ordering her to hide and delete data from public access (though contended that's not a crime), has been hailed as a victory for Jones' case, according to legal experts. "The state did its own investigation of itself entirely separate from my whistleblower complaint and still could not find proof that anything I said was false," Rebekah told The Miami Herald. "I didn't interview for this report, we didn't file our complaint with his IG, and yet they still couldn't disprove what happened in what is supposed to be their own narrative." On the two most bombastic charges - that state officials pressured Rebekah to falsify figures for the purpose of misleading the public - the state's investigation of itself determined it could neither prove nor disprove what happened, despite multiple DOH employees submitting sworn statements supporting Rebekah's report. Still, a neutral finding from what amounts to the state's own position statement is a considerable win, said Tallahassee attorney and former head of ACLU Florida Richard Johnson. Despite the bulk of the alt-right media attacking Jones, largely based on fired-Politico hack Marc Caputo's defamatory and fabricated opinion blog, the report itself supports the crux of Jones' claims. Jones' whistleblower complaint is still active with the Florida Commission on Human Relations and once a determination is made on her complaint (now two years old), Jones and her lawyers plan to sue for what might be the largest whistleblower settlement for any government agency in United States history. Riding the wave of unexpected but mostly positive news, Rebekah joined some of Florida's most fierce activists in Orlando to[ deliver a speech ](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/7cO4cHcLQ/c?w=gEXfZhZnWuiP3FTfO88-_I0Yn5Jn9pmdF_BhjK5fmtI.)on the importance of voting out Desantis and "everyone like him" at the Rally to Remove Ron Wednesday. Former Florida Governor (and current candidate for Florida governor) Charlie Crist praised Rebekah during his speech condemning DeSantis' evil intentions, thanking her for her work during COVID-19, her run for office and her fight for government accountability. Both Crist and Fried have been fierce supporters of Jones for two years, and Jones has the full-backing of both the Florida Democratic Party and the National Democratic Party in her run against Matt Gaetz, whose sex-trafficking investigation has been in grand jury proceedings since at least last summer. [Jones also took the time to speak to reporters and called out DeSantis' absence in Northwest Florida](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/7cO4cHcLQ/c?w=ONAYiXKqTi9mCfwtOV-h0I5moeTKI7HK_mQcbW_fYA8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mbG9yaWRhcG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FyY2hpdmVzLzUyOTEwNC1yZWJla2FoLWpvbmVzLXdvbmRlcnMtaWYtcm9uLWRlc2FudGlzLXdvdWxkLWNvbWUtdG8tbWF0dC1nYWV0enMtYWlkLyIsInIiOiI0NzU3OGE1Ni1iNDEwLTQ1ZTMtOTc4ZC0wMjAzNDkwOTkyOWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) since news of Gaetz' alleged-sex trafficking of underage boys and girls broke in January 2021. “He hasn’t been seen publicly with him in a year and a half,” Jones observed of DeSantis and Gaetz. [\- Scott Powers, Florida Politics](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/7cO4cHcLQ/c?w=ONAYiXKqTi9mCfwtOV-h0I5moeTKI7HK_mQcbW_fYA8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mbG9yaWRhcG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FyY2hpdmVzLzUyOTEwNC1yZWJla2FoLWpvbmVzLXdvbmRlcnMtaWYtcm9uLWRlc2FudGlzLXdvdWxkLWNvbWUtdG8tbWF0dC1nYWV0enMtYWlkLyIsInIiOiI0NzU3OGE1Ni1iNDEwLTQ1ZTMtOTc4ZC0wMjAzNDkwOTkyOWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) The positive press from the state's internal report and the Orlando event have boosted the visibility of Rebekah's campaign in Northwest Florida to unseat Matt Gaetz. Despite a Desantis-backed Democratic living in another district filing to run against her, Rebekah's polling at 88% in the Democratic primary, which party officials have said they don't view as a "contested race," given the damage the Desantis-backed shill candidate has done to the party while openly coordinating with Desantis' administration. Another "ghost candidate" from Palm Coast, Robert Jones, also filed to run in the First District, though whether or not he or the fake Democratic candidate will make the ballot once qualifying ends in June remains to be seen. In a head-to-head race with Matt Gaetz, the most recent polling from fivethiryeight.com shows Jones leading Gaetz by 6 points, something she highlighted during her speech in Orlando. The June 1 event recognized the start of Pride month nationwide as Ron DeSantis works to demonize, criminalize and silence LGBT Floridians through oppressive and unconstitutional executive actions. Organizer Jack Petocz, who organized the national walk-outs in protest of Florida's discriminatory and predatory "Don't Say Gay" bill earlier this year, introduced Rebekah as one of the main speakers of the event for her efforts to expose DeSantis at great personal cost to herself and her family. Democratic Congressional candidate Maxwell Alejandro Frost also spoke at the event, as did activists Zander Moricz and Will Larkins, Pulse shooting survivor and gun-reform advocate Brandon Wolf, as well as Charlie Crist, Nikki Fried and Anna Eskamani.

clean_body: Rebekah makes national headlines in Whistleblower win; joins Crist, Fried in Orlando in major speech | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 3 min | Rebe | | Can't see this message? | | | | | New video, press and more | | | | | Rebekah makes national headlines in Whistleblower win; joins Crist, Fried in Orlando in major speech | | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 3 min | | | | Rebekah Jones made national headlines this week when the state leaked an internal report from Governor Ron DeSantis' Inspector General to the press, catching the pro-DeSantis media red-handed for illegally obtaining the final version before the state even sent it to Jones' attorneys. The report, which found Rebekah told the truth about the state ordering her to hide and delete data from public access (though contended that's not a crime), has been hailed as a victory for Jones' case, according to legal experts. "The state did its own investigation of itself entirely separate from my whistleblower complaint and still could not find proof that anything I said was false," Rebekah told The Miami Herald. "I didn't interview for this report, we didn't file our complaint with his IG, and yet they still couldn't disprove what happened in what is supposed to be their own narrative." On the two most bombastic charges - that state officials pressured Rebekah to falsify figures for the purpose of misleading the public - the state's investigation of itself determined it could neither prove nor disprove what happened, despite multiple DOH employees submitting sworn statements supporting Rebekah's report. Still, a neutral finding from what amounts to the state's own position statement is a considerable win, said Tallahassee attorney and former head of ACLU Florida Richard Johnson. Despite the bulk of the alt-right media attacking Jones, largely based on fired-Politico hack Marc Caputo's defamatory and fabricated opinion blog, the report itself supports the crux of Jones' claims. Jones' whistleblower complaint is still active with the Florida Commission on Human Relations and once a determination is made on her complaint (now two years old), Jones and her lawyers plan to sue for what might be the largest whistleblower settlement for any government agency in United States history. Riding the wave of unexpected but mostly positive news, Rebekah joined some of Florida's most fierce activists in Orlando to the importance of voting out Desantis and "everyone like him" at the Rally to Remove Ron Wednesday. Former Florida Governor (and current candidate for Florida governor) Charlie Crist praised Rebekah during his speech condemning DeSantis' evil intentions, thanking her for her work during COVID-19, her run for office and her fight for government accountability. Both Crist and Fried have been fierce supporters of Jones for two years, and Jones has the full-backing of both the Florida Democratic Party and the National Democratic Party in her run against Matt Gaetz, whose sex-trafficking investigation has been in grand jury proceedings since at least last summer. since news of Gaetz' alleged-sex trafficking of underage boys and girls broke in January 2021. “He hasn’t been seen publicly with him in a year and a half,” Jones observed of DeSantis and Gaetz. The positive press from the state's internal report and the Orlando event have boosted the visibility of Rebekah's campaign in Northwest Florida to unseat Matt Gaetz. Despite a Desantis-backed Democratic living in another district filing to run against her, Rebekah's polling at 88% in the Democratic primary, which party officials have said they don't view as a "contested race," given the damage the Desantis-backed shill candidate has done to the party while openly coordinating with Desantis' administration. Another "ghost candidate" from Palm Coast, Robert Jones, also filed to run in the First District, though whether or not he or the fake Democratic candidate will make the ballot once qualifying ends in June remains to be seen. In a head-to-head race with Matt Gaetz, the most recent polling from fivethiryeight.com shows Jones leading Gaetz by 6 points, something she highlighted during her speech in Orlando. The June 1 event recognized the start of Pride month nationwide as Ron DeSantis works to demonize, criminalize and silence LGBT Floridians through oppressive and unconstitutional executive actions. Organizer Jack Petocz, who organized the national walk-outs in protest of Florida's discriminatory and predatory "Don't Say Gay" bill earlier this year, introduced Rebekah as one of the main speakers of the event for her efforts to expose DeSantis at great personal cost to herself and her family. Democratic Congressional candidate Maxwell Alejandro Frost also spoke at the event, as did activists Zander Moricz and Will Larkins, Pulse shooting survivor and gun-reform advocate Brandon Wolf, as well as Charlie Crist, Nikki Fried and Anna Eskamani. | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

body:
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment and we need you and thousands of others to show up for Mark today.
#

**BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump just endorsed GOP extremist Blake Masters in the Arizona Senate race**
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark Kelly in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220602-2-7&t=1&akid=2975%2E6688874%2E-dYiT5)**
* * *
Friends —
We knew this day was coming and we’ve been planning for it, but now it’s finally here.
**Trump has just endorsed GOP extremist, Blake Masters, who is running against Mark. The MAGA-right have their guy now, and Trump is sure to rally their donations and activism to defeat Mark. This isn’t just bad news for Arizona, but for the entire country.**
Right now, we need strong, independent leadership in the Senate to guide us through these challenging times — not someone who will put Trump’s priorities ahead of the needs of the American people.
The NRSC and Mitch McConnell’s super PAC have already thrown MILLIONS into this race, and you can bet they will double down now that Trump has finally made his choice.
But the thing is, they aren’t going to have to just beat Mark — they’re going to have to beat ALL OF US if they want to take back this seat.
Which is why today we need your help to raise $250,000 to make sure we’re prepared for the onslaught of attack ads coming our way. So, what do you say?
[**Will you make your first donation to our people-powered campaign? This is an all-hands-on-deck moment and we need you and thousands of others to show up for Mark today to defend this seat from Trump and Masters.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220602-2-7&t=2&akid=2975%2E6688874%2E-dYiT5)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Don’t bother to watch tonight.
body:
Bumbling Joe Biden will address the nation tonight to call for "commonsense" gun control measures.
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/F8ET9GeW763SsuBD4upQ6SBg/HcfnMki6sjNwBsIDDMjCyw)**
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/F8ET9GeW763SsuBD4upQ6SBg/HcfnMki6sjNwBsIDDMjCyw)Bumbling Joe Biden will address the nation tonight to call for "commonsense" gun control measures.

To save you time, I'd like to go ahead and tell you what Biden and his Communist Comrades in Congress will likely try and pass at breakneck speed:
* **The return of Bill Clinton 's "Assault Weapons Ban"** - Despite no such thing as an assault weapon existing, they will seek to ban the new sale and transfer of "black rifles" or anything that looks "scary".

**Ban magazines that hold more than 10 rounds** - Likely, hundreds of millions of magazines are in circulation in our nation that hold more than 10 rounds . . . and that's the point. If Democrats institute a ban (which I would find hard to pass), nearly all gun-owning, law-abiding Americans will become criminals if they don't turn them in. Good luck with that! The Democrats say they want revolutionary change, and I'll tell you, if they try to do that, they will certainly get it.

**" Universal" Background Checks** - State and federal background checks are already burdensome and outside of private transfers and sales (which are narrowing in each state). Because of this, it is already nearly impossible in America to legally buy a firearm without undergoing a background check. But Democrats want you to think otherwise, so they continue their lies about background checks not existing.

Now, in between each proposal, Biden will tell a heartfelt story and invoke the names of children recently slaughtered **by a deranged gunman whose parents didn 't raise him right . . . or at all**.

Gun Control will not save lives. It will only result in more deaths. That's the cold, hard, truth. **In fact, we need more guns and less gun free zones.**

We need members of Congress willing to speak the truth. And that's why [I continue to ask for your support to win my election that's less than three months away](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/F8ET9GeW763SsuBD4upQ6SBg/HcfnMki6sjNwBsIDDMjCyw).

We know the recipe of a mass shooter . . . **and it has nothing to do with firearms.**

The vast majority of mass murderers have a history of early childhood trauma and are exposed to violence when they're young. This includes physical and sexual abuse, domestic violence and even suicide of a parent.

They all have had a crisis leading up to their decision to take lives, and the influence of other incidents is what triggers them to act. It's why we always see these shootings come in waves.

**Mass shootings stop in the home**. They stop in your community by simply being a good neighbor and reaching out to those who may need help. **Mass shootings STOP cold with love and willingness to give our time and attention to others**. Mass shootings will stop when our nation decides to address the growing mental health crisis that we have here in America.

Mass shooters and violent criminals don't stop with Red Flag laws, they don't care about the law at all, which is why gun control isn't the solution at all. That's the Leftists' solution to everything - more control.

The Constitutional solution is a life-long solution, and it's simple: take care of your family, respect the law, and show compassion to others so they can get the help they need. **There are no new laws required.**

But, Biden and the Democrats will never talk about that, because the government can't regulate love and good citizenry.

However, we can, and we can speak honestly about it. So please, [if you agree, give me a voice in Congress by helping me win the Florida Republican Primary on August 23rd](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/F8ET9GeW763SsuBD4upQ6SBg/HcfnMki6sjNwBsIDDMjCyw).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer **** ** ** **** **Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc** **** **Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

clean_body: Bumbling Joe Biden will address the nation tonight to call for "commonsense" gun control measures. ** | | | Patriot, Joe Biden will address the nation tonight to call for "commonsense" gun control measures. To save you time, I'd like to go ahead and tell you what Biden and his Communist Comrades in Congress will likely try and pass at breakneck speed: The return of Bill Clinton 's "Assault Weapons Ban" - Despite no such thing as an assault weapon existing, they will seek to ban the new sale and transfer of "black rifles" or anything that looks "scary". Ban magazines that hold more than 10 rounds - Likely, hundreds of millions of magazines are in circulation in our nation that hold more than 10 rounds . . . and that's the point. If Democrats institute a ban (which I would find hard to pass), nearly all gun-owning, law-abiding Americans will become criminals if they don't turn them in. Good luck with that! The Democrats say they want revolutionary change, and I'll tell you, if they try to do that, they will certainly get it. " Universal" Background Checks - State and federal background checks are already burdensome and outside of private transfers and sales (which are narrowing in each state). Because of this, it is already nearly impossible in America to legally buy a firearm without undergoing a background check. But Democrats want you to think otherwise, so they continue their lies about background checks not existing. Now, in between each proposal, Biden will tell a heartfelt story and invoke the names of children recently slaughtered by a deranged gunman whose parents didn 't raise him right . . . or at all. Gun Control will not save lives. It will only result in more deaths. That's the cold, hard, truth. In fact, we need more guns and less gun free zones. We need members of Congress willing to speak the truth. And that's why . We know the recipe of a mass shooter . . . and it has nothing to do with firearms. The vast majority of mass murderers have a history of early childhood trauma and are exposed to violence when they're young. This includes physical and sexual abuse, domestic violence and even suicide of a parent. They all have had a crisis leading up to their decision to take lives, and the influence of other incidents is what triggers them to act. It's why we always see these shootings come in waves. Mass shootings stop in the home. They stop in your community by simply being a good neighbor and reaching out to those who may need help. Mass shootings STOP cold with love and willingness to give our time and attention to others. Mass shootings will stop when our nation decides to address the growing mental health crisis that we have here in America. Mass shooters and violent criminals don't stop with Red Flag laws, they don't care about the law at all, which is why gun control isn't the solution at all. That's the Leftists' solution to everything - more control. The Constitutional solution is a life-long solution, and it's simple: take care of your family, respect the law, and show compassion to others so they can get the help they need. There are no new laws required. But, Biden and the Democrats will never talk about that, because the government can't regulate love and good citizenry. However, we can, and we can speak honestly about it. So please, . Thanks so much for all that you do. **TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** Congressman Timmons Says NO to a REAL DEBATEThe only thing that one can say is that Congressman Timmons’ refusal to participate in a series of no-holds-barred DEBATES is BOTH embarrassing and humiliating for the inexperienced Congressman!Congressman William Richardson Timmons IV will NOT have a no-holds-barred debate with Mike LaPierre.Instead of having a series of actual debates where Timmons must defend his DISMAL congressional record and results, TEAM TIMMONS opted for just one orchestrated and manipulated “forum.”It is NOT a real debate.The Republican “establishment” is trying to call the June 6th orchestrated and manipulated event an actual DEBATE so they can claim a debate! This is a major laugh-out-loud! EVERY ASPECT of this congressional forum has been finely tuned in favor on WILLIAM RICHARDSON TIMMONS IV.As a matter of FACT, the congressional results are so poor for Congressman Timmons that MOST of the REPUBLICAN CLUBS are protecting the incumbent by NOT letting opposition candidates speak at their monthly meetings.That’s right, they have shut out and cancelled the opposition voices! Does this sound like America to you?How pathetic is that? His record is so BAD that he DOES NOT have the intestinal fortitude to stand up and defend his record in an actual DEBATE FORMAT!In conclusion, this is a Fourth District Republican Club establishment extravaganza of how to limit the EXPOSURE of a very weak two-term Congressman. How weak? So weak that he CAN NOT stand on his own two feet. He MUST BE PROTECTED.Timmons is NOT Trey Gowdy. Timmons is NOT Jim DeMint. Timmons can’t even hold the shorts of the climate czar, Bob Inglis.Any questions?Vote Mike LaPierre for CongressSC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg CountiesAn evangelical Christian who can “mark” the secular humanist trees through a God-given forest.
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!

body:
This is just the beginning.
#
Derek, holy sh*t.
**The NRSC is launching a $2.3 MILLION TV ad buy in Pennsylvania attacking John + our campaign — and it starts TOMORROW.**
[**Derek, we’re calling in Team Fetterman supporters like you to immediately counter this attack. Rush a donation so we can start.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220602-2?refcode=em20220602-6077&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6077_434096_Qp1mmw&akid=6077%2E434096%2EQp1mmw)

This is the very first Republican attack ad of the General Election, and it’s only a small taste of what's to come.
Republicans are primed to spend virtually unlimited $$$ dragging John + Democrats through the mud because they know Senate control will be decided in Pennsylvania.

If we can get a couple thousand Team Fetterman supporters to chip in right now, we can be ready to fight back + launch ads of our own.

name: Chris Constant
subject: Thanks for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Constant for Congress
body:
| | **Thank you, team!**

Last month, I issued a bold call to action. I told you what was at stake in this election and then I asked you to join me in my fight to flip this seat from red to blue. **Thanks to your generous support, we’ve reached our grassroots goal** and are one step closer to leveling the playing field for all Alaskans. _Thank you, thank you, thank you!_

As we launch into Pride Month and draw closer to the special election primary, I’ve been thinking a lot about what it would mean to become the first openly LGBTQ+ representative Alaska sends to Congress.

I’ve always been proud to make my home in Alaska, where people care more about what you contribute to the community than about what categories you fit into. A new generation of Alaskans are making their voices heard – they’re ready for true representation in Congress.

In 2017, I made history as one of the first openly gay candidates elected to municipal office in our state. Later, I co-sponsored legislation in the Anchorage Assembly that successfully banned harmful “conversion” therapy on minors in the LGBTQ+ community.

**I’ve never been one to run away from a tough fight, and I’m committed to carrying the voices of ALL Alaskans to Washington.**

[I need your help in the final days before the special election primary. Will you contribute $10 to send Alaska’s first openly LGBTQ+ candidate to Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46056139/348658894/-965536066?amount=10&refcode=CC_EM_FR_WL_220602_1_1&contactdata=lEFIIg6WBC%2B1SMAzLxZMdZZkyttj2%2FpV9PZSf3eBC%2BSwXGMP%2FpG59wdghiD%2BjROj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDkwNWYzOC1kZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjqcS8_g2DNxboiUKo9q2BudYJY3WhMh964fV8IoFrk=) | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46056140/348658895/-965536066?amount=10&refcode=CC_EM_FR_WL_220602_1_1&contactdata=lEFIIg6WBC%2B1SMAzLxZMdZZkyttj2%2FpV9PZSf3eBC%2BSwXGMP%2FpG59wdghiD%2BjROj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDkwNWYzOC1kZmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjqcS8_g2DNxboiUKo9q2BudYJY3WhMh964fV8IoFrk=)**
---
Thank you for helping ensure we have a representative who will put Alaskans – ALL Alaskans – above petty politics in Congress.

Happy Pride Month!

– Chris

clean_body: | | Thank you, team! Last month, I issued a bold call to action. I told you what was at stake in this election and then I asked you to join me in my fight to flip this seat from red to blue. Thanks to your generous support, we’ve reached our grassroots goal and are one step closer to leveling the playing field for all Alaskans. Thank you, thank you, thank you! As we launch into Pride Month and draw closer to the special election primary, I’ve been thinking a lot about what it would mean to become the first openly LGBTQ+ representative Alaska sends to Congress. I’ve always been proud to make my home in Alaska, where people care more about what you contribute to the community than about what categories you fit into. A new generation of Alaskans are making their voices heard – they’re ready for true representation in Congress. In 2017, I made history as one of the first openly gay candidates elected to municipal office in our state. Later, I co-sponsored legislation in the Anchorage Assembly that successfully banned harmful “conversion” therapy on minors in the LGBTQ+ community. I’ve never been one to run away from a tough fight, and I’m committed to carrying the voices of ALL Alaskans to Washington. = | | = Thank you for helping ensure we have a representative who will put Alaskans – ALL Alaskans – above petty politics in Congress. Happy Pride Month! – Chris | | ** Paid for by Constant for Congress Constant for Congress P.O. Box 240361 Anchorage, AK 99524 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lisa=20Lopez?=
subject: Do you know what our children are learning?
body:
Where do you draw the line?

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049

** Are we ready to stand up for our children?
------------------------------------------------------------

** This is the year we take our families back.
------------------------------------------------------------

As our children are wrapping up their school year and embarking on the adventures of summer vacation, it is important that we remain mindful that there continues to be tremendous need for change in our schools. Right now, our children are learning sexualized content, CRT, confusing and many times even contradictory messaging. All of this needs to stop.

The purpose of our educational system here in Colorado is to inspire and prepare the next generation for success and happiness.

Currently, we have institutions of ignorance and want. We have children being taught to question their very nature and are below grade-level in nearly every subject across the board. Our schools confuse, indoctrinate, and create division among our most innocent and lovely. I am a mom who has had enough.

Who will be the voice for the next generation who depend on us to be faithful to their needs and follow through on our obligations to them?

>From our early education to our post-secondary institutions and state colleges, we have been waiting for a voice, we have waited for follow-through from those who promised us a voice and what we have heard has pierced our hearts, a silence that is deafening and constant.

Where is our foundation?

This is where we must return. My hope is that we will find our firm foundation on solid rock and begin to rebuild our curriculum back to a traditional, basic framework of reading, writing, arithmetic, and natural science so that we can hold a competitive educational standard that prepares our children for a successful and happy life.

Greg and I want to see all of Colorado’s children thrive, not just survive, in this beautiful state that has so much to offer.

Sincerely,

Lisa Lopez

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
** Make A Donation (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)
** Link (http://www.instagram.com/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)
** Website (http://mailchimp.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=73194510ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_02_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-73194510ef-584862049)

Copyright © 2022 Greg Lopez For Governor, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Greg Lopez For Governor
PO Box 1413
Parker, CO 80134-1400
USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://lopez2022.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=167f0a76cf8dabade58fa0f6a&id=9fbc254cd8&e=14fea94d99&c=73194510ef)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://lopez2022.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=167f0a76cf8dabade58fa0f6a&id=9fbc254cd8&e=14fea94d99&c=73194510ef)

subject: Did you see my interview on Fox News?
body:
Check it out! ⬇️

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/36415600a1b0/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7129773?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews

Friend,

Did you see my latest interview?

I went on Fox News to talk about our campaign and my plans as Oregon’s next Congresswoman.

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews

We also discussed how Oregon is ready for a change.

The Far-Left’s policies have resulted in a major rise in crime, skyrocketing prices, the homelessness crisis, and the lack of parental choice in schools. These policies are NOT what OR-05 needs or wants.

I’m ready to STAND UP for Oregon and FIGHT for policies that work and benefit our state. Can I count on your support to fight with me?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews?amount=100

I understand that the people of Oregon are hurting and I’m ready to make changes.

Our law enforcement deserves to be funded. Americans deserve to be able to afford gas and groceries. Parents deserve a voice in their children’s education.

If you have had enough of the Left’s failed policies, join me today in fighting for a better future for Oregon and OR-05.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/fox-news?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=foxnews

Lori Chavez-DeRemer

body:

| [](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=7fc7f1c904ed47828d5c852938b90c43&_e=WSV4tbLJjg_NLme5MFM6Ucoye0doCNEiMsJohK7jfrAy4Ybem49_IKdnLS5tuzQ4-DCd8LLlPhyiYubAuK1kErb6C8PP9spooLeb7KMMTiD9jZCSwVHNaQs1GvZTPqG9hYxCOYOin_fGfrkLo-Tq0OBPu4rGEsavinf1zPYJHPWBs_ewjOGgFxBdDz3iv_N7tUC47xrM9F9Oq8zSqZvY1gbpm54_4yEQye1KoPMi8EHYIfiS4OSzU66yLdkoRF5EBW9vkJUIsDOhSdI8HK7iZpxNP5J60zen3xnDWshvuvYm_vASjk_4EDrDUn__CUCE6f6S1obbL4DLBiUQKScEexOehB-2xYfuXOnwbsfQqviOzVIjqUWo9sYrYgDy4S8KadDvkr372rBtweZJPKV1C2HorzcPjuKjKbec3UBaSRz7UwMU-F7CQB0vRONQA8PLYKr9mN5lHQE0aYVJSXLdTxx8_Wz5hcKiJ5ovze2bhq7BsxbtrYpNRGvGdENlsxaztwNVw_kJc34I_PkCyoyi4ma0C5oQe_c8Z7FPkO8YcVDP3eQN1xOgqisWgwg_xoml)

Friend,

Randy Feenstra’s authenticity and commitment to upholding conservative values is RARE in today’s political arena. **Trust me.**

That’s why when Randy and his wife Lynette asked me to be the special guest at the Feenstra Family Picnic on June 30, I immediately cleared my schedule and said YES!

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I’ve been endorsed by Elise Stefanik
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Join President Trump and Elise Stefanik | Our movement is growing stronger by the day. In addition to President Trump's endorsement...
Peter,

Our movement is growing stronger by the day.

In addition to President Trump's endorsement, **I recently received the endorsement of Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Chairwoman of the House Republican Conference.** Elise is a tireless advocate for the America First agenda, and I'm honored to have her support as I work to restore President Trump's America First agenda in Alaska and across the country.

During the course of this campaign, I've earned the endorsements of many great Republican leaders: President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Nikki Haley, and now Elise Stefanik. However, there's one endorsement that I haven't received yet, and that's **YOURS, Peter.**

Your support is critical to my success in this election. Without the support of every pro-Trump, pro-America patriot, I won't win.

subject: They think “MAGA” is a bad word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Fellow Conservative,

You hear it everywhere these days - and we have for years, really: MAGA.

But now, it’s being heard coming from some people you’d never expect to utter the word. People like Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Speaker Nancy Pelosi to Democrat congressional candidates from across the country. Apparently referring to Republican opponents in their attack ads simply as “Republicans” wasn’t enough to move the needle in their direction, so they’ve decided to label all conservatives and Republicans going forward as “MAGA Republicans” as if it were a pejorative or a cuss word.

Hmm.

Seems to us that Schumer and Pelosi paid a lot of money to someone in order to come up with this label. We’re not sure it’s going to make a lick of difference, but nonetheless we’re curious to know what you think about the newest thing the far-left is calling every conservative American.

| [**Do you consider “MAGA” to be a bad thing? ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e79db4b66b7444c59cab21919094551a&_e=uj4iaDjVieWl8496kHxMDNdvYbjbZTUVuUFcgnz3nNcPa9YF1d8rzLfvbkJ2SfvdrdNd0qaGlCl2eQTVgGMNbsWBNyExElyM3HIJYnJXM6xnHvJ6k9YOpcwrRdD52cWFUENEEwx7sitYqyrzN_8vkyE5GBfIYaUUpSCBcBgXWvPzD_fK-o6BhKhaWWcQQm1kOTv0bb4arbcTfqBtjI3MGrKqLeQxGypfRJh0Urz67rJZ3l6FXJ2e0IT16SSa-5BFBsB5GULJdkHcLqLnEf-5RRvD-OB2-F4dZCPswgX8bVmu7AmjwtEhZqrhKTjN74zxkk385nxMYS9AgOeuxFCcroCJH_5pH58UheYjmZlYw8wAoYpgSy7GdJSB4F6fGu7fn5DPGpNGuiG8zIryXuc4G7JyUPQw5-K8mJBCgBLZzk2nbpdR5CLdPNOfo3btJrHj8MLbX1RPm0Kmma88EzOGUyPsP1ScbwiSmyva5fhfbpI%3D)
---

Senator Chuck Schumer has a knack for making everything about politics. In our humble opinion he’d have been a much better campaign manager than a senator; he’s not a serious member of Congress - he’d rather start fights than pass any real legislation.

[**We’re interested to see if this new “MAGA” gambit pays off for him. Let us know what you think by taking our quick survey today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e79db4b66b7444c59cab21919094551a&_e=uj4iaDjVieWl8496kHxMDNdvYbjbZTUVuUFcgnz3nNcPa9YF1d8rzLfvbkJ2SfvdrdNd0qaGlCl2eQTVgGMNbsWBNyExElyM3HIJYnJXM6xnHvJ6k9YOpcwrRdD52cWFUENEEwx7sitYqyrzN_8vkyE5GBfIYaUUpSCBcBgXWvPzD_fK-o6BhKhaWWcQQm1kOTv0bb4arbcTfqBtjI3MGrKqLeQxGypfRJh0Urz67rJZ3l6FXJ2e0IT16SSa-5BFBsB5GULJdkHcLqLnEf-5Rdwu7mSO4pHqblw-rf0z3boCo__zMvaK9CPjcqw0wXwAxx_WVsOiM80umuEZgXdWXY-iE4RerTZIB5Dak6I78aokAPG4up9YG8jtcIfPplLQIUgAbbPL4zRp-l0b6cixnTlKQdZOWvnSsYuT1_RjeWCzL7gQ9ECmrNQlJWI5JGYQQTiSH70fFIaxRI2gNCtBL4qJtkv_tuKagI80e0oq4sU%3D)

subject: Really quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Let’s leave it all out on the field.
#

Friends — we’ll be quick. Here’s why:
**This is going to be a very fast campaign.** Election Day is just 82 days away. Even faster if you count early voting.
That means we have 82 days to get our message about why Alessandra is the best candidate in this race out to as many voters as possible.
82 days to knock as many doors and make as many calls as we possibly can.
**_82 days to mobilize, organize, and win._**
Doing that is going to take a lot of resources, especially when our opponent has the entire corporate establishment and political machine in New York and Washington behind him.
There’s a tremendous amount of work ahead of us, and Alessandra can’t do it alone. So please:
[**Can you add your contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our campaign for Congress? Your early support will make all the difference in this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220602-1-t1&refcode2=813_59515_R-Zcb_&akid=813%2E59515%2ER-Zcb_)

name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump just attacked Adam
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=298%2E5257348%2Exz1L0d ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

There are 5 days until California's jungle primary election, and Donald
Trump is hard at work attacking Adam and Hillary Clinton in exclusive Fox
News interviews:

"I think she should be ashamed of herself, and she lost the election. She should
be ashamed of herself and so should Schiff." — Donald Trump to Fox News Digital,
6/1/22

With Adam's primary 5 days away, we urgently need your help for three
major reasons:

1. We need to respond to Trump's attacks. Remember, Trump falsely
claiming he also won the popular vote in 2016, were it not for
millions of illegitimate votes in California (a lie), was a precursor
to his Big Lie about the 2020 election.
2. We're doing everything possible and not sparing any effort in this
final week's homestretch to ensure Adam comes out on top and beats the
8 opponents he’s up against — including a QAnon conspiracy theorist
endorsed by Roger Stone and Michael Flynn.
3. June is the last month of the FEC fundraising quarter. At the end of
the month, we'll file a public report for the last three months with
every single contribution our campaign has received. We need to post
the strongest number possible. Republicans like Trump and Kevin
McCarthy will be looking at Adam's campaign specifically as a marker
of Democratic energy leading into November's midterm elections.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220602_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=298%2E5257348%2Exz1L0d ]With those three things in mind, Derek, can you please pitch
in today to help Adam finish this primary strong and help Democrats have a
strong showing for this important quarterly fundraising report?

# [Judicial Watch Files Federal Lawsuit against Illinois to Stop Counting of Ballots Received After Election Day – Plaintiffs Include Member of Congress](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27407&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
For more than 25 years, Judicial Watch has been known for its aggressive, leading-edge use of public records laws and lawsuits, as well as taxpayer, civil rights and whistleblower protection litigation to fight government corruption. Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of this effort, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27407&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
|

| |

### [U.S. Deportations Fell 70% in Biden’s First Year—62% Drop for Criminal Aliens ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27408&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVwb3J0YXRpb25zLWZlbGwtNzAtaW4tYmlkZW5zLWZpcnN0LXllYXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Judicial Watch As the U.S. gets bombarded with an unprecedented surge of migrants along the southern border, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) records show a shocking decline in deportations during the Biden administration’s first year including dangerous criminals. Removals by the Homeland Security agency created after 9/11 to secure the nation’s borders fell nearly 70% last year, according to government figures obtained by the Center for Immigration Studies (CIS) this month. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27408&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVwb3J0YXRpb25zLWZlbGwtNzAtaW4tYmlkZW5zLWZpcnN0LXllYXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---
### [TSA Hiring Diversity/Inclusion Chief Though Most Employees are Racial, Ethnic Minorities ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27418&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHNhLWRpdmVyc2l0eS1pbmNsdXNpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Judicial Watch Although the majority of Transportation Security Administration (TSA) employees come from “underrepresented racial and ethnic groups,” the agency is hiring a Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer at the recommendation of a special Inclusion Action Committee (IAC) created after George Floyd’s death. ### [California law requiring women on corporate boards is unconstitutional, judge rules ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59044&L=27414&F=H&) ABA Journal A California judge has struck down a law requiring public corporations headquartered in the state to include a minimum number of women on their boards of directors. clean_body: For more than 25 years, Judicial Watch has been known for its aggressive, leading-edge use of public records laws and lawsuits, as well as taxpayer, civil rights and whistleblower protection litigation to fight government corruption. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | June 02, 2022 ---|---|--- | | = = For more than 25 years, Judicial Watch has been known for its aggressive, leading-edge use of public records laws and lawsuits, as well as taxpayer, civil rights and whistleblower protection litigation to fight government corruption. Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of this effort, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements. = | | | = Judicial Watch As the U.S. gets bombarded with an unprecedented surge of migrants along the southern border, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) records show a shocking decline in deportations during the Biden administration’s first year including dangerous criminals. Removals by the Homeland Security agency created after 9/11 to secure the nation’s borders fell nearly 70% last year, according to government figures obtained by the Center for Immigration Studies (CIS) this month. = = Judicial Watch Although the majority of Transportation Security Administration (TSA) employees come from “underrepresented racial and ethnic groups,” the agency is hiring a Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer at the recommendation of a special Inclusion Action Committee (IAC) created after George Floyd’s death. = == ABA Journal A California judge has struck down a law requiring public corporations headquartered in the state to include a minimum number of women on their boards of directors. == | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

| Team, you can officially add threats against the LGBTQ+ community as another thing leaders of the AZ GOP are OK with.

How else do you explain the silence from Paul Gosar, Wendy Rogers and the AZ Gov frontrunner Kari Lake, when one of their biggest supporters released a video **openly saying he would target LGBTQ+ people and their supporters at area retail establishments** – unless those establishments stopped supporting the LGBTQ+ community.

**_This is unacceptable and AZ GOP leaders must condemn it immediately. And yet, they haven’t._**

**[Team, this is another example of the extremist people that Lake, Gosar and Rogers embrace. Their extremism isn’t limited to elections – they will carry it across all facets of Arizona. Can you donate $10 right now so we can send a resounding message that we are sick of this hate and will work to defeat as many of these extremists as possible this November?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xbjBsJjzpW0SY0vVL86wDzlLZfmC0dANz2NNsOtrM4PNXy1w0g8oxmnUjGi1tLhxs73jmbRbZjF5V7CTbHFTJoiicDhC6Hu1Mb52Bz8JuvU7LCR1LQPah8MqZsnerIEcXIB8nO3b6BkdPHislAtbqowhx7lMaMin0AOPbGmytkKtf4MSoh8Kh8m1GYDMM52u5wXTDbs7hf727SuHyfkWjAtBu9kDAyYY6A1wfGD3bFOzt2ZMY1KKIF5F2071vPHhb_F9Go2tZNX_7EN-xB_KFsl-SD9DcwZlI8wS36HPVLUaeJY5epIaC-_145Jm3GnyeHDpSDwy3DnntboKjRE6UtBgg9f7mWc2w7j4G5UanZsPgkWxj0ecuCUtQDOpNfTr3nG1C0Bp4-aktJv9pJi8bK8QaPD6pQ9R7J9YUT3tiMfY6Co2pLIwe6cYjo3tTl1NfMak_S-ZkQeRjLHs5CzyoVwkEx2fosJmOMMgvRWE_2wX_BmdcbWDfwt6LW_I-TNL8/3mk/caL4aMFNT2iFUw2E3_aLvA/h1/4J-fOdJqWZBtkB-iopVIoPtZEkV2gffUkeej-eDycps)** [

This isn’t the only example of the AZ GOP’s hostility to the LGBTQ+ community. They have repeatedly blocked attempts to prevent discrimination and firing on the basis of sexual orientation. That’s right – you can be fired from your job for being gay in Arizona, and the AZ GOP have continually blocked all attempts to change that.

Throw in recent legislation targeting transgender youth, national discourse around LGBTQ+ children, and more, and you can see we must continue to fight for the LGBTQ+ community and the rights they deserve.

**[Team, the AZ GOP is ready to send us back decades when it comes to LGBTQ+ rights.
