name: Mary Trump
subject: Our very democracy is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friends—when my uncle and his enablers tried to overturn the will
of the American people and steal the 2020 presidential election, the
guardrails of democracy were bent to their absolute limits.

In fact, if Republicans had been in control of both the House and Senate,
they could have been successful.

Not only would a GOP Senate majority further curtail voting rights and
restrict abortion access, but there's no doubt they would overturn free
and fair election results if it meant reclaiming power.

Our very democracy is on the ballot this year, friends—we have to
expand our Democratic Senate majority in order to protect it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you make a donation to Tim
Ryan’s campaign so he can defeat extremist JD Vance to keep his MAGA
buddies from stealing future elections and destroying our democracy?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1015&amount=25&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1016&amount=50&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1017&amount=100&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1018&amount=200&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1019&amount=250&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1020&amount=30&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Other Amount

Thanks to the filibuster, our current majority isn’t enough to pass any
meaningful legislation—we’ve seen it when trying to pass voting rights
legislation and codify Roe into law.

The good news is that polling shows just how close this race really is—Tim
can win this race and flip Ohio blue, giving us one more crucial Senate
vote.

But defending our majority will be tough enough, so expanding it will take
everything we’ve got.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1021&amount=25&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]That’s why I need your help electing Tim Ryan in Ohio—he’s the
Democrats’ best shot at flipping a Republican-held seat and giving us the
Senate votes we need to get things done. Can I count on you to chip in $25
right now?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13944?t=1009&amount=50&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Donate $50

Thank you,

Dr. Mary L. Trump

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13946?t=1006&akid=4003%2E3611125%2EuZDI8o ]Mary Trump

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer to help elect Beto?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
In order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.
#
Right now, we’re building one of the biggest organizing programs Texas has ever seen so we can make history and elect Beto as our next Governor.

Team Beto volunteers have already accomplished some amazing things. **But in order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.**

We’re reaching out to you because our campaign needs your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
[**Will you sign up today to write letters to to Texans and help build support for Beto?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52815?utm_source=ema20220602-192100&t=1&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF) You'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters after a brief training. Plus, our letter-writing events are hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere.
**[Write letters for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52815?utm_source=ema20220602-192100&t=2&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF)**
Winning in Texas won't be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we're capable of generating once-in-a-lifetime voter turnout if we put in the work right now.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54521?refcode=ema20220602-192100&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220602-192100-footer&t=4&refcode2=192100_444211_Z2W7ZF&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=5&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=192100%2E444211%2EZ2W7ZF)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Tom Winter
subject: The final deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
I’m getting straight to the point. | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wv0VyMpcICWSI-E8rCVuhJNWeJQsR5kgBEDlJKOGZEM28tRf2Gud2GKq5kmFSHps3TMvMO6vVVdUkRLoU_irCuV47oC7iJJV0lzzg44NPjcDuGJd231unCk07rOA24P6R1vKiC5tJmXPf5lgwwSeA1kALzZh_BAzMdxAckx91Wn8l8JGnGxWQoqCklBkuW2IAOY92dpVQYzoqqN6hPOel1wFxZSZ4XPIjDC-a2KnRYseIgMFlyw4S_EIur22ISpDQzH3gF-Xh-YpfXQMaZKYhS7b_hKyElraNU-M9D4axc-rj8PARVskQ_3QJZzK0gANuRMFRY3MmopO23wh6X2grg/3mk/-64kVZBlQ7OMwquB5SWn1Q/h0/pBz4KQ91NSpAqWdZtlw2Nnn9z_rqsKJELe4PqMYlygo) Let me get straight to the point, Friend: We are facing our FINAL fundraising deadline of this primary campaign, and I’m writing to humbly ask for your support.

**[Can you help us reach our $5,000 goal and rush a donation right away?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzKJRBFYnnGuurjHNF501U9NIW8wL-3T4jNirG9BHycEdBt9ow79pmI1CcL7Z2-LFtVwTOrnpsifUA7hq521SNlRlurqBRSbztzFc23gh5YQj03iUp4MSwbcB4rPYC8mnDZcb8EaapaCbS9Pco-26uAFBj4geTqSi265A6OjtsHrutfI03CPBvIfavweC9Xx9RUrKAZ3OGpLPnXmt94CSXTksTC9oO9Fy3k_KTT8HR4ColqROrbcF5_l7-yyE4svW5vW03Uk6Q6g4r8pfs4NYDbM3kqndXGk4rJMN0J7UVK92bobh6ohWLuEhgbNRZSDk/3mk/-64kVZBlQ7OMwquB5SWn1Q/h1/z87rYzlHHU4dTXnBRbiZKhtKId8WHGy9Rl50fRCv5NA)**
| [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzKJRBFYnnGuurjHNF501U9NIW8wL-3T4jNirG9BHycMOkz2MnSBCLi0kIYvsBiZIzruIMvIqgRUFI8bjZ74YiDc7zOeSj_n17xdKZYPOcDn1t5Ij9UqBM0gQCvZnYIzM4Tq7BioDpoWe-0woMKz2zqM6otW0c2VmmVVvSIqonVq8DBMB9IWAYfNQC0DPSUIRge7E9cq9SO1moyH-Lq77WNTs_Z01eLDPTe4D8dGE1NZHNiIcwmw_gr-hITnK-ULo3cyFR3wT0Qvp9kEUPr5vy0D3BvzH1T19uqM6Fp5gIygI6OGMwZ2Zkfu3qJ2hHD5Y/3mk/-64kVZBlQ7OMwquB5SWn1Q/h2/14pAm7Bzzb9WZvaIQZy2Rp5rAKvxVv81z_qwyRQg8wg)
---
I’ll be honest: this is going to be an all-out sprint to election day. Thousands of ballots have already been cast in this election, so the pool of voters we can contact is diminishing every single day — while the importance of reaching them is growing.

**That means fewer opportunities for us to let voters know the stakes of this election. The best way we have a shot at making this brand new congressional seat blue is if I’m on the ballot against Ryan Zinke this November.**

I’m talking to voters every single day who believe in our campaign and in our message. Montanans aren’t greedy folks. We’ve always thrived when we’ve had the stability to make free choices – being able to put food on the table for our family, get access to the health care we need, and security for the future.

And while my opponents have union-busting consultants and national pundits in their ear from Washington influencing their every move, the biggest influence in my campaign is the conversations I have with voters as they share their hopes – and fears – for the future of our state and country.

**At the end of the day, politicians from both sides of the aisle have taken us for a ride for far too long. It’s time that we elect a class of representatives who will actually be beholden to their constituents and not special interest groups.**

**[I know I’ll be that kind of representative, but first we must win this primary next week. So please, help us reach our final fundraising goal by making a donation right away:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzKJRBFYnnGuurjHNF501U9NIW8wL-3T4jNirG9BHycO4k1GJfvvpRpc-Hc51EbQ8NcA3LyuqQjC404812xIvZMRddh7xuU0WHHtHwSOcX3jGEVr8IZ2nK1JaQT2EHgg5oorgleZ4U6U8dLJ3R9rJn1odExHiYHV1IePnhAMYBKPUVhwEpC8yETQQWjQNzeAZ0rTR_Xl80LJerT8YEI4dC-MQ6yRULt_zQCnEbk9Zf0PqG2LSrxSG_a2A1La2plITIzONop-te4t9oGRzYd_uRAyWKMtf7vFgQse-0G5Vi2n1-nVscwlwfnghS4DjlBvs/3mk/-64kVZBlQ7OMwquB5SWn1Q/h3/yRnUbAX1llyrFaVYhkvxI9_JDXTqkjKSpGDcBzVMe7Y) **

clean_body: I’m getting straight to the point. | | | Let me get straight to the point, Friend: We are facing our FINAL fundraising deadline of this primary campaign, and I’m writing to humbly ask for your support. | I’ll be honest: this is going to be an all-out sprint to election day. Thousands of ballots have already been cast in this election, so the pool of voters we can contact is diminishing every single day — while the importance of reaching them is growing. That means fewer opportunities for us to let voters know the stakes of this election. The best way we have a shot at making this brand new congressional seat blue is if I’m on the ballot against Ryan Zinke this November. I’m talking to voters every single day who believe in our campaign and in our message. Montanans aren’t greedy folks. We’ve always thrived when we’ve had the stability to make free choices – being able to put food on the table for our family, get access to the health care we need, and security for the future. And while my opponents have union-busting consultants and national pundits in their ear from Washington influencing their every move, the biggest influence in my campaign is the conversations I have with voters as they share their hopes – and fears – for the future of our state and country. At the end of the day, politicians from both sides of the aisle have taken us for a ride for far too long. It’s time that we elect a class of representatives who will actually be beholden to their constituents and not special interest groups. | | | | | Thank you, Tom PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 1592 Polson, MT 59860 | | Sent via . I was born and raised here in Appleton. My wife Rebecca and I raise our boys and run our small business here. My family, just like yours, feels the pain at the pump and we shake our heads at the bill from the grocery check-out line. I've led in the state Senate cutting taxes, growing our economy, and fighting for our kids. Tony Evers and Joe Biden have destroyed all of that work. subject: another debate victory Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
we crushed it on mackinac island |
---
| | Hey Peter - Garrett Soldano here!

We just wrapped up our third Republican Governor candidates debate on Mackinac Island - the best debate yet for We the People's campaign for Governor!

On the issues, I spoke the truth, defended my conservative principles and shared our movement's incredible story of standing up to Governor Whitmer and winning for the people of Michigan.

This was a pivotal moment for our movement - all our hard work and dedication has been leading to these final months of the Republican Primary. I truly believe that we will win this race, and it is because of your support, prayers, encouragement and financial commitment that our citizens movement will be victorious on August 2nd.

Peter, to celebrate our debate victory, my campaign manager and I have set a goal of raising $5,000 from our grassroots warriors before midnight.

$25, $10, even $5 will make a real difference in reaching our goal and fueling this citizen-driven campaign. If you can, chip in a few bucks (or more) before midnight and help us prove to the establishment elites and Fake News media that we're in this race to win:

Use this secure link to donate: [https://secure.winred.com/garrett-for-michigan/debate3](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=07365bc72d&e=fe4b890356)

Peter, I appreciate you. Let's win this primary and take the fight to Gretchen Whitmer in November!

\- Garrett

Sent from my iPhone

|

Friends,

Wyoming was founded and built on the idea of freedom, and that’s thankfully still what our state is rooted in today.

**In Wyoming, we believe in the Code of the West.** Those tenets about your word being your bond, knowing where to draw the line, some things not being for sale are all tenets that we aspire to live up to because they go to the core of who we are as a state. **I’ve worked to embody those principles and strive to follow them as I serve.**

Our people are resilient and need an honest person who is loyal to the Constitution above all else to fight for us in Washington, D.C.

---
| | Peter,

There are just 5 days left to get out the vote for Election Day in one of the most important races in the entire country – defeating progressive caucus leader Katie Porter.
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9b26b302e3&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, here’s the latest update:

Katie Porter is sitting on a multi-million dollar war chest. In fact, she’s one of the best-funded liberal incumbents in the entire country.

Despite that, we can and are going to win. Her record in Congress is completely out of touch with voters in Orange County, including repeatedly voting for trillions of dollars in spending and then having the gall to complain about inflation on MSNBC.

**But that won’t matter if people don’t get out to vote, and with just 5 days left in this race, we still haven’t fully funded our voter outreach budget. In fact, we need to raise nearly $15,000 between now and election day. **

[_That’s why I’m personally reaching out today. With just 5 days left to go, will you please consider making a $5 donation? In turn, our team has put together a plan that will use those funds to reach 5 more voters before Tuesday._](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=07889feb15&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $5 TO REACH 5 VOTERS IN 5 DAYS](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2025c2e61b&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW: $5 TO REACH 5 VOTERS IN 5 DAYS")
---
| This is it - crunch time! Thank you for having my back!

Sincerely,
Scott Baugh

name: Dr. Betsy Oddo
subject: My mentor, Dr. Annie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| Hi there!

This is Dr. Betsy Oddo. I am a pediatrician and I work at the Children’s Hospital with Annie.

A big part of my decision to work at the Children’s Hospital in Charleston was based on the strong advocacy work, including gun violence prevention, that Annie was leading.

We see _so much_ trauma here in the hospital—kids who have their lives derailed or cut short because of gun violence—and I knew I wanted to learn from the best on how to take those horrific experiences to create positive change.

Annie has been the best mentor I could’ve asked for. She’s helped me write op-eds on gun violence, pushed me to speak at the SC Statehouse on what I’ve seen at the hospital, and worked with me on research about how to reduce firearm injuries in kids and the consequences of firearm injuries.

**[I wasn’t surprised when I heard Annie was running for Congress—no one is better equipped to fight for Lowcountry families in Congress than her. But this is going to be an uphill battle and, between the public filing deadline and the circus-like GOP primary, this June is our biggest test yet. Will you chip in $15, $50, or $100 to help Annie?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46054398/348627541/1643317256?amount=15&refcode=AA_EM_FR_1MO_20220602_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=LPs9XcaRxvwzj9IzR8x9YR28prmyXaxOlyQmb9zHNx/fL0G6UgCY4ekRFweK4YOl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDk0MWZmMS1jYmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pE0QAFxKVup6x_nocJ0GJwAPiUCyYQNCN882MhwuuZw=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Close Vote on Youth Vaccine Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Withdraw Your Bill](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorLE15ld_IfonjF7z_wESmqCQfAYxEbpGBBkEA3juwF8Q&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=1) Yesterday, the bill to let 12-year-olds get vaccinated without parental consent passed the Assembly Judiciary Committee on a 6-4 vote. But that committee passes literally everything. We can stop the bill on the Assembly Floor. I spent 20 minutes questioning the bill’s author. You can read a recap of the exchange [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=XEyBOVdeaP2GIXMB8tk43jY2eib-_ayV0AZNbJJQNJpWhQSU08Q6sbYuXOec9pdhPA_lejZ4Neu_UBvU-wfnW-rWq9OCfG9b_DZYwhuylGGkUmTcMPc_xA1hlSDGtY_z&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=2) and watch at the 2:02:30 mark [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=XN0TflzDIbd-az40BwKkf8Ot5ouAbKhPKGgdQrdi7vL9bvWmAXjaucRdbtdEATGIW_w_owMt6oFa2U_pQnE4kFjCgG6ZLzSJ8YjENZB0jLA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=3). At the end, [I said to the author](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6mUkg0Sw2Al21zP0eHDrETI6BLLm74EZjB9lguzfKOuO3XM8mXZSFeigMouAaF8nbQeDJQMm-ablXvsZLUvEfX8&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=4): _I’ll be blunt: I think you should withdraw your bill. It barely got out of the Senate. Ten of your own Democrat colleagues didn’t support it, and I do not think it’s going to get out of the Assembly. It’s a fight we don’t need to have; this is not a bill anyone is asking for. We need to move on._ I also had a message for the districts mistreating students by segregating them or excluding them from activities like prom or graduation: _I wanted to say to any school officials out there who are discriminating against kids, who are mistreating kids, who are depriving them of important formative experiences, that is absolutely wrong. It is un-American and it needs to stop._ Meanwhile, the Chief Justice of the 3rd District Court of Appeal has been expelled for inadequate job performance. This is the judge who reversed our court victory over Newsom. If not for him, one-man rule might have ended a long time ago. Kevin Kiley
California Legislator [Election Day is in 5 days. Help us get across the finish line!](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=5)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june2_final&n=6).
